name: Marcus Flowers
subject: I'm running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene, and I'm going to need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
Will you join me? | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDF7VSV0qEOcy6beFc-Ukif0G3HPZY6rEnAf-hEmceSt9n3JanRj3cPQG46ivmD5ottGfbPJDpgj51DNfPqGEPqTwsH9pHOJlPpo6n-dgLmJKru8aRjTK7v7VzrCml7WPvM6PvQexhRaSJB5bD-SI_nWE3bnJcjWd5-2vYIRnEgXGj2AY0ToDL60yqvi30VdTeIPM0NSwukGsVmDDveYENQX7hXIsn0akPeJfRJtqiD3rzPt0PMEyjJEFilXbDirQ1NS61zH-oTcsty7gNUegQvjUce30Z0_kL4Ql4PUqfcPZmNUTgupROeACdsL7Oy72jkEoatg6M7ak_AjDDWFC9Ykk1Q5GJNYuEYuGKuIXNKO_vsGotT1wxC2JGau7GU1knr9GYx1-ep1FdEsjUVC9p2I/3fj/YPXHtdMEQq2Pt_duFLx30g/h0/xztt3ahDFCqRK2bq0oozTo-D6oYqSVnPis9Gg-vaweY)
My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse.

As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.

**Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.**

**[I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Common Good VA so we can stop the alt-right and Marjorie Taylor Greene:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDF7VSV0qEOcy6beFc-Ukif3NFYzbSnGKSm5YHyLnzpvssEVSjyY1C01eVrskc-Q9kYo8jnQs-GkGc3fR63BPvwE43lm-uCIbLw7drn1H3G0dE3sbSxhDcx8a2-BqkBbuqHgwEZhlPzDM9x56mjqbFfwO254ZZ0ei50i_KgSCDfSJV0BTyQiEWJwolhkVKvd5bq5I-3QEjvDi9adRqcYzHoXMvTJ_CBmF5xnlkS1i69PhXTqFV2h6qJob0b2LOMD5v_ZlctlUW24RvTLmeLvFKKdrLlYIib__x79jhUB4ktDw2ykAMS_7FLjqDvJ004pzfQpCa2-8kV_j06tmkHy9a-W2-Lo6IV6ZYTHvQB5yhQ19eIcSipeWTcyJJ_DjeA1fCii61Iq_q9LdGGW41BpXGrg/3fj/YPXHtdMEQq2Pt_duFLx30g/h1/6sjpazL_kr7PA8icIv5ry5xwmhwKly9J7DPj7U4tPIc)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDBG0X4rsfu_xNmZobBKo2strmy-YL5raxJ47M501NB9Rm06tAjKjws-_y42858pgT1N3_WboxjXCFICtGFcVAlEtDfuvNgrPivIAoEix-qTdsqtVyMVsX0xtD4yg-UMmDs3Q2nJzbXeJT9B4aFZ5uJro-A05OHlyCsonZ0-gR_Aqq1e3B2m_9L3k_O-_2Z2l9xvxJh0Two7eIwEdz7LHKlvSJx-bhr-cYqskw0XhMO2Yt7hroIIUkdSWN2pnhKMC3Xna5WZjDgakxZ5UZksVbUrrlTzx7ObVg0YbhHAAP_3P1NNkuE8_ni0nbHZlgmhMX-hI2Eq03Egk9aUT1tOfXzdxZTikN6z6Z67xemuR0u74PJX0JsrCstRZIHP_0YuMJd9tJ5QHUHnxgydUURvy02a7bd9C647SEZJudtdisaP2/3fj/YPXHtdMEQq2Pt_duFLx30g/h2/3P-v52BMCLL0GJfl6tHDuj-6E6mcP_ZDZH2j7kgjKf4)

subject: Abby was absent once again
body:
We need REAL leadership. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=ebae716cc9&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| | Friend, Earlier today, Absent Abby Spanberger, AOC, Ilhan Omar, and other Democrats made the **terrible** decision to abandon one of our strongest allies.

The rash decision to **defund** $1,000,000,000 from Israel’s Iron Dome shows Abby’s true colors. This must change. We must stand with our allies and stand in opposition to the world’s bad actors.

I will not absent-mindedly follow party bosses: I will do what is best for our country and most importantly, I will do what is best for you.
I stand with Israel and the people of Israel.
Thank you,

[](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=a62b51affd&e=ae0ea222da)
Tina Ramirez

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: This is not okay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This is not okay, never has been okay, never will be okay.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210921-2522-header&t=1&akid=2522%2E2526796%2EMc42Zw)
Yesterday, horrific images surfaced of US Border Patrol agents on horseback rounding up Haitian refugees with whips.
**This is not okay, never has been okay, never will be okay** – no matter the administration or party. We have to accept that our current immigration system is designed for cruelty and dehumanization of immigrants.
Immigration is not a crime, and its criminalization is a relatively recent invention. This is a stain on our country, and it’s time for the system to be reimagined.
A lot of people ask, “Well, what else can we do?” The answer is there’s a lot we can do.
Earlier this year, Alexandria joined her colleagues including Rep. Pramila Jayapal and FIRM Action — the nation’s largest immigrant rights network — to introduce the Roadmap to Freedom Resolution.
**The[Roadmap to Freedom](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10071?refcode=em20210921-2522-P_ENG_RES_IMM&source=em20210921-2522-P_ENG_RES_IMM&t=2&akid=2522%2E2526796%2EMc42Zw) outlines a set of principles for an American immigration system that is just, empathetic, effective and fair. It calls for:**
* A pathway to citizenship for 11 million people
* An end to inhumane and unjust family detention
* Investing in humane, community-based alternatives to detention and demilitarizing the border
* Increasing protections for immigrant workers

[If you support this resolution and want to grow our fight for bold, progressive immigration reform in Congress, please add your name here so we can demonstrate how many people are calling for change. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/roadmap-to-freedom/?refcode=em20210921-2522-P_ENG_RES_IMM&source=em20210921-2522-P_ENG_RES_IMM&t=3&akid=2522%2E2526796%2EMc42Zw)
**[Are you in? →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/roadmap-to-freedom/?refcode=em20210921-2522-P_ENG_RES_IMM&source=em20210921-2522-P_ENG_RES_IMM&t=4&akid=2522%2E2526796%2EMc42Zw)**
When talking about immigration, the media all too often fails to provide any of the context for why immigrants are desperately fleeing their countries.
The reasons are usually deeply rooted in history, and the situation in Haiti is no different. After suffering through a devastating earthquake in August that killed 2,207 people and political unrest after the assasination of President Jovenel Moïse, the situation in the country is deeply unstable. It’s no surprise then that approximately 15,000 Haitians have fled the country seeking asylum.1
No matter the circumstance, seeking asylum is a human right. Period.
**With Democrats in control of Congress and in the White House, we must seize this moment to go bigger and bolder on reforming our immigration system.**
[Please add your name right now if you support equitable immigration reform that centers family unity, combats injustice, and works for everyone.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/roadmap-to-freedom/?refcode=em20210921-2522-P_ENG_RES_IMM&source=em20210921-2522-P_ENG_RES_IMM&t=5&akid=2522%2E2526796%2EMc42Zw)
With resolve,
Team AOC

* * *
1[https://www.aljazeera.com/gallery/2021/9/20/photos-us-deport-haitian-migrants-texas-border-camp](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10072?source=em20210921-2522-P_ENG_RES_IMM&t=6&akid=2522%2E2526796%2EMc42Zw)

It calls for: A pathway to citizenship for 11 million people An end to inhumane and unjust family detention Investing in humane, community-based alternatives to detention and demilitarizing the border Increasing protections for immigrant workers When talking about immigration, the media all too often fails to provide any of the context for why immigrants are desperately fleeing their countries. The reasons are usually deeply rooted in history, and the situation in Haiti is no different. After suffering through a devastating earthquake in August that killed 2,207 people and political unrest after the assasination of President Jovenel Moïse, the situation in the country is deeply unstable. It’s no surprise then that approximately 15,000 Haitians have fled the country seeking asylum.1 No matter the circumstance, seeking asylum is a human right. Period. With Democrats in control of Congress and in the White House, we must seize this moment to go bigger and bolder on reforming our immigration system. With resolve, Team AOC 1 | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: REPUBLICAN SABOTAGE ALERT (via DCCC)
subject: outraged;
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you CONDEMN Republicans for their dangerous, deadly lies about our elections? | | | **_NEW REPORT: Phony election fraud conspiracies are already infecting the midterms_**

---
| We're OUTRAGED.
****
Republicans are STILL spreading dangerous conspiracy theories and lies about the 2020 election.

We're calling for an URGENT grassroots response powered by input from our top supporters:**

Do you CONDEMN Republicans for their dangerous, deadly lies about our elections?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

We're outraged.

**FIRST:** Our Democrats _**FLIPPED**_ the Senate, _**HELD**_ the House, and _**DEFEATED**_ Donald Trump.

**BUT THEN:** Republicans were **LIVID** and pushed deadly, anti-democratic lies about election fraud -- _even inciting a deadly insurrection._

**AND NOW:** Breaking reports are revealing those lies have spread even further within the GOP -- **and are already undermining next year 's midterm elections!**

We need to act **NOW**.

If we let Republicans get away with their disgusting schemes to defeat our Majority, we'll be powerless to stop them from imposing their fringe, far-right agenda on the country.

**We 're calling for an URGENT grassroots response -- _so we 're asking you directly:_**
**[Do you CONDEMN Republicans for their dangerous, deadly lies about our elections?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_)**
| [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45656477&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4NDMwNDg0NQS2&l=13870087&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: What's NOT in your wallet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
PeterThanks to rising inflation _(and Joe Biden's big-spending economic policies), _there's a lot less spending power in your wallet these days.Food prices are rising. Gas prices are, too.School supplies, used cars, even brats and chicken... just about everything is more expensive than it was a year ago. [Help Me Fight Back - Average Donation: $35](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctrsg-ahkdjtlkr-r/) _**We need to take back the majority from the liberals before it's too late!**_ It's no exaggeration - **Wisconsin is THE number one target** on the Democrats' map to defend the majority in Congress. That means we need to step up NOW, not further down the road when their cash advantage is bigger and we've fallen behind.**Here's our problem... Thanks to Biden's inflation and flat economy, too many are out of work, farmers are struggling and families are worried. Biden's economic problems aren't affecting his Silicon-Valley donors and limousine liberals - they're affecting US!**_**If you can afford it, could you step up to cover someone who can't afford to give right now?**_ The average contribution to my campaign this month is $35. I am looking for 50 supporters to step up and **double their impact** to help us fill the gap for those who are struggling, thanks to Biden.**Can I count on you?** Thanks,-Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [Average Contribution: $35](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctrsg-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Double Your Impact: $70](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctrsg-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [Choose Another Amount](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctrsg-ahkdjtlkr-t/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctrsg-ahkdjtlkr-h/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctrsg-ahkdjtlkr-k/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctrsg-ahkdjtlkr-u/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-ctrsg-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-o) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-u-ctrsg-ahkdjtlkr-b/)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Dirty Trick by Scott Jensen
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dirty_trick_by_scott_jensen&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Politicians care about one thing: getting elected. And of course, once that happens, their focus is re-election and election to higher office. You and I know that they will do and say anything to get elected. **So in order to get re-elected, politicians avoid taking controversial positions since those issues are likely to anger a faction of the electorate - even though those positions might help you by protecting your freedom.** It's our job to make sure politicians protect our freedom even if it's controversial, otherwise we will wake up in a country we no longer recognize. But when you force them to take action, that’s when the dirty tricks are played. You see, over a month ago, we teamed up with Rep Erik Mortensen and a bunch of healthcare workers to craft the [**Stop Vaccine Mandates legislation**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=V4aZFzq5K-w4VJa-OkXRhTEcv1j4M28abuOZAzCZnWxBec-v0mwLjQjWjXri1Skww_PhIMyQ2_QxDfNofywEyQ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dirty_trick_by_scott_jensen&n=2) which will be used as an amendment on the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay bill during the upcoming Special Session. We created a [pledge](https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dirty_trick_by_scott_jensen&n=3) so politicians, starting with Republicans (who are supposed to be on our side for freedom) could sign and show that they support stopping vaccine mandates. **But they all refused, hoping we wouldn’t turn up the heat.** Then Joe Biden doubled down and illegally used the federal government to mandate vaccines. That made Rep Mortensen’s**Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment** even more important, since it nullifies Biden’s orders. Our team started hitting the phones a couple weeks ago, thanks to your support, and we’ve contacted tens of thousands of voters across Minnesota about this important issue. So politicians started scrambling, trying to figure out what to do to respond to this growing movement demanding action. **Instead of locking arms with healthcare workers to save their jobs with the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment; they instead decided to run a cover bill that doesn't even do what it claims.** And they found a surprising ally to write their bill in an attempt to derail our movement: Dr Scott Jensen. You heard that right, Jensen teamed up with politicians in St Paul to distract people’s attention from our critical piece of legislation we’ve been pushing for the last month for the upcoming Special Session. They are trying to undermine the work and money you put into DEMANDING your legislators pass the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment. Of course, Jensen copied a lot of what Mortensen’s bill already had in it, but stopped short of actually nullifying Biden’s illegal orders. Rep. Mortensen explains it here: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=JgIBoJDRsS4q5gIGXkALnbmuFS31amsj3me_nGtjjGg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dirty_trick_by_scott_jensen&n=4) What Jensen and politicians in St Paul are doing is giving voters the impression that they are going to do something about the issue. They will all say now that they won't sign the pledge because they are supporting the "Health Freedom Sanctuary State" bill written by Scott Jensen. But just crafting legislation isn't enough - we must DEMAND action. That's why Rep Mortensen's Amendment and our pledge is key. Politicians have to take the hard position of not voting for their beloved $250 Million bill unless it has the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment attached to it. And we just learned that politicians in St Paul are close to an agreement on the $250 Million bill. The Special Session is right around the corner! Jensen's gang of Career Politicians in St Paul will tout they have an incredible bill, then will let it die, pass the $250 Million spending bill, blame everything on Democrats, then tell you to vote for them in November of 2022. **Ever seen this trick before? I sure have. Don't let them get away with it!!!** We would've loved to have Jensen join our efforts, but it appears he valued a quick political win and helping out his politician buddies more than winning this important issue. Even worse, he wrote the bill and had RINO legislators like Jim Abeler author it, someone who has refused to sign the Stop Vaccine Mandates pledge. Abeler even admitted his close friendship with Dept of Health Commissioner Jan Malcolm, the person behind the attacks on our beloved small businesses. Abeler is the reason Malcolm was never fired! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k04wHYpZIjuzYKUYXVGgWAw&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dirty_trick_by_scott_jensen&n=5) Some of you probably already knew Jensen was a RINO politician who **refuses to sign the Never Again Pledge** , has a terrible **23% lifetime rating** on our [Scorecard](https://www.action4liberty.com/scorecard?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dirty_trick_by_scott_jensen&n=6), and **refused to make a motion on the End Walz' Emergency Powers** resolution during the May 2020 lockdown. But others are probably upset to hear about this. After all, Jensen talks a good game about COVID. But he is a politician and remember the first part of this email...
## **Politicians care about one thing: getting elected.**
That's the sad reality of politics. But we refuse to quit or allow this issue to be derailed by politicians. You and I have been here before with politicians playing games. Politicians tried to derail us for over a year on the effort to End Walz' Emergency Powers. From the Republicans not allowing votes, to Democrats flip flopping once their vote actually counted, to leadership jumping the line to block Mortensen's resolutions. But we WON in the end because they can't stop 'We The People'. This battle is no different. **We MUST DEMAND that our state representatives and state senators do not agree to pass the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay bill unless it includes the Rep Erik Mortensen's [Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=V4aZFzq5K-w4VJa-OkXRhTEcv1j4M28abuOZAzCZnWxBec-v0mwLjQjWjXri1Skww_PhIMyQ2_QxDfNofywEyQ&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dirty_trick_by_scott_jensen&n=7) with it.** This is the best shot we have at NULLIFYING BIDEN'S ORDERS!!! Rep Erik Mortensen's **Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment** would make Biden's order unenforceable in Minnesota. We MUST get this passed! | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dirty_trick_by_scott_jensen&n=8 "FIND MY REP & SENATOR") [FIND MY REP & SENATOR](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dirty_trick_by_scott_jensen&n=8)
---
Just as we were able to win on ending the emergency in June (otherwise we'd have a lockdown and mask mandates now), we have to let our legislators know we will accept nothing less than the **Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment**.
And if you see Scott Jensen on the campaign trail, tell him to apologize for choosing to help a bunch of career politicians instead of joining you and the masses of healthcare workers, activists and voters who are trying to pass the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment!
I love being able to fight shoulder-to-shoulder with great patriots like you to protect our freedom.
And with your help and support, we can put up another win for liberty.
Make sure to visit **[action4liberty.com](https://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dirty_trick_by_scott_jensen&n=9)** every day as we keep you updated on this battle.
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dirty_trick_by_scott_jensen&n=10).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dirty_trick_by_scott_jensen&n=11).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dirty_trick_by_scott_jensen&n=12), software for leaders.

As activists and community organizers, they have continuously shown up ready to fight for all of us, now it’s up to us to get them elected!

We are thrilled with the incredible lineup of special guests who are leaders and movement builders. They will lead the conversation on specific policy topics with candidates and open the floor to respond to your questions. This cycle we have worked extra hard to vet our candidates and are so proud of our current slate because they all possess the lived experiences needed to advocate for a more equitable future. subject: I’ve got one question:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
Do you approve of Kevin McCarthy? | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLogfpTJVRLvunD2WkacMUgOPbEgt1g8DDeNJGv5gqxMdVEjtclBVWG-CuCo0LFZiRPvuSdNpIskux9Z0UZwgW1Cz0I4ln7Q4EKJEABruOCI9KCnlFxD407LzDYXwsyOOuHdH6DFbqob28NSTx0xPWTe25XipeK1gEcpHcCor8p229chTh4S3yRtVeH0TknZZUCHTND3Yw_tuDuS3HN8Jd4OtjVZbrfA5PyUEb7BwYYalA1aZQ_o0qp5CClcV4MEY4zoi2K15hyVM4QelNCUZBsIfU2CRR9eLDsRxtlYqBCnFBRGnhCYvmV3-ezddfnwE3drMuo8qRHmW9BlCVFqlmKRiGzpwekgoODRKyx5O3iU98/3fj/Sjff37TVQq6QiakV1l2GoA/h0/M4uLZXgpfxrG4d1VGgL3P8gT0pHc4N-05ddNmp6EBlg)

Folks,

Just this year, Kevin McCarthy has helped spread the Big Lie that led to the storming of the Capitol, stood in the way of the investigation of that same terrorist attack, and now he’s going all out against the Biden Administration’s push for vaccines while the Delta variant continues to ravage communities across America. **I’ve got a simple question: Do you support Kevin McCarthy?** | | [Yes](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ztoA112KcQjBi-S6STSqxgHjqtVfSdNVV7JBPL8V_kBlu0I17ePAwtTr7jxe1-WeUt4fRzmltGu6i4Cp4LbO5X7-fMTraENaU2MlfVkLq56XS8rn0Bp8naxG71eF8akvN-Sne7E3lkf9wZ8NMNloOqe64soR8K7jVMF3VeCGRX2sSReZIE8DdGw7z6APss-vMcqw4ZKd0Xyrb4whD27Y8Un821_ESlu3PCojnVjSEdhsT17_hfL0nSUuPYUVY_vm54-1eGJfLp9knM_beK_lphMpSvLcHiZ1ME1jZ5BoW9qvJeAT6S5vdIiJZaHFvd6gPfD_IENjgvxgNRAxaVV8m_4AEL-vnIGXrZsNDNwAE0rQ/3fj/Sjff37TVQq6QiakV1l2GoA/h1/rDiDIdTORmKZ1MgUwlffDrl94aPR5_x4uECip_TkhXU)
---
| | [NO!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ztoA112KcQjBi-S6STSqxgbF13w_d1YCEFvO9HJy3eJmBLGV5zGk0YH0V5QDEM4Fi2J7yE6kz77jXJGdBcdcDmLwrJAgqcTOc2bcu0Z4M4Ttzl2il4Bnz_flLMhkndNVL6if-XC4W7nnwCTnLt8L_MjkwuoLGxHLyqj93c6zF2prUZ6HBgJwucI5kQrTfMZ8q3LhZhrnSBUA2oVpWjr9scmTL62SAIBkUlukSEQeWVcAhB13mwxcl0DIlzwiAMYZE8SgFSv0yeBx1ZPT_nPkQtcB9auEnQb2WskrjIGCc3EsJOhM5GkW4OCngqPNA67fNoj6YStOniNCTZt1iZvYXfX2L6GRfV5ZNjAEv44W7jXQ/3fj/Sjff37TVQq6QiakV1l2GoA/h2/SlQuKw1WXYWyR9boxeJP-Y8DFBcWlZBqRznRnGKZe3s)
---
And if you think Kevin McCarthy has failed America as a national leader, just wait until you learn what he’s done for CA-23 -- spoiler alert: it’s next to nothing.

While drought and climate change get worse each year, Kevin does nothing.

When COVID cases continue to climb and vaccination rates stay stagnant in his district, Kevin does nothing.

And the VA clinic that Kevin promised he would build for his district... yet another broken promise.
**I’m going to ask again -- after years of failed leadership, do you support Kevin McCarthy, or do you think it’s time for new leadership?**
| [I support Kevin](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ztoA112KcQjBi-S6STSqxgHjqtVfSdNVV7JBPL8V_kBlu0I17ePAwtTr7jxe1-WeUt4fRzmltGu6i4Cp4LbO5X7FOvts5fHIFbEUrMp6xC7Fyir6B8ewmwBwoI4J3I_f9VE96VeNcDBHRbF8MDdEPfwqf4tclPQPTZ-v37R6LVovHYU-WuFNOErd4EfQqZmJ_7_DkeKanV7DhWKW49a9P-SYamXvQAd4iI8v9TIR_oMXgEnpnMX_XcqFmISiOmB6Y1wX_N-bzzQsqP1x3wqEpwXAaBEjXqw6HInUfkR6jA5EMnXl5cB-whHKfZ9e7gt4gx5tQJE8xXFlF9Ph4jAJIW6FGraYjBiIc5eD-b1cr2dbMFe-1R_7_Q1j1o-K_ZZl0/3fj/Sjff37TVQq6QiakV1l2GoA/h3/rvj-LYHTp2UfFG-L2afcZWEh6Ge1Ct2L-ZwQ3gpJHlc)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m proud to call myself a conservative
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I've officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkE9r4zAQxT-Nc5PRv0r2wYfEdkihtLRlezWyNIkFkhwsuSX76VdJs3vYU0EM6DfzHjPPNJRLzmBjG4opwTWlmHBJREnKntNO4o52bbsXeMcKjr06KaWTnYNysKRSz34zNRURVU0MMCH0CPqBaim5JpWuMa5qgTeumVI6x4JtC7rPL4JeFyi_bFjAXE0yS6A8mmCJegKHbNCZObUGPaFPa2BGUaGlYPs1-SHO66KhYN0CnwUVV6SVPyt7Chl-q-7cg7GrzxS8si7DqPPnfisZDv3be3von4a-H963w9P213N7QB-PXf8yvPUfmf31n0OCkLI2aIfkzlcxmNfL79wegrMmN_6D8QaBETIyZdCojxpxwis0Aq4Q54bDkQtWj3KzNOb8ZZ2zUcic8um66i3bfJSzx0tTyF1B6bpmS0pvMdKfGF-HaZtrupzhn_JuWt4ToYXs_gA-lJ4b)

---
Friend,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[I want to tell you why I am running for United States Senate.](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkEFrwzAMhX-Ne3OIZTduDzm0SboOxgYb2zU4ttoYbKckTkf__dyu22GngRH4k95DeqYEIQXHhS0hB5avAXImJCsyljUCapnXUFfVrsi3nIjcq6NSOtohKIdjzPTgF325VgaW6yXHXGo4CFZ0Wq-UTowLvVzKhSv7GE8T4RsCu_Qm1POI2acNI5qrSWIRlac9jpPu0VEbdGJOzUH39GwNDnRSdCR8N0ffTsM8aiS8HvFMoLgirfxJ2WNI8Ft15x6NnX2i6JV1CU46fe63snbfvL5V--apbZr2bdM-bd6fqz39eKybl_a1-Ujsx38IEUNM2qAdPcezl-pyeTCp3QZnTWr8gdMNImes48rQTh80FUysaIf5igphBB5EwdedXIylOX1a5-xUyJTy8brqLdt0lLOHS0nklgDMc7IEuMUI_zG-DkOVaryc8Fd5N83uiQCR9Rdd_58n)**

[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkM1qwzAQhJ9GuclYK2E7Bx9S2yGFpi0J7dXoZx0LZDnYckrfvkqa9tBTQRLstzuDdkwJIhccV7aEFFi6BkiZyFmWsKQRUOdpDXVVbbP0gRORDvIkpQ529NLhFBI9Dqu-ZFwJpjK-VrksAItcFWu9VsZ0KcSrVq7sQzjPhG8IbOOZUS8TJh_WT2iuJpEFlAPtcZp1j45aryNzcvG6pxdrcKSzpBPh2yUM7Twuk0bC6wkvBLIr0nI4S3vyEX6r7nxAY5chUhykdRHOOhb3XVm7aw7Hatc8tU3THjft0-btudrR98e6eWkPzXtkP_6jD-hD1HrtaLffm9fsBBFA1npnTWz8gfMNImdMcWmo0p2mgomCKkwLKoQR2IlbaKupNOcP65ydszymfLp-9ZZtXMrZ7rMk-QMBWJZoCXCLEf5jfB2GKr7h84y_yrtpck8ESF5_AVQ7nno)
>From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Friend, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams – just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us – not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkM1uwjAQhJ_G3BzZG5PAIQean9IK0QrUXiPHXoglx0GJA-LtayjtoadK1kr-dme0OzoDkYoYZyYDBpwtARgXKU8iHpUCipQVUOR5lbCnmAjWyaOUypveSYuDj1TfzdpMLOY6AWRLTDVv9JI3sZhrKTVjOAcJM5u13p9GEq8IVOGNqKYBo4txA-qbSWAeZUdbHEbVoqXGqcCsnJxq6dlo7Oko6UDiavJdPfbToJDExYBnAskNKdmdpDm6AL9VD96hNlMXKHbS2ABHFT6PW3m9Lnf7fF1u6rKs96t6s_rY5mv6-VKUb_Wu_Azsx793Hp0PWqcsrZ7X20X1_roLmye1s0aHxh843iHGPMQhNW3UQVHBxYI2yBZUCC3wIJJ42aSzIdOni7HWjEkaUj7eVr1nG46y5nDNSPpEAKYpWALcY4T_GN-GIQ_VX0_4q3yYRo9EgKTFF0lenWM) **

Friend, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkEFr4zAQhX-NcpORxlrLOfiQ2g5ZWrqQ0u7RjOVxLJDlYMsp7a9fJc3uoacFMaBv5j1mXleA0iqljS1AgBRbACGVllkik1pBpUUFVVnuM_GQMiVGPCGaYCePjuaQmGncDEXf5wIViPwH4FYj9gi50H2uZEuZynHjiiGE88LSHYN9fAuZdabk3fqZuqtJZIFw5APNixnIcetNZA5XbwZ-sR1NfEE-s3S_hrFZpnU2xNJqpguD7IoMjme0Jx_hl-rOR-rsOkZKI1oX4WLi536rbA718aU81E9NXTcvu-Zp9_pcHvjbz6r-1Rzrt8j--k8-kA9R643jj58Y9r-PjxeK7cY728XGN7jcIKVStil2vDW94UqqnLckcq5Up6hXWbpt9WYuuvO7dc4umY4pn66r3rKNRznbfxRMPzCAdY2WALcY4X-Mr8NQxho-zvRPeTdN7okA09UfJpuerA)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

clean_body: I've officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> | Friend, Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream. He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League. That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams. From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams. But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground. It's time for that to change. Friend, I am proud to call myself a conservative. I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility. I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams – just like I did. I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us – not divide us. Friend, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Donald J. Trump September 21st, 2021
President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, will be joined by Herschel Walker, Congressman Jody Hice, and Georgia State Senator Burt Jones at the Save America Rally in Perry, GA on Saturday, September 25, 2021.

This rally is a continuation of President Trump’s many appearances in support of candidates and causes that further the MAGA legacy and accomplishments of President Trump’s Administration.

_**Saturday, September 25, 2021, at 7:00 PM EDT**_
**President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, Delivers Remarks**

_**Venue:**_
Georgia National Fairgrounds
401 Larry Walker Pkwy
Perry, GA 31069

_**Special Guest Speakers:**_
Mr. Herschel Walker, Candidate for United States Senate from Georgia
Congressman Jody Hice, Candidate for Georgia Secretary of State
Georgia State Senator Burt Jones, Candidate for Georgia Lt. Governor

_**Timeline of Events:**_
11:00AM – Livestream of Georgia Bulldogs at Vanderbilt

5:00PM – Program Begins with Pre-Program Remarks

name: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Higher Taxes than Communist China
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58378168:Jlegfb2yN:m:1:3103520637:74E07E49C9920EA734BB5BD65CE10250:r "Endorsement") Peter, When I ran for office, I thought I knew how bad things were in Washington. I could see that our elected "leaders" were working only for themselves. I also knew that I would not be popular in the DC cocktail scene. **_I was not disappointed._** In less than a year, Congress took a vote to revoke my committee assignments as a partisan ploy instead of serving the American people who elected them. I had one liberal who was so triggered by my presence that she moved her office farther away from me. **The Democrats have also tried multiple times to remove me from office.** Now, we can see why they tried so hard. Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi are planning a Communist takeover of the United States of America - **_and they cannot afford to have someone like me standing in their way._** **[If you can also see the threats to our nation and want to help me fight back, please donate $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58378169:Jlegfb2yN:m:1:3103520637:74E07E49C9920EA734BB5BD65CE10250:r "If you can also see the threats to our nation and want to help me
fight back, please donate $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY!")** First, Joe Biden decides that HE will now be making the medical decisions for you and your family (I am sure he knows best, sigh). _Now_ , Joe Biden has announced his $3.5 trillion plan to expand the government's role in our lives radically - they call it the "social safety net." **This is ON TOP of the $3.5 Trillion Infrastructure Bill that Nancy Pelosi has already forced through the House.** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58378168:Jlegfb2yN:m:1:3103520637:74E07E49C9920EA734BB5BD65CE10250:r "Taxes")But don't worry, they have a plan to pay for all this. **They will impose tax rates higher than Communist China and turn the Democrat Party into the Communist Party of America.** **Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi will give Communist China tips on how to tax and control their people.** If you are OK with this, you can stop reading - _this message isn 't for you._ **[But if you're ready to fight for the future of our nation, then I need you by my side - I need you to put some skin in the game and join the fight with the most generous donation of $50 or more TODAY! Any amount you can afford is greatly appreciated.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58378170:Jlegfb2yN:m:1:3103520637:74E07E49C9920EA734BB5BD65CE10250:r "But if you’re ready to fight for the future of our nation,
then I need you by my side – I need you to put some skin in the game and join the fight with the most generous donation of $50 or more TODAY!
Any amount you can afford is greatly appreciated.")** The left knows I can see through their lies and that I will expose them--just like President Trump did, and you saw how they tried to destroy him--they can't help themselves while Joe Biden and his team keep blaming President Trump for THEIR actions. **And their friends in the Fake News hate me more than they hate the Taliban.** I've proven all year that I am not afraid, and I will not bend - this makes me a target - their whole con relies on Congress doing nothing but putting you and me in their control--under the thumb of people like AOC and Nancy Pelosi. They are going to throw everything they can at me. That wants all of us distracted with mandates and chaos in Afghanistan so they can get away with their attempts to defraud the American people. **I was elected to end the radical left 's scheme so that I can endure their attacks, but only if I know that Conservatives across the nation are standing with me.** **[If you believe that freedom and American Greatness are worth fighting for, then you need to donate $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or whatever you can afford to help me before it is too late.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58378169:Jlegfb2yN:m:1:3103520637:74E07E49C9920EA734BB5BD65CE10250:r "If you believe that freedom and American
Greatness are worth fighting for, then you need to donate $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or whatever you can afford to help me before it is too late.")** The American people are free, and the Democrats cannot stand to see that. I will fight to my dying breath to defend our nation. **[Will you join me?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58378168:Jlegfb2yN:m:1:3103520637:74E07E49C9920EA734BB5BD65CE10250:r "Will you join me?")** God Bless America, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58378168:Jlegfb2yN:m:1:3103520637:74E07E49C9920EA734BB5BD65CE10250:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)
---

| | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9ade7trm4spqp1e480t3r02hvjkdh60cm6jul38_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cpi64o31c1h2bs)

| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrjh947c1camjojptll5jlipum7s4mmjt695jhi8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cpi64o31c1h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo0kokgel4uhicapajukhu494d8tdudmv4c5b1h0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cpi64o31c1h2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

My opponent in the Florida Senate race is Marco Rubio. Rubio is running his campaign using the Trump playbook.

He’s divisive. He misrepresents my record. He’d even welcome the twice-impeached former president on the campaign trail.

**[Please, contribute anything you can right now and do your part to help Terry McAuliffe win in Virginia. name: Nikki Fried
subject: Standing against anti-choice legislation, today and always
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

It seems like Ron DeSantis has been a lot more concerned with Texas than Florida recently.

First, he said he’ll “have a look” at a Texas-style abortion ban in Florida after Texas passed the country’s most extreme anti-choice legislation.

Then, he travelled to Texas yesterday to raise money from major Republican donors, once again putting his Presidential ambitions before Floridians.

We deserve better than an anti-choice Governor who’s far more concerned with running for President than leading Florida in times of crisis. If you’re with us on this, click here to chip in now and help
Nikki defeat DeSantis next year. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-texas-desantissept]

DeSantis’ failed leadership is nothing new—but the stakes couldn’t be higher.

Floridians need a Governor who will lead us in times of crisis and stand up for our rights. Instead, Ron DeSantis is raising money in Texas and following their lead on anti-choice legislation.

Friend, we can’t wait until next year to fight back. If you’re in a position to give, please click here to chip in now and help Nikki win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-texas-desantissept]

—Team Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Mary Vought
subject: Four Freedom Fighters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Patriot:

Simply electing a Republican majority in the Senate
will NOT put the brakes on the woke socialists in Washington.
Many Republicans are sadly just as bad as the Democrats.

Take Senator Mitch McConnell, for example. This
year, he has supported the Democrats' budget-busting
infrastructure bill, threatened Americans with more lockdowns if
they don't get the experimental Covid vaccine, and opposed the
impeachment of President Biden after he left thousands of
Americans stranded with the Taliban in Afghanistan.

Let's face it: there is little to gain from winning
the Senate if the Republicans we elect are feckless RINOs!

That's why we need to send rock-solid conservatives
to the Senate who won't salute Mitch McConnell but fight for our
liberties and stand up to anyone who gets in their way!

Senate Conservatives Fund is working to do just
that. We're an independent grassroots organization with a long
record of supporting America First candidates over the DC
establishment's handpicked yes-men. And with your help, our
candidates can win!

Please join us in supporting these four outstanding
conservatives by making a split contribution to their campaigns.

✅ Mo Brooks (R-AL)
✅ Ted Budd (R-NC)
✅ Adam Laxalt (R-NV)
✅ Josh Mandel (R-OH)

These candidates are true conservatives who have
records of actually fighting for those principles. It's not
enough to say you hold the correct policy positions; we need
fearless fighters who will do what it takes to stop the Left's
political machine.

Please make your most generous contribution to
support these courageous conservatives!

The 2022 election isn't next fall or even next year.
It's right now. SCF is actively vetting, recruiting, and funding
the candidates who will change the Republican Party, Washington,
and America.

The DC establishment is gearing up to demonize our
candidates because their policies have failed.

Consider this: In less than a year, the Democrats
have created a border crisis that has enriched drug cartels,
they've sided with racists in promoting Critical Race Theory,
they've repeatedly misled Americans in the fight against Covid,
their wasteful spending has given us the worst inflation in
decades, and now their failure in Afghanistan has brought shame
onto our country and emboldened our enemies. And worst of all,
most Republicans have done nothing to stop it!

Please help us build a conservative Senate that will
aggressively and effectively fight for America's future!

Thank you for considering this urgent request and
for doing so much to support conservative leadership in
Washington.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

2022 SENATE CANDIDATES

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

name: 2022 Senate Update (via MaggieHassan.com)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
It's crucial that everyone understands the importance of the 2022 elections, team. Right now, our Senate is split 50-50, and if we lose even one seat, we will lose our Senate majority. Mitch McConnell has made it no secret that he is entirely focused on retaking the Senate in 2022. If he succeeds, he will do everything in his power to obstruct the Democrats’ agenda. McConnell even promised that if he's the majority leader, he won't allow President Biden to fill a potential Supreme Court vacancy. **If Mitch McConnell has his way, the Supreme Court could strip Americans of their health care, overturn Roe v. Wade, and deny citizens the right to vote.** We can't let that happen. If we want to protect our Senate majority and continue building on Democrats' progress, we need to reelect Maggie Hassan here in New Hampshire. **[But right now, our fundraising has slowed to a crawl. With our big FEC deadline just around the corner, we need to pick up the pace. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: President Biden is right: we must pass the Equality Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Ten years ago this week, **Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell** (DADT) was repealed.
In honor of this milestone, President Biden renewed his support for passing landmark civil rights legislation for LBGTQ+ Americans.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36234662/307492658/739037847?refcode2=8ef9d864-ba1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210922-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY5ZDg2NC1iYTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8VjI5cIyNkcsv7pztNSDE6NPH9k1FTDhZnx93pirTCA=&emci=894e945e-ba1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=8ef9d864-ba1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=24719896)
For those of you who don’t remember, DADT allowed LGBTQ+ people to serve in the military as long as they didn’t reveal their sexuality to anyone; in turn, no one could ask them to disclose that information.
DADT was misguided and downright discriminatory. It told LGBTQ+ Americans that they deserved to feel shame for being themselves — even if they were willing to die for this country.
I am proud to see how far we have come since the repeal of Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell — including my own election as the nation’s first openly gay, Black member of Congress — but the truth is that we still have a long way to go. It’s still legal under federal law to discriminate against a person for their sexuality, and that will remain true until we abolish the filibuster and pass the Equality Act in the U.S. Senate.
[**Please add your name here to join me — and President Biden — in support of the Equality Act. It’s past time that LGBTQ+ Americans were afforded the same rights as everyone else.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36234664/307492659/739037847?refcode2=8ef9d864-ba1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210922-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY5ZDg2NC1iYTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8VjI5cIyNkcsv7pztNSDE6NPH9k1FTDhZnx93pirTCA=&emci=894e945e-ba1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=8ef9d864-ba1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=24719896)
President Biden’s administration has the potential to get more done for LGBTQ+ people than any administration prior. As someone who is openly gay, I couldn’t be more honored to be part of this historic push for civil rights.
Thank you for your support,
Mondaire

clean_body: Ten years ago this week, Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell (DADT) was repealed. In honor of this milestone, President Biden renewed his support for passing landmark civil rights legislation for LBGTQ+ Americans. For those of you who don’t remember, DADT allowed LGBTQ+ people to serve in the military as long as they didn’t reveal their sexuality to anyone; in turn, no one could ask them to disclose that information. DADT was misguided and downright discriminatory. It told LGBTQ+ Americans that they deserved to feel shame for being themselves — even if they were willing to die for this country. I am proud to see how far we have come since the repeal of Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell — including my own election as the nation’s first openly gay, Black member of Congress — but the truth is that we still have a long way to go. It’s still legal under federal law to discriminate against a person for their sexuality, and that will remain true until we abolish the filibuster and pass the Equality Act in the U.S. Senate. President Biden’s administration has the potential to get more done for LGBTQ+ people than any administration prior. As someone who is openly gay, I couldn’t be more honored to be part of this historic push for civil rights. Thank you for your support, Mondaire * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. clean_body: | | | = | | I’ll be blunt, Derek. A recent poll shows a tied race and I’m stunned that more members of our grassroots team aren’t stepping up and donating right now. = I mean, think about it: My opponent Glenn Youngkin said he is running to be Virginia’s governor because of Donald Trump. And media outlets like the Washington Post are reporting that Youngkin is undermining our democracy by “playing footsie with the ‘big lie.’” And, with Roe V. Wade hanging on by a thread, Glenn Youngkin could bring a Texas-style abortion ban to Virginia. Look, early voting has already begun, and right now, Donald Trump’s handpicked guy has a real shot to win. Don’t let it happen. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Terry = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

This is important — [**sign on to support Adam’s _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36239963/307507094/1632148256?contactdata=Tj3rfWHJkTGm19ToRB2AgeqHGKmkpuUY3YPKao57csVldIFlPuduhB%2Bbhg2s3k5IjLnvTaiOlcbu%2B6cAZgIr0S4c5SlKkp3svWaos5imZQ6Uj1eKrzuIqQsqFiryxVQw7ghBghx9UEfAoWmyOwWizLEHGGrr2GxK2cBWalOB6%2Bg%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20210922_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20210922_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTRhMTJmNS1jMTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_tZCln69nxoCf_O6oqSnpk2zd6RzlfgSuOBIR_bmo8=&emci=c14a12f5-c11b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ca4a12f5-c11b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=33917617) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36239965/307507096/1632148256?contactdata=Tj3rfWHJkTGm19ToRB2AgeqHGKmkpuUY3YPKao57csVldIFlPuduhB%2Bbhg2s3k5IjLnvTaiOlcbu%2B6cAZgIr0S4c5SlKkp3svWaos5imZQ6Uj1eKrzuIqQsqFiryxVQw7ghBghx9UEfAoWmyOwWizLEHGGrr2GxK2cBWalOB6%2Bg%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20210922_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20210922_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTRhMTJmNS1jMTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_tZCln69nxoCf_O6oqSnpk2zd6RzlfgSuOBIR_bmo8=&emci=c14a12f5-c11b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ca4a12f5-c11b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=33917617)

— Team Schiff
* * *
Derek,
Joe Biden’s victory in the 2020 election saved our democracy — but without strong legislative reforms, that lifeline may only be temporary.
Donald Trump’s time in the White House took a devastating toll on our democracy. On the rule of law. And on the truth. All because of one man, who abused the powers of the presidency and inflicted chaos.
The twice-impeached former president incited a violent insurrection on the U.S. Capitol, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories, and the Big Lie that he won the 2020 election — in a desperate attempt to hold onto power and prevent a peaceful transfer to the winner.
The greatest threat to our democracy does not come from a foreign power, but from within, and we can never allow another person like Trump to wreak havoc on our republic.
**So today, I’m introducing a major reform bill to ensure that no future president can do the kind of damage Trump has done — ever again.**
My legislation — the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ — is an ambitious set of reforms that would enshrine our democratic guardrails into law. No longer a suggestion. But a code.
This bill is designed to restore our system of checks and balances, create greater accountability and transparency, and protect our elections.
**With President Biden in the White House and Democratic majorities in Congress for the first time in a decade, we have a narrow window of opportunity to protect our democracy from presidential abuses of power. We must seize this moment.**
**[Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36239966/307507097/1632148256?contactdata=Tj3rfWHJkTGm19ToRB2AgeqHGKmkpuUY3YPKao57csVldIFlPuduhB%2Bbhg2s3k5IjLnvTaiOlcbu%2B6cAZgIr0S4c5SlKkp3svWaos5imZQ6Uj1eKrzuIqQsqFiryxVQw7ghBghx9UEfAoWmyOwWizLEHGGrr2GxK2cBWalOB6%2Bg%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20210922_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20210922_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTRhMTJmNS1jMTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_tZCln69nxoCf_O6oqSnpk2zd6RzlfgSuOBIR_bmo8=&emci=c14a12f5-c11b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ca4a12f5-c11b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=33917617)**
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36239967/307507098/1632148256?contactdata=Tj3rfWHJkTGm19ToRB2AgeqHGKmkpuUY3YPKao57csVldIFlPuduhB%2Bbhg2s3k5IjLnvTaiOlcbu%2B6cAZgIr0S4c5SlKkp3svWaos5imZQ6Uj1eKrzuIqQsqFiryxVQw7ghBghx9UEfAoWmyOwWizLEHGGrr2GxK2cBWalOB6%2Bg%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20210922_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20210922_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTRhMTJmNS1jMTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_tZCln69nxoCf_O6oqSnpk2zd6RzlfgSuOBIR_bmo8=&emci=c14a12f5-c11b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ca4a12f5-c11b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=33917617)

Trump used his position in the Oval Office to enrich himself and his family, protect himself and his enablers from prosecution, attack the free press and his political opponents, encourage foreign interference in our elections, and end all accountability as we know it.
After the Watergate scandal — another dark time in American history — Congress took action, passing a series of landmark laws and reforms to prevent a future president from abusing their office the way Richard Nixon did. Those changes stood the test of time for half a century, but it is time for Congress to act again, and enact new protections for our democratic institutions.
To ensure another wannabe autocrat like Trump cannot push our democracy to the brink.
**[We desperately need to pass a new set of reforms to stop future presidents from abusing the power of the presidency as we witnessed over the last four years. If you’re with me, add your name to show your support for my _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ ASAP.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36239968/307507099/1632148256?contactdata=Tj3rfWHJkTGm19ToRB2AgeqHGKmkpuUY3YPKao57csVldIFlPuduhB%2Bbhg2s3k5IjLnvTaiOlcbu%2B6cAZgIr0S4c5SlKkp3svWaos5imZQ6Uj1eKrzuIqQsqFiryxVQw7ghBghx9UEfAoWmyOwWizLEHGGrr2GxK2cBWalOB6%2Bg%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20210922_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20210922_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTRhMTJmNS1jMTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_tZCln69nxoCf_O6oqSnpk2zd6RzlfgSuOBIR_bmo8=&emci=c14a12f5-c11b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ca4a12f5-c11b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=33917617)**
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36239969/307507100/1632148256?contactdata=Tj3rfWHJkTGm19ToRB2AgeqHGKmkpuUY3YPKao57csVldIFlPuduhB%2Bbhg2s3k5IjLnvTaiOlcbu%2B6cAZgIr0S4c5SlKkp3svWaos5imZQ6Uj1eKrzuIqQsqFiryxVQw7ghBghx9UEfAoWmyOwWizLEHGGrr2GxK2cBWalOB6%2Bg%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20210922_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_RLT_AC_20210922_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTRhMTJmNS1jMTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_tZCln69nxoCf_O6oqSnpk2zd6RzlfgSuOBIR_bmo8=&emci=c14a12f5-c11b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ca4a12f5-c11b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=33917617)

— Adam

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: the power of bringing folks together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I wanted to try something different today
#

Hey folks —
I know these emails pile up, so I wanted to try something different today and get right to the point. Thank you in advance for hearing me out.
[Could you please chip in $3 to help our campaign reach 15,000 grassroots donations by our FEC deadline next week? I need your support to show the world that we're going to flip the Keystone State blue next year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36240374/307507605/-353695395?refcode2=09df5713-c31b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210922-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRmNTcxMy1jMzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GwUuQGt1VXC_FMI1EcpXg0uGZakNua_DRTlc18Hns78=)
I'm about to be 100% real with you. When I grew up, I didn't see myself in politics.
There were no young, gay black elected officials I could look up to.
Hell, when I ran for State Representative in 2018, an opponent even told folks not to vote for me because I'm gay.
But I had an incredible team of working people on my side — friends and neighbors who believed in me and the movement we built together.
And here's the thing: _We won._
That's the power of bringing our communities together, and I know that if we build an even bigger grassroots coalition this time, we will win.
As I always say, bravery is a renewable resource.
**And that's where you come in: I need your support to go the distance in this race and pull off a huge victory for the working people of Pennsylvania. So what do you say?**
[If you're in a place to do so, could you please chip in $3 or whatever you can ahead of our FEC deadline? Your donation will ensure we show undeniable momentum on our public fundraising report.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36240375/307507606/-353695395?refcode2=09df5713-c31b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210922-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRmNTcxMy1jMzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GwUuQGt1VXC_FMI1EcpXg0uGZakNua_DRTlc18Hns78=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36240376/307507607/-353695395?refcode2=09df5713-c31b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210922-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRmNTcxMy1jMzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GwUuQGt1VXC_FMI1EcpXg0uGZakNua_DRTlc18Hns78=)**
I'm so grateful for your support.
If we keep working hard together, I know we have what it takes to bring a new day to working folks across Pennsylvania and the country.
Thanks,
Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC

clean_body: I wanted to try something different today Hey folks — I know these emails pile up, so I wanted to try something different today and get right to the point. Thank you in advance for hearing me out. = I'm about to be 100% real with you. When I grew up, I didn't see myself in politics. There were no young, gay black elected officials I could look up to. Hell, when I ran for State Representative in 2018, an opponent even told folks not to vote for me because I'm gay. But I had an incredible team of working people on my side — friends and neighbors who believed in me and the movement we built together. And here's the thing: We won. That's the power of bringing our communities together, and I know that if we build an even bigger grassroots coalition this time, we will win. As I always say, bravery is a renewable resource. And that's where you come in: I need your support to go the distance in this race and pull off a huge victory for the working people of Pennsylvania. So what do you say? = = I'm so grateful for your support. If we keep working hard together, I know we have what it takes to bring a new day to working folks across Pennsylvania and the country. Thanks, Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Folks: Since Democrats won control of the Senate, we’ve taken huge steps to speed up vaccinations, get the economy moving, and protect the future of the planet. **But we have a major problem.** With Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority, Republicans only need to flip one seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell. That means our entire agenda depends on not losing a single Democratic seat. That's why I'm writing to you today. **_CNN_ just named my friends Catherine Cortez Masto (NV), Maggie Hassan (NH), Mark Kelly (AZ) and Rev. Raphael Warnock (GA) the most vulnerable Democratic senators up for reelection. clean_body: Folks: Since Democrats won control of the Senate, we’ve taken huge steps to speed up vaccinations, get the economy moving, and protect the future of the planet. But we have a major problem. With Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority, Republicans only need to flip one seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell. That means our entire agenda depends on not losing a single Democratic seat. That's why I'm writing to you today. CNN just named my friends Catherine Cortez Masto (NV), Maggie Hassan (NH), Mark Kelly (AZ) and Rev. Raphael Warnock (GA) the most vulnerable Democratic senators up for reelection. We need to do everything we can to win these races, so I'm personally asking: = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan, Mark Kelly, Raphael Warnock, and Martin Heinrich: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = When we took back the Senate in January, Democrats made a promise to fight for everyday people, and we're delivering on that promise. We're fighting to make historic investments in everything from health care to infrastructure — and Catherine, Maggie, Mark and Raphael have been leading the charge in the Senate. I know they're the strong leaders we need to rebuild in the wake of this pandemic, but they need our help. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reported that Republicans started out favored to retake the Senate for Mitch McConnell — and with the GOP already spending MILLIONS in these battleground states, we don't have a minute to waste. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan, Mark Kelly, Raphael Warnock, and Martin Heinrich: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We can’t win without your support. clean_body: Where are you, Peter? | Congratulations, Peter! You’ve probably heard that President Trump is hosting a HUGE Save America Rally on Saturday in the Battleground State of Georgia. What you probably didn’t know (until now) is that you’ve been selected to be one of only 5 Grassroots Republicans from Florida to have the exclusive opportunity to join the Official Elect Republicans Trump Rally Fund! Note: All donations made to the Rally Fund will have a 200%-IMPACT. | Official Elect Republicans Trump Rally Fund EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #040945 200% TOTAL IMPACT: ACTIVE DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $5 or more | | | | | | | We’ll be sending President Trump a list of every Republican Patriot who contributes to the Rally Fund before he takes the stage on Saturday. We need your name to be on it (right at the top). Without your support, President Trump may not be able to keep his rallies going. Don’t delete this email, Peter. Please! Thank you. Adam Schiff here — coming to you with an important message about Virginia’s elections less than 6 weeks away.

Republicans across the country are waging an all-out assault on our democracy. Texas, Florida, Georgia, and many other states have passed voter suppression laws in just the past few months, and hundreds of bills have been introduced in 49 state legislatures — including Virginia.

Not to mention, Trump Republicans in Virginia are sparing no expense to flip the governor’s seat and the state legislature in a few weeks. This could pave the way to secure wins in the 2022 Congressional midterm elections.

**This is a critical moment to fight back. And it all starts in Virginia in 2021.**

That’s why it’s so important that we support Terry McAuliffe and all Virginia Democrats running to keep our Blue majorities in their state House. Terry and the strong leaders in Virginia’s Democratic majority understand the stakes, and what we need to do now — **fight for justice, work towards creating a more perfect union, and ensure every voice is heard in our Democracy.**

We understand that in order to propel our country forward, we need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. From school boards to governor's offices to the Oval Office. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today:

**[Can you split a donation between Terry McAuliffe’s Common Good PAC and our grassroots campaign?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi12KDPQVA2R5xhKVNpMMd2kME-HHuKJMFDbux_WDBTnj8D-sRpRgY3KshHl2eAfJO3nsZf6sRSEBthZccgfkq7uINVyQ8n_77VgVzpnxGXdz3v-rTMDuljg74xuH6uIamvP-p5KXGWhbVhhPPX2budvFWl0JqCbQ3qqGwT1yTwnk6ssYHI8zUIBVRwLfq9KZNY-K7JxErK7gr819nhJANvntXoLkYYd2Uia7wvAT9C5FEN3te8T7Zy-vwnKcgB0IUlsbdyT9XN84wL6LiJMS_VZU-aR1Z5VJbRmxGNLx4EqK06KVnIdSIaWh063RAt1y4mcPE7juD50VPXqPgXrTf_Q/3fj/ZsAKs-RxTBO-g6L5xALwGA/h2/6PuF6ZYA0G-Bt8WMzpfEtByL26DuxaoACVVQeEcSAAU)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi12KDPQVA2R5xhKVNpMMd2sNxunREJ6D-cCBaBlPGQ1LF0qW-ihWh5TJTgioLF2x-zGgvKGCU7jqd3LkB5oYufF6T9pOBIICO761cOEl5YTe6HHiqj_6xxojMdHvjp4eyURWoyXaDqL_6Ck-9LXsnhS1Be6DAo2087f8gWLtcihZmGXAw1Y-ctzZ28iPLlj9ICHoqUa-CLn9tZy4bw9iaHbwaOp59PbRyqvYz3LFsfEaZczd_O1aaRKImRdncheiRH0ziEXg4V35f2_23f0CMLPPmynjhfbLX4oPT8fvz7dq-Ufp6Cr_9liQYWHrZXmUhw2XmGMvc8YFqvmzGZgJ-HA/3fj/ZsAKs-RxTBO-g6L5xALwGA/h3/UDxmWonEJJIZdv3QqxGwi4ZoY4f0Azr0HUv9qf1YG_E)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Democrats Hate American Freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
When I ran for office, I thought I knew how bad things were in Washington.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/UWi5ZVbfnpEkqnVR763CLFsg/JpNRIsl892lE4zArmN7ZSOQw) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Greene for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/UWi5ZVbfnpEkqnVR763CLFsg/JpNRIsl892lE4zArmN7ZSOQw)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/UWi5ZVbfnpEkqnVR763CLFsg/JpNRIsl892lE4zArmN7ZSOQw "Endorsement") Fellow Patriot When I ran for office, I thought I knew how bad things were in Washington. I could see that our elected "leaders" were working only for themselves. I also knew that I would not be popular in the DC cocktail scene. **_I was not disappointed._** In less than a year, Congress took a vote to revoke my committee assignments as a partisan ploy instead of serving the American people who elected them. I had one liberal who was so triggered by my presence that she moved her office farther away from me. **The Democrats have also tried multiple times to remove me from office.** Now, we can see why they tried so hard. Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi are planning a Communist takeover of the United States of America - **_and they cannot afford to have someone like me standing in their way._** **[If you can also see the threats to our nation and want to help me fight back, please donate $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/uxi6AooR643nauoFIazeJA/JpNRIsl892lE4zArmN7ZSOQw "If you can also see the threats to our nation and want to help me fight back, please donate $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY!")** First, Joe Biden decides that HE will now be making the medical decisions for you and your family (I am sure he knows best, sigh). _Now_ , Joe Biden has announced his $3.5 trillion plan to expand the government's role in our lives radically - they call it the "social safety net." **This is ON TOP of the $3.5 Trillion Infrastructure Bill that Nancy Pelosi has already forced through the House.** [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/UWi5ZVbfnpEkqnVR763CLFsg/JpNRIsl892lE4zArmN7ZSOQw "Taxes")But don't worry, they have a plan to pay for all this. **They will impose tax rates higher than Communist China and turn the Democrat Party into the Communist Party of America.** **Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi will give Communist China tips on how to tax and control their people.** If you are OK with this, you can stop reading - _this message isn 't for you._ **[But if you're ready to fight for the future of our nation, then I need you by my side - I need you to put some skin in the game and join the fight with the most generous donation of $50 or more TODAY! Any amount you can afford is greatly appreciated.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/DNuuMB3wvxF892PyhAD3qmLQ/JpNRIsl892lE4zArmN7ZSOQw "But if you’re ready to fight for the future of our nation, then I need you by my side – I need you to put some skin in the game and join the fight with the most generous donation of $50 or more TODAY! Any amount you can afford is greatly appreciated.")** The left knows I can see through their lies and that I will expose them--just like President Trump did, and you saw how they tried to destroy him--they can't help themselves while Joe Biden and his team keep blaming President Trump for THEIR actions. **And their friends in the Fake News hate me more than they hate the Taliban.** I've proven all year that I am not afraid, and I will not bend - this makes me a target - their whole con relies on Congress doing nothing but putting you and me in their control--under the thumb of people like AOC and Nancy Pelosi. They are going to throw everything they can at me. That wants all of us distracted with mandates and chaos in Afghanistan so they can get away with their attempts to defraud the American people. **I was elected to end the radical left 's scheme so that I can endure their attacks, but only if I know that Conservatives across the nation are standing with me.** **[If you believe that freedom and American Greatness are worth fighting for, then you need to donate $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or whatever you can afford to help me before it is too late.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/uxi6AooR643nauoFIazeJA/JpNRIsl892lE4zArmN7ZSOQw "If you believe that freedom and American Greatness are worth fighting for, then you need to donate $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or whatever you can afford to help me before it is too late.")** The American people are free, and the Democrats cannot stand to see that. I will fight to my dying breath to defend our nation. **[Will you join me?](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/UWi5ZVbfnpEkqnVR763CLFsg/JpNRIsl892lE4zArmN7ZSOQw "Will you join me?")** God Bless America, [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/UWi5ZVbfnpEkqnVR763CLFsg/JpNRIsl892lE4zArmN7ZSOQw "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)
---
| **PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC.**
---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

[View Web Version](https://libersend.loomered.com/w/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/JpNRIsl892lE4zArmN7ZSOQw)

body:
In a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign for Senate in North Carolina.
#

Friends -
In a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign for Senate in North Carolina. But first, will you give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important?
After we close the books on our FEC deadline next week, we’re going to start getting questions from folks. They’ll want to know all about our fundraising numbers, as a way to size up our campaign.
They’ll be looking for not just how much we raise but whether or not we’ve got the grassroots strength to defeat the extreme Republicans in this race.
You see, they know that our opponents will spend and say anything to try to win. Some pundits even question whether Democrats have any chance of holding the Senate majority at all, so it is our job to work together to prove them wrong.
That’s why we are aiming to receive as many individual donations as we can get before this FEC deadline comes to an end. Each one helps us demonstrate that our campaign has the momentum and people power necessary to flip this seat.
[**Will you make a contribution of any amount to our campaign before our biggest FEC deadline yet? I would not ask if these contributions were not so important, but time is quickly running out before the deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36244043/307518272/1741212721?refcode2=d5f48c8c-c91b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210922-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWY0OGM4Yy1jOTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6NFcLrEPzGrKLL_8x9MqfnYErxbXKnpjykbPrzqVPLs=)

Friends - In a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign for Senate in North Carolina. But first, will you give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important? After we close the books on our FEC deadline next week, we’re going to start getting questions from folks. They’ll want to know all about our fundraising numbers, as a way to size up our campaign. They’ll be looking for not just how much we raise but whether or not we’ve got the grassroots strength to defeat the extreme Republicans in this race. You see, they know that our opponents will spend and say anything to try to win. Some pundits even question whether Democrats have any chance of holding the Senate majority at all, so it is our job to work together to prove them wrong. That’s why we are aiming to receive as many individual donations as we can get before this FEC deadline comes to an end. Each one helps us demonstrate that our campaign has the momentum and people power necessary to flip this seat. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = This deadline is a big test, but it’s our chance to show the strength of our campaign and the depth of support we’re receiving from people just like you.
