name: =?utf-8?Q?Justice=20Democrats?=
subject: Stop Senator Sinema’s obstruction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
#
Peter,
In 2018, Senator Kyrsten Sinema ran an extremely competitive campaign on the promise of fixing the system to ensure Arizonans receive "quality and affordable health care."
[](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=564fca1ee5&e=5a4b10d0ec)
But now, she's standing in the way and blocking a plan that would allow Medicare -- not insurance or pharmaceutical companies -- to negotiate lower prescription drug prices.
[](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=db6a2a71b6&e=5a4b10d0ec)
Corporate Democrat Kyrsten Sinema received $519,238 in political donations from the pharmaceutical industry, and now is the latest corporate Democrat standing in the way of drug pricing reform. She even said she doesn't support an alternative being pitched by **centrists** that would limit the drugs subject to Medicare negotiation.
**Big Pharma 's campaign contributions are about to ruin our best shot to protect patients, rein in corporate profits, and ensure all people have access to their prescriptions. [Chip in to fight Big Pharma and the corporate Democrats like Kyrsten Sinema fighting drug pricing reform »](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=a112c2872f&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
**[Fight Big Pharma](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=2396271144&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
Sinema's staff won't even go on the record to talk about her position on the prescription drug measure. That's because they know that she's flip-flopped on this issue and is serving the interests of Big Pharma execs, not her constituents.
Millions of Americans who can't afford their prescriptions are really counting on us to win drug pricing reform, and if Senator Sinema is going to stand in the way, we're going to need to fight back.
[We know that Big Pharma, and the corporate Democrats they fund, will do whatever it takes to stop drug pricing reform. But we can’t let them win. Chip in $10, $27 or anything at all to fuel the fight against Corporate Democrats and the industry interests they represent.](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=40bb536e67&e=5a4b10d0ec)
**[Contribute](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=3b564e3940&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats
[Donate »](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=388fa466d7&e=5a4b10d0ec)
---
Paid for by Justice Democrats
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=23f6e0d673&e=5a4b10d0ec&c=643ca406a1). Mail us: 10629 Hardin Valley Rd #226, Knoxville, TN 37932.
clean_body: Peter, In 2018, Senator Kyrsten Sinema ran an extremely competitive campaign on the promise of fixing the system to ensure Arizonans receive "quality and affordable health care." But now, she's standing in the way and blocking a plan that would allow Medicare -- not insurance or pharmaceutical companies -- to negotiate lower prescription drug prices. Corporate Democrat Kyrsten Sinema received $519,238 in political donations from the pharmaceutical industry, and now is the latest corporate Democrat standing in the way of drug pricing reform. She even said she doesn't support an alternative being pitched by centrists that would limit the drugs subject to Medicare negotiation. Big Pharma 's campaign contributions are about to ruin our best shot to protect patients, rein in corporate profits, and ensure all people have access to their prescriptions. Sinema's staff won't even go on the record to talk about her position on the prescription drug measure. That's because they know that she's flip-flopped on this issue and is serving the interests of Big Pharma execs, not her constituents. Millions of Americans who can't afford their prescriptions are really counting on us to win drug pricing reform, and if Senator Sinema is going to stand in the way, we're going to need to fight back. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Paid for by Justice Democrats

When I’m not fending off the radical Democrats, I spend my time working, earning a living as a waitress. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fe97bcade8b54d77803fdba03fbc0b7e&_e=uVl6Zjkv1-F-F4lMe37tCXvTWhh3hmx_pgcQmXLYkfiFX9DbL69YAHkh5AiUXAdz9ZMUFNL_DkFuYkFqo1JIoOOHHxYCIhbWFPVa6awdYp1mnK0k-FmlfNGCJf6BanzpQX_HMMBbWfJ16nKBQx0uhZIlUFtpptFxNEEGs-sXrjqGPp1IzEe-LmjHjVwUUGnIaclu_TwcAJLdTRTnG6b85DZLDhDugNpW722kgXKYr-v5GXBSv1zlDlBhE2pDnVty759ywzxBrfT3jF8a7o8lgQGzLnEgSVNOEp-k9msGL9aXFvAEofGLVbsvkytliiNVlTZI8_R3ItWy_v_OtPC7wr4j2FVn6DhhytgQV4x5WHzUTGccAmCcBkHy6HzR22_0P2QBhJEtAJJZVhVjPsO62w%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative - in 2016, no one in Washington had uttered the name AOC ever before.

In 2016, AOC was bartending and waitressing to put food on the table. To pay rent. Same as me.

_**But here’s the major difference:**_ I know what it’s like to make ends meet - to not know if your paycheck will be enough to ensure you eat after paying bills, to scrounge and fight hard to give yourself a better life. But I get by without the socialist policies. Without relying on the government handouts and expecting them to foot the bill of me.

I’m accountable for myself and you’ll never hear me whine about pushing up my sleeves and getting the job done.

**My name is Carolina Serrano, I’m a Colombian-American woman and Republican candidate for Congress.** When I’m not fending off the radical Democrats, I spend my time working, earning a living as a waitress.

[**I’m running for Congress**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fe97bcade8b54d77803fdba03fbc0b7e&_e=uVl6Zjkv1-F-F4lMe37tCXvTWhh3hmx_pgcQmXLYkfiFX9DbL69YAHkh5AiUXAdz9ZMUFNL_DkFuYkFqo1JIoOOHHxYCIhbWFPVa6awdYp1mnK0k-FmlfNGCJf6BanzpQX_HMMBbWfJ16nKBQx0uhZIlUFtpptFxNEEGs-sXrjqGPp1IzEe-LmjHjVwUUGnI25ZWXDoLiQ9zP92RFe_erfC-NcDqLj8X3uQG1zmxtl5uIgnNwDu9c5dlH3E9sm5dZhXKcSjzl4dwKgrQO69RGHhKV3v2E20jg27WZPM9orBE7HSEQxWcczlKlfiT0goS7zZ-XUQqKMSjqjL1TW0FVlggdL0y6-kHQ7HEGUDvtn_n8o4akPYJ-TKTZDAKpRFuSP77jMkbY31Dz3M_wAgAGA%3D%3D) because we are suffering at the hands of the do-nothing Democrats.

Hardworking Americans are struggling with soaring inflation and out-of-control government spending. I’m not your typical politician, I just love America and what to ensure we are getting the best this country has to offer.

[**Will you make a donation to my campaign today to help elect a hard-working, every-day Conservative to Congress?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fe97bcade8b54d77803fdba03fbc0b7e&_e=uVl6Zjkv1-F-F4lMe37tCXvTWhh3hmx_pgcQmXLYkfiFX9DbL69YAHkh5AiUXAdz9ZMUFNL_DkFuYkFqo1JIoOOHHxYCIhbWFPVa6awdYp1mnK0k-FmlfNGCJf6BanzpQX_HMMBbWfJ16nKBQx0uhZIlUFtpptFxNEEGs-sXrjqGPp1IzEe-LmjHjVwUUGnIINc0lYuejwxPpEPpf8spTjQz8lVXnIzMy4t283Dr4c98I-8fTtol-eu8dw4cMsixfbHeu72ffunR1ZtKwCxSzCTl4r7G4PSYN3bmD9W2ZcF8Z18ioz-vX9iZwGyOkrn2r4CGIdDKkduND5sADKpZ2KhvTosrPEyOqlkSvndYm6xgHo6LNPJ__2agFQaFVY2wx8x4nco5gVCoFRuCnJTLAw%3D%3D)

Here’s the thing, Fellow Conservative . I think that Congress is overrun by career politicians and people with the wrong motives. We need regular people in Congress - that know what it’s like to earn a living and make sacrifices. People like me and you.

I want to build the wall, protect our freedom, and put an end to the wasteful spending that’s robbing hard-working Americans. [**But I can’t do it without your help.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fe97bcade8b54d77803fdba03fbc0b7e&_e=uVl6Zjkv1-F-F4lMe37tCXvTWhh3hmx_pgcQmXLYkfiFX9DbL69YAHkh5AiUXAdz9ZMUFNL_DkFuYkFqo1JIoOOHHxYCIhbWFPVa6awdYp1mnK0k-FmlfNGCJf6BanzpQX_HMMBbWfJ16nKBQx0uhZIlUFtpptFxNEEGs-sXrjqGPp1IzEe-LmjHjVwUUGnIZGpjCNRY-S81g5cD7a4WSpzc8ZodcQ8146CTLcn7DlX-7qA6m9bN0QokSH18PYU5n3Cu00hDlcklN3k4ETmPW-KKhe_yhEN_ipDvA6SDWuqoNxEAwZJfeUo0qr8GMWjZ2vygCj4_-o4St9sPswmkjLGL4dOOYjHcxQqAz0k7pqf00MnWGEoPNt3zyxrRGhGm2Bsy_PT9C-di-wZC8Ij75A%3D%3D)

_Democrats don’t know my name today._ But I’m their next biggest nightmare - that will deliver real change to this country and protect the interest of hard-working Americans.

[**Can I count on you to help me make it happen today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fe97bcade8b54d77803fdba03fbc0b7e&_e=uVl6Zjkv1-F-F4lMe37tCXvTWhh3hmx_pgcQmXLYkfiFX9DbL69YAHkh5AiUXAdz9ZMUFNL_DkFuYkFqo1JIoOOHHxYCIhbWFPVa6awdYp1mnK0k-FmlfNGCJf6BanzpQX_HMMBbWfJ16nKBQx0uhZIlUFtpptFxNEEGs-sXrjqGPp1IzEe-LmjHjVwUUGnIoqjv6hsc9yR4HiajwS6fnBoQhqKBgQP4tzHG6E3TgUPUghfPxuGQ1HtdCtcQqVbVOGVjUDEsD6eXw5LlT_O_Y71Qi_e3N8RMmBK_bqLzncuZd0jCwpegow27eXgw1IpwGZ1eLSlv9aXN1VcGPNasBRK-NqNxkNNYAWhzLFk_zy055L_6XUyS2ExMVyWZEFzCp-4OeW7PlI958YERdW8WjQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: When I’m not fending off the radical Democrats, I spend my time working, earning a living as a waitress. | Fellow Conservative - in 2016, no one in Washington had uttered the name AOC ever before. In 2016, AOC was bartending and waitressing to put food on the table. To pay rent. Same as me. But here’s the major difference: I know what it’s like to make ends meet - to not know if your paycheck will be enough to ensure you eat after paying bills, to scrounge and fight hard to give yourself a better life. But I get by without the socialist policies. Without relying on the government handouts and expecting them to foot the bill of me. I’m accountable for myself and you’ll never hear me whine about pushing up my sleeves and getting the job done. My name is Carolina Serrano, I’m a Colombian-American woman and Republican candidate for Congress. When I’m not fending off the radical Democrats, I spend my time working, earning a living as a waitress. because we are suffering at the hands of the do-nothing Democrats. Hardworking Americans are struggling with soaring inflation and out-of-control government spending. I’m not your typical politician, I just love America and what to ensure we are getting the best this country has to offer. | | | ---|---|--- | | Here’s the thing, Fellow Conservative . I think that Congress is overrun by career politicians and people with the wrong motives. We need regular people in Congress - that know what it’s like to earn a living and make sacrifices. People like me and you. I want to build the wall, protect our freedom, and put an end to the wasteful spending that’s robbing hard-working Americans. Democrats don’t know my name today. But I’m their next biggest nightmare - that will deliver real change to this country and protect the interest of hard-working Americans. Por la Libertad, Carolina Serrano Republican Candidate for Congress Follow Carolina On Social Media | | | ---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY CAROLINA FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but._

name: Team Hayes
subject: Hi there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
As fall approaches, we hope you are settling back into your routine. The end of summer was heavy – COVID spikes, anxiety about back-to-school and work, ending the war in Afghanistan, Texas outlawing a woman’s autonomy, and the list goes on and on. It is easy to be overwhelmed by it all. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36245014/307521417/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2U3NGJkMC1jYzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n_UNVfgV07N66Fzf4r6JJLeXd3Gjy_nCvOz5HaQYg6A=&emci=b703647a-b21b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=8ce74bd0-cc1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15529135) | As fall approaches, we hope you are settling back into your routine. The end of summer was heavy – COVID spikes, anxiety about back-to-school and work, ending the war in Afghanistan, Texas outlawing a woman’s autonomy, and the list goes on and on. It is easy to be overwhelmed by it all. Here at Team Hayes, we are focusing on what we can control. We are laser-focused on keeping Jahana in Washington. If we can keep her there, we will have done our part to help our communities, to help our country and to help our world. **Because to get us out of all this, we need smart leaders. Strong leaders. Responsible leaders. Leaders who lead with their heads and their hearts. People who care._People like Jahana._** [**So, it is critically important that we keep her fighting for our issues in Washington. name: Marisa Wood
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Support women's reproductive rights
body:
As a mother of a daughter, and a teacher of many young women, I'll state unequivocally: I support efforts to expand, not restrict, women's health care and reproductive rights. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36245087/307521512/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTVkYWRkZS1jYzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z2lJy9phQlCgUzhOWeK68X3k9YuUSicwYFmxRJpX8vk=)
Friend,

A few months ago, my opponent Kevin McCarthy joined with over 200 other Republican members of Congress to urge the Supreme Court to overturn _Roe v. Wade._ Unfortunately, their wish may soon come true.

The Supreme Court just announced they would hear a case challenging a Mississippi state law that bans abortions after 15 weeks.

As a mother of a daughter, and a teacher of many young women, I'll make this as clear as possible: I support efforts _to expand,_ not restrict, women's health care and reproductive rights.

Texas and Mississippi both passed laws that severely restrict these freedoms and rights. The Texas law is particularly shocking -- it deputizes private citizens to turn in neighbors who violate the law for a $10,000 bounty.

The House is about to vote on a critical piece of legislation that would make protections under _Roe v. Wade_ the law of the land, no matter what the Supreme Court decides. They need to hear from us.

**[Will you add your name next to mine to tell Congress that it's high time to pass the Women's Health Protection Act? Our voices are stronger together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36245088/307521513/1254088988?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTVkYWRkZS1jYzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z2lJy9phQlCgUzhOWeK68X3k9YuUSicwYFmxRJpX8vk=&emci=665dadde-cc1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=695dadde-cc1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=21170704)**
| ****[Add your name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36245092/307521514/1254088988?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTVkYWRkZS1jYzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z2lJy9phQlCgUzhOWeK68X3k9YuUSicwYFmxRJpX8vk=&emci=665dadde-cc1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=695dadde-cc1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=21170704)****

A country that doesn't prioritize the health and safety of its women and children absolutely has its priorities backwards. This needs to change, now.

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Border Outrage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Joe Biden’s betrayal on the border is out of control.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ze8uumtb6ij4uhod9qnuh55vpkgcier7fikub8s0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cpj64pr4chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onimeqradpgcur70t9leloj6othehi6aptl6hjr5cr4ckr60o7261j79c9meuq30puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75cj661pb6ob0e9omcc5gm9h3csh5u)
| |
---
Fellow Patriot:

Joe Biden's betrayal on the border is out of control.

Thousands of illegal immigrants are arriving every day. Not because of oppression or Covid or any other excuse. They're coming for one reason: JOE BIDEN AND THE DEMOCRATS WILL LET THEM IN!

**[That 's why the House Freedom Caucus is sounding the alarm and fighting to seal our border.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdl3ali9sqbtqc2ehjana5i2hugealv11mov2b7g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cpj64pr4chh2bs)**

You probably saw Fox News's camera drone flying over the border, showing how many illegals pass into our country over Joe Biden's welcome mat every day. The crowds under the bridge got so big the Biden Administration couldn't ignore it.

_So what did they do?_
_Did they close the border?_
_Did they send any migrants home?_

Of course not. **THEY BANNED THE CAMERA DRONES!** They told reporters to shut off their cameras and clear the airspace.

**[Please don 't let Biden hide the truth on the border: Support the House Freedom Caucus today!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfgkp5446vcvgfr5mjv4g3b3so5sdfdsled3fduo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cpj64pr4chh2bs)**

For Joe Biden, this is more than ignorance. It's an outrage. It's a betrayal of his oath of office and an indictment of his entire corrupt party. The Democrats look at the violence, the disease, and the lawlessness on the border and think, _" Keep up the great work, guys."_

It's not that they hate America. They just hate you. They hate that your vote cancels out theirs. That in our country, you have as much say as all the woke reporters and Tech billionaires and socialist celebrities. They know a majority of Americans oppose their agenda - so rather than changing their agenda, they are changing the country.

name: Team Never Again
subject: What is Stephen Miller hiding?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Miller was Trump's senior policy advisor and architect of many of Trump's xenophobic immigration policies throughout his term as president -- including the border wall and family separation policy. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36245927/307524348/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzMmFmNmU5LWNlMWItZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=coK3_wbAEugbV9zG8R41zfIvGmd1ycruFnxjuqUEASg=&emci=8066e4c2-c31b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=532af6e9-ce1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16335001) Remember Stephen Miller, team?

Miller was Trump's senior policy advisor and architect of many of Trump's xenophobic immigration policies throughout his term as president -- including the border wall and family separation policy.

As it became clear that Trump had lost the 2020 election to Joe Biden, Miller quickly got to work trying to attack our democracy and undermine the results of a free and fair election. He promoted Trump's Big Lie and even proposed a plan that would overturn the election results -- helping to result in the January 6 Capitol insurrection.

Now, the select committee investigating the January 6 attack on our Capitol is demanding information on a list of Trump's aides -- including Stephen Miller. Trump has made it clear he'll do everything in his power to stop the committee from receiving this information, going so far as to threaten to invoke executive privilege.

Trump's refusal to cooperate begs the question -- what are he and Stephen Miller hiding?

We need to hear from Stephen Miller and learn what he knows about the events of January 6 in order to uncover the truth. If Miller won't testify willingly, the committee must subpoena him. Do you agree? | **[Should the select committee subpoena Stephen Miller?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36245928/307524349/-1970880586?ms=em21_210922_miller_e1srv_gq_act___nap_ettx&source=em21_210922_miller_e1srv_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210922_miller_e1srv_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=u3xL85lhM%2FwpNO4%2Bw%2FUSV0XJAkzNpU8%2FHs5dpcJL07fj73ujpsVWEdbWC4DSCit8RnLK9wUH0S3oyMhwkfEOb3BQ3Xbq11VhljTumbrbINvHF08gt9kgJTdfNlz%2FzhpxYQU6%2Ft1h9%2BgZcaq4l%2FfpUQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzMmFmNmU5LWNlMWItZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=coK3_wbAEugbV9zG8R41zfIvGmd1ycruFnxjuqUEASg=&emci=8066e4c2-c31b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=532af6e9-ce1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16335001)** | [YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36245929/307524351/-1970880586?ms=em21_210922_miller_e1srv_gq_act___nap_ettx&source=em21_210922_miller_e1srv_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210922_miller_e1srv_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=u3xL85lhM%2FwpNO4%2Bw%2FUSV0XJAkzNpU8%2FHs5dpcJL07fj73ujpsVWEdbWC4DSCit8RnLK9wUH0S3oyMhwkfEOb3BQ3Xbq11VhljTumbrbINvHF08gt9kgJTdfNlz%2FzhpxYQU6%2Ft1h9%2BgZcaq4l%2FfpUQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzMmFmNmU5LWNlMWItZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=coK3_wbAEugbV9zG8R41zfIvGmd1ycruFnxjuqUEASg=&emci=8066e4c2-c31b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=532af6e9-ce1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16335001)

| | Friend, Fall is officially here, which means we are just a little more than a year out from Election Day 2022. I wanted to reach out and ask if you would consider helping us prepare. Last year, we broke internal fundraising records as we put together a statewide campaign to make Minnesota work better for everyone. **This year, we 're going to break even more records.** **I raised our team 's individual fundraising goal by 50% and we need your help to achieve it.** Will you make a refundable donation of $50 (or $100 per couple) or if you've already claimed your 2021 refund, consider making another contribution today? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ _ _ [**Refundable $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ll5Cj6Ta_DEqzEqpsW8NF2ze048H6HLkZPcxX9smJwY=/sDO5pYQb1I_-vrAS_WU931fUdS4T6Ae-7nPjXLqfOnQ=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=092221) [**Refundable $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ll5Cj6Ta_DEqzEqpsW8NF2ze048H6HLkZPcxX9smJwY=/sDO5pYQb1I_-vrAS_WU931fUdS4T6Ae-7nPjXLqfOnQ=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=092221) [**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ll5Cj6Ta_DEqzEqpsW8NF2ze048H6HLkZPcxX9smJwY=/sDO5pYQb1I_-vrAS_WU931fUdS4T6Ae-7nPjXLqfOnQ=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=092221) The most important part of our campaign is individual donors like you, friend. name: Gwen Moore
subject: 158 years later… We will never be silenced!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Today in 1862 President Lincoln issued a preliminary Emancipation Proclamation that freed all slaves in rebel states on January 1, 1813.
But 158 years later, twice-impeached Donald J. Trump and his cronies hung targets on the backs of black and minority voters and pulled out every trick in their white supremacist bag to suppress our voices and our votes.
**They failed.** Black women and minority voters showed up, turned out, and delivered a historic victory for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris (America's first woman of color Vice President)!
We must never allow the fascist, bigoted, racist, Trump-loving Republican vocal minority to turn back the pages of progress. We will never allow our voices to be silenced or fall for their unethical intimidation tactics. [_**As always, we will stand strong and make our voices heard again in 2022 and beyond.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/MGakbqzjsT_gPUTbPBiYmY0iD56vk6T5AimWqSAeCF0=/UYM-UfMQSm_n_NvCQJQWeCnqhwKq-EQ0f63iDofFatg=?refcode=092221)

clean_body: Today in 1862 President Lincoln issued a preliminary Emancipation Proclamation that freed all slaves in rebel states on January 1, 1813. But 158 years later, twice-impeached Donald J. Trump and his cronies hung targets on the backs of black and minority voters and pulled out every trick in their white supremacist bag to suppress our voices and our votes. They failed. Black women and minority voters showed up, turned out, and delivered a historic victory for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris (America's first woman of color Vice President)! We must never allow the fascist, bigoted, racist, Trump-loving Republican vocal minority to turn back the pages of progress. We will never allow our voices to be silenced or fall for their unethical intimidation tactics. Together, #WeRepresent Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice Stay Connected! name: Jimmy Fremgen
subject: It's official: I'm running for Congress!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_fremgen_q3_2021?refcode=09222021 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_fremgen_q3_2021?refcode=09222021]
Hi Friend,
My name is Jimmy Fremgen and I’m a proud, progressive Democrat running to represent the people of Sacramento in Congress.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_fremgen_q3_2021?refcode=09222021 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_fremgen_q3_2021?refcode=09222021]I want to explain how your support will be crucial as we kick off this campaign. But first, I want to tell you three quick facts that will help you get to know me and why I’m running:
1. I was born and raised in California, where I learned the value of hard work and community as a bartender, a history teacher, and a small business owner.
2. I worked closely with the late Rep. Elijah Cummings as a congressional investigator and helped protect veterans and low-income families from predatory for-profit colleges.
3. I’ve seen firsthand how some politicians choose to serve big donors and corporate special interests rather than regular people like you and me. My campaign is focused on lifting up my neighbors in Sacramento and creating a system that is truly by and for the people.
Rather than catering to the rich and powerful, this campaign is going to be people-powered—I won’t accept a dime from corporate PACs. We’re relying on the help of grassroots supporters like you who believe in our mission.
We're just days away from our first big FEC fundraising deadline. Can you chip in just $5 today to help us show momentum right out of the gate? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_fremgen_q3_2021?refcode=09222021&amount=5]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_fremgen_q3_2021?refcode=09222021&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_fremgen_q3_2021?refcode=09222021&amount=5] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_fremgen_q3_2021?refcode=09222021&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_fremgen_q3_2021?refcode=09222021&amount=20] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_fremgen_q3_2021?refcode=09222021 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_fremgen_q3_2021?refcode=09222021]I'm running for Congress because the 6th district deserves a representative who will fight for us. Someone who is dedicated to ending homelessness, providing healthcare for all, and stopping the climate crisis. I hope I can count on your support as we build a real grassroots movement for change in Sacramento.
In solidarity,
Jimmy Fremgen
Paid and Authorized by Jimmy Fremgen for Congress
1809 S Street, Suite 101-117
Sacramento, CA 95811
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/8d022ae8-d21b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/bc71a76c-d31b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzcxYTc2Yy1kMzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kWZvT7cEdedyjA6JVjVBRrlKnGg-oQhbV729B7Tu6AI=&id=114908028 .
https://www.electjimmy.com/ [https://www.electjimmy.com/] https://www.facebook.com/JimmyFremgenSacramento [https://www.facebook.com/JimmyFremgenSacramento] https://twitter.com/jimmy_fremgen [https://twitter.com/jimmy_fremgen] https://www.instagram.com/jimmy_fremgen/ [https://www.instagram.com/jimmy_fremgen/] https://www.youtube.com/c/JimmyFremgen [https://www.youtube.com/c/JimmyFremgen]

subject: Invitation for : Meet Allison Russo this weekend!
body:
Block parties, breakfasts, and issue forums coming up... | | | |
---
| | |
## Invitation for : Meet Rep. Allison Russo
---
| [RSVP TO JOIN ALLISON THIS WEEKEND](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=bf65e34b08&e=400a181d5a "RSVP TO JOIN ALLISON THIS WEEKEND")
---
| Allison will be traveling across the district this weekend talking with voters about the issues directly impacting local communities, and she would love to see you there, . **Can you bring a friend to meet Allison this week?**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=399a0c9580&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Pickerington Block Party, ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b49cdbf54a&e=400a181d5a)[Saturday at 11:30am](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=27fe764410&e=400a181d5a)
Join Allison Russo and local Pickerington candidates for City Council and School Board at our fall block party! We'll be registering our new neighbors to vote and hanging out with free food, music, and fun for the whole family! RSVP and bring some friends!
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=eed3573726&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [SEO Labor Breakfast with Allison](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=28e2a8daeb&e=400a181d5a)
Calling all union members! The SEO Central Labor Council is hosting a breakfast with Allison this Sunday at 10:30am. Talk with Allison about building an economy that works for all of us over coffee and breakfast!
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=4d1416462b&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Bobcats Meet & Greet on Campus, Sunday at 1pm](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=7f02fee6f4&e=400a181d5a)
Join OU Dems and Allison for lunch and conversation with OU students on campus. There will be pizza on the college green at 1PM!
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=a155a9d8f1&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Veterans Roundtable in Grove City](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=9b383a28f8&e=400a181d5a)[, Monday at 6pm](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=cf46e1b8fa&e=400a181d5a)
Join State Rep. Allison Russo, the ODP Veterans Caucus, and fellow veterans for a conversation on issues impacting veterans and military families in central Ohio. Panel discussion with Q&A to follow.
| [SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f9125917b8&e=400a181d5a "SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS")
---
| |

name: Max Steiner via, MaxSteinerForCongress.com
subject: over 86% of Americans agree.
body:
I'm calling on Congress to allow the government to negotiate drug prices for Medicare. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36248656/307533423/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTQ1M2M0NS1kNjFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b6RXfk00T9_zAq3G7jmL7mF6d7g3b5JpqfNyWXAWf7U=)
Friend,

There's a lot going on in Washington, so I'd like to cut through the noise to talk about an issue that over **86% of Americans agree** on: allowing the government to negotiate drug prices for Medicare.

Right now, many Americans are forced to pay far more for prescription drugs than in other countries, just because some Democrats and most Republicans refuse to hold pharmaceutical companies accountable. Taxpayers subsidize the research and development of these drugs, yet Big Pharma reaps the benefits while normal people who need these drugs end up paying more on the back end. The system needs to change.

I support the efforts to enable the federal government to negotiate drug prices for Medicare. While we’re at it, I believe medical procedures should have a standardized cost. In no other sector do consumers buy a service without knowing how much it costs.

These measures would help a lot of people in this country pay A LOT less for their care. It’s unconscionable that many Americans are forced to make heart-wrenching decisions about whether to spend money on prescription drugs or put food on the table.

**[Will you add your name next to mine calling on Congress to allow Medicare to negotiate prescription drug costs? Americans shouldn't have to pay an arm and a leg for life-saving medication. Together, we can make a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36248658/307533425/1365832118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTQ1M2M0NS1kNjFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b6RXfk00T9_zAq3G7jmL7mF6d7g3b5JpqfNyWXAWf7U=&emci=87453c45-d61b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=89453c45-d61b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=11663292)**
| **[Add your name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36248660/307533427/1365832118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTQ1M2M0NS1kNjFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b6RXfk00T9_zAq3G7jmL7mF6d7g3b5JpqfNyWXAWf7U=&emci=87453c45-d61b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=89453c45-d61b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=11663292)**
---

Opposition to this plan is strong amongst Republicans and it's another example of where they refuse to cross partisan lines -- even when it means doing the right thing for the American people.

I'm hearing an awful lot from voters about the rising costs of healthcare, which is why it’s so disappointing that legislation to lower prescription drug costs is something my opponent Doug LaMalfa has actually voted against.

He, and the rest of Congress, need to hear our collective voice.

clean_body: I'm calling on Congress to allow the government to negotiate drug prices for Medicare. | = Friend, There's a lot going on in Washington, so I'd like to cut through the noise to talk about an issue that over 86% of Americans agree on: allowing the government to negotiate drug prices for Medicare. Right now, many Americans are forced to pay far more for prescription drugs than in other countries, just because some Democrats and most Republicans refuse to hold pharmaceutical companies accountable. Taxpayers subsidize the research and development of these drugs, yet Big Pharma reaps the benefits while normal people who need these drugs end up paying more on the back end. The system needs to change. I support the efforts to enable the federal government to negotiate drug prices for Medicare. While we’re at it, I believe medical procedures should have a standardized cost. In no other sector do consumers buy a service without knowing how much it costs. These measures would help a lot of people in this country pay A LOT less for their care. It’s unconscionable that many Americans are forced to make heart-wrenching decisions about whether to spend money on prescription drugs or put food on the table. | Opposition to this plan is strong amongst Republicans and it's another example of where they refuse to cross partisan lines -- even when it means doing the right thing for the American people. I'm hearing an awful lot from voters about the rising costs of healthcare, which is why it’s so disappointing that legislation to lower prescription drug costs is something my opponent Doug LaMalfa has actually voted against. He, and the rest of Congress, need to hear our collective voice. Thanks in advance, Max Steiner = | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. Consider supporting Max's campaign by = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: Lillie Catlin, NextGen America
subject: Tell Congress: We can’t afford to delay climate action any longer
body:
#CodeRedClimate

| | Friend, **The head of the United Nations referred to the most recent report from the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change as a “code red for the planet.”** From devastating floods to dangerous wildfires, one thing is clear — the climate crisis is already here. Failure to act now jeopardizes the livelihoods of future generations. **That’s why we’ve spent the summer calling on Congress to pass bold climate solutions in the Build Back Better Act. We’re so close to the finish line, but we can’t let up just yet.** [**Tell Congress: Protect our climate and our future. Keep bold climate action in the Build Back Better Act.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36249712/307537453/-1987375003?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzVjYmZmYS1kNzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kSxrnIDSVNdReafTjiBcX9ypFxVwql4g4YRGUnPoPkw=&emci=62344bb7-d61b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d75cbffa-d71b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36249714/307537454/-1987375003?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzVjYmZmYS1kNzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kSxrnIDSVNdReafTjiBcX9ypFxVwql4g4YRGUnPoPkw=&emci=62344bb7-d61b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d75cbffa-d71b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36249715/307537456/-1987375003?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzVjYmZmYS1kNzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kSxrnIDSVNdReafTjiBcX9ypFxVwql4g4YRGUnPoPkw=&emci=62344bb7-d61b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d75cbffa-d71b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172) At this very moment, Congress is finalizing the text of the upcoming budget bill. The fate of everything we’ve advocated for will be decided in the coming days. Today, we’re joining with artists and partner organizations to tell Congress to take action. With a simple majority vote, Democrats can pass a budget that will implement a national clean energy standard, create a new Civilian Climate Corps, and boost tax incentives for clean energy and help us phase out fossil fuels. Wealthy corporations and polluters are desperately trying to scale back the Build Back Better Act and cut these essential climate solutions. Congress can’t afford to miss this once-in-a-generation opportunity to make urgent investments in climate justice and clean energy. [**Send a message to Congress: It’s code red for the planet. Pass the Build Back Better Act with ambitious climate solutions.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36249716/307537457/-1987375003?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzVjYmZmYS1kNzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kSxrnIDSVNdReafTjiBcX9ypFxVwql4g4YRGUnPoPkw=&emci=62344bb7-d61b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d75cbffa-d71b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172) Thank you, Lillie Catlin
Vice President, Program

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Keep Tammy in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We need to reelect every single Democrat -- including Tammy Duckworth right here in Illinois.
#
Peter,
From the moment I met Tammy Duckworth, I knew she would be an incredible leader for Illinois.
Today, it’s my honor to serve alongside her in the U.S. Senate. Together, we’re tackling issues like rebuilding our infrastructure, expanding affordable health care, and taking care of veterans. And with the Democratic majority, we’re in the middle of the crucial fight to protect voting rights and to give workers and families the kind of support they need during this pandemic and beyond.
But Mitch McConnell and the Senate Republicans don’t like the progress we’re making.
**Let me tell you, the GOP are more determined than ever to take back the Senate in 2022.** They want to flip the majority red and turn back the clock to the days of chaos and obstruction.
We need to reelect every single Democrat -- _including Tammy Duckworth right here in Illinois._
**[Peter, we can’t afford to give an inch in this fight. Will you rush in a contribution of $5 or anything you can pitch in today to keep my friend Tammy in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36249789/307537666/2047484863?refcode=dd_em_210922_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWM3Zjc3My1kODFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5bdZAHMcm5bJulM_wt1PH28ah2ET5QvrakWiGi7BFVQ=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

name: Moms for Childcare
subject: Peter— I know a thing or two about not being able to afford childcare
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
Help us elect more moms by fully funding our childcare fund for 2022. We are changing the game of campaigning for women, but we need you to stand with us. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36249875/307537979/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllMjdiMzk2LWQ4MWItZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9xMm06mSdNLpnOkkpjnmTagG_b5j4ZhhJ1ufks7qqqE=&emci=20a5e541-d01b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=9e27b396-d81b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2884131) Hi Peter, Women make up just 26% of Congress and moms with children under 18, only 5%. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

name: Mike Johnson
subject: Sign my letter: Tell Mayorkas to resign!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
More than 1 million encounters at the southern border this year, and the Biden Admin is silent! | [ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee60bd81756d4686a536ad14a8cd9cab&_e=ZU111MWxYQgwUy7XmwUl51lDx9rnOY2WKTiYg0ACl9-Whr-XFtiwW7qcNjKzBGl7by1pg8JlmlBf3MRCtF1u9y-_KRBvK63Hz2gruazrLP-cnH0jwVDBC0TtysYy5fTNyICgpBwi3WCLptKc9t0vJW1YpvtkgXEa4iXX3XlCGEmvpZzU-GeJCEDk4-ZI5iwwRwP-09lztbedf9NTRVZG5eoCguZdwj-4rSHzIiSwS8sOdYxfSs6EKCQe5bFc7ONCcWsvfug_SwtS8SUEStvMFt05nZO617cJ2oplZqNjF89OzhqNT8aHzY0wIFZTHdATTE-PH3IIPuNinWsZfovR_Hz-GKK_r6FPTgjg2KDQ6feRa-35rv6H47Qd67Ts-SszxJ8ShvuXWEMWeaiGFIhAl4fH_IE3F0nz7BWI8Hy4V8VKtmxxe1sI4v2-YgdW11-kczYRl0cooBgLpGK-kvRWk7Z_3CfDDRMFG7EUBYyDnHLylG4jKbnXMykxRPJxYOt4AGdRgx5TMqJVfnpzgPtnUPp0lp_YYvQv2MA6l1pw0VCk0DvIbxDLfAS9XiVV0mgq)

---
Fellow American,

There is a major lack of leadership by the Biden Administration in every area - and the border situation is completely out of hand.

As I’m sure you’ve seen, there are thousands of migrants from all over the world currently camped under a bridge in Del Rio, Texas - all there at the Biden Administration’s invitation. Joe Biden campaigned on open borders, and now his administration refuses to deal with the fallout.

Think about this: In 2021 alone, there have been OVER a million immigrant encounters at our southern border - and we still have three months left in the year!

The man behind the flood of illegal migrants? **DHS Secretary Mayorkas.**

Mayorkas has done NOTHING but make excuses and avoid tough questions. It’s time to end these outrageous policies once and for all!

Since Secretary Mayorkas is clearly unwilling to carry out his agency’s essential mission, [**I’ve called for his immediate RESIGNATION.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee60bd81756d4686a536ad14a8cd9cab&_e=ZU111MWxYQgwUy7XmwUl51lDx9rnOY2WKTiYg0ACl9-Whr-XFtiwW7qcNjKzBGl7by1pg8JlmlBf3MRCtF1u9y-_KRBvK63Hz2gruazrLP-cnH0jwVDBC0TtysYy5fTNyICgpBwi3WCLptKc9t0vJW1YpvtkgXEa4iXX3XlCGEmvpZzU-GeJCEDk4-ZI5iwwRwP-09lztbedf9NTRVZG5eoCguZdwj-4rSHzIiSwS8sOdYxfSs6EKCQe5bFc7ONCcWsvfug_SwtS8SUEStvMFt05nZO617cJ2oplZqNjF89OzhqNT8aHzY0wIFZTHdATTE-PH3IIPuNinWsZfovR_OURY8NPJoOgvH_JHIDTKmMYLkjbaEPgPAYO8R-06VKmi3c5_C0SAXTtl3apocsYnyBeKMqg9PEyYEzTkYUSIlffaazQmRybEVrP3T73anxYnH1ZxNDqhzy6WwagRaxdpaMA54rXPDFoFYzR50_23BuNbKl3anzkHeUZ4AXXtZxMuM_5CTaKLeDESTFuZ11sF964QD9lalAWX4csuz0DDh3cm_QCAgbAbY2iqrWZAoc5)

The Biden Administration has forgotten that they work for the American people.

[**That’s why I want your name to be next to mine on this call. Will you become a citizen co-sponsor, and sign your name to a growing list of patriots who are calling on Sec. Mayorkas to resign?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee60bd81756d4686a536ad14a8cd9cab&_e=ZU111MWxYQgwUy7XmwUl51lDx9rnOY2WKTiYg0ACl9-Whr-XFtiwW7qcNjKzBGl7by1pg8JlmlBf3MRCtF1u9y-_KRBvK63Hz2gruazrLP-cnH0jwVDBC0TtysYy5fTNyICgpBwi3WCLptKc9t0vJW1YpvtkgXEa4iXX3XlCGEmvpZzU-GeJCEDk4-ZI5iwwRwP-09lztbedf9NTRVZG5eoCguZdwj-4rSHzIiSwS8sOdYxfSs6EKCQe5bFc7ONCcWsvfug_SwtS8SUEStvMFt05nZO617cJ2oplZqNjF89OzhqNT8aHzY0wIFZTHdATTE-PH3IIPuNinWsZfovR_PhlDPVT_Q0j-PRhHfTfBKjG5d87A520WOcq0AOZEsu3qjkooXBB41egO0x-t85MVl6x1F-TaYoh5MBRHnSWZ1w3hC0ipo3RfxHy156OAgkNtcdbrK_63F5FmrXmj35_WeYObz5jRX9Ohf_MsX1yloCvzRRGVSLFGCkQjjc2GgpccwbqbBAnRmwtC8f5iK2FO5Pu_YUkO7hqSMiFhd0U01sjiu42re_I57A918Wp4bN7)

[ **SIGN MY LETTER** ⇒](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee60bd81756d4686a536ad14a8cd9cab&_e=ZU111MWxYQgwUy7XmwUl51lDx9rnOY2WKTiYg0ACl9-Whr-XFtiwW7qcNjKzBGl7by1pg8JlmlBf3MRCtF1u9y-_KRBvK63Hz2gruazrLP-cnH0jwVDBC0TtysYy5fTNyICgpBwi3WCLptKc9t0vJW1YpvtkgXEa4iXX3XlCGEmvpZzU-GeJCEDk4-ZI5iwwRwP-09lztbedf9NTRVZG5eoCguZdwj-4rSHzIiSwS8sOdYxfSs6EKCQe5bFc7ONCcWsvfug_SwtS8SUEStvMFt05nZO617cJ2oplZqNjF89OzhqNT8aHzY0wIFZTHdATTE-PH3IIPuNinWsZfovR_CCCagaoOphQIJclmV_z09sTm-sZ_-jMcIboAI-0mnFuiWaNRWx5W8wL0b2EHHRmnjNH1osLW6WXcXIsTD0g-2dLFNN1r-r-9zDKE_tkiKnD32YMRd0XdtcMzkhO5NQmCu-YVK6-841ilWVjYg5uCTEEoPBVpE_eTkUhZziPqQBJEMUpRE4J56NQ6O_oJ4fpSyD2UEX8Vn2Q4HYzh0rXbIqUk3h0IhhcA5t7vaabcCtd)

Get this - ICE is relying on the honor system for migrants.

They are releasing tens of thousands of illegal immigrants into the United States without a court date or any knowledge of where these people are headed.

In fact, ICE has been taking packed planes full of illegal aliens and dropping them all over the country to fend for themselves. (At least 40,000 illegal migrants, including children, are already unaccounted for.)

The Secretary must resign - he is openly allowing a full-fledged assault on our border. He clearly has no interest in rectifying the crisis, and must be replaced immediately with someone who does.

The current status of our southern border is inexcusable, unsustainable and is a direct THREAT to the safety of the American people. [**Please Fellow American, co-sign and demand change in DHS and for Sec. Mayorkas to resign.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee60bd81756d4686a536ad14a8cd9cab&_e=ZU111MWxYQgwUy7XmwUl51lDx9rnOY2WKTiYg0ACl9-Whr-XFtiwW7qcNjKzBGl7by1pg8JlmlBf3MRCtF1u9y-_KRBvK63Hz2gruazrLP-cnH0jwVDBC0TtysYy5fTNyICgpBwi3WCLptKc9t0vJW1YpvtkgXEa4iXX3XlCGEmvpZzU-GeJCEDk4-ZI5iwwRwP-09lztbedf9NTRVZG5eoCguZdwj-4rSHzIiSwS8sOdYxfSs6EKCQe5bFc7ONCcWsvfug_SwtS8SUEStvMFt05nZO617cJ2oplZqNjF89OzhqNT8aHzY0wIFZTHdATTE-PH3IIPuNinWsZfovR_HLNfdFPtqRbh9EFUBFS28mMrEaXFXbe20FwWZvMgem6O9nI-A8AVEiLTCtJxGaNAgp8oybwuXvmORSvwhTvSXoFUHw9UNYVsAaXXhjdxV1KsC-CxjViZnCDYLwHuNpZrqZg9DZqLn3gtdIxs6zb0s9ccOyftSVIQaeKncJ2pTtdSNviOmeKOi7VOmaj2xWfL38xUpDhp3SIwhipWfUZma5M3mRsH79ObGHQIL50NwXo)

[ **SIGN MY LETTER** ⇒](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee60bd81756d4686a536ad14a8cd9cab&_e=ZU111MWxYQgwUy7XmwUl51lDx9rnOY2WKTiYg0ACl9-Whr-XFtiwW7qcNjKzBGl7by1pg8JlmlBf3MRCtF1u9y-_KRBvK63Hz2gruazrLP-cnH0jwVDBC0TtysYy5fTNyICgpBwi3WCLptKc9t0vJW1YpvtkgXEa4iXX3XlCGEmvpZzU-GeJCEDk4-ZI5iwwRwP-09lztbedf9NTRVZG5eoCguZdwj-4rSHzIiSwS8sOdYxfSs6EKCQe5bFc7ONCcWsvfug_SwtS8SUEStvMFt05nZO617cJ2oplZqNjF89OzhqNT8aHzY0wIFZTHdATTE-PH3IIPuNinWsZfovR_E4kZXcngPtxOBdW1tjqJlG4laCdOJgBexHtz65-yqYT1LRNCJVwlyt-XV-Y8XkLVC-PQFUuJTYYag6COyFltjKAZHf5N8wdpHwCaTv2Z7xqCV9M33EPYTizAae3gzm8BPUMYE3si93nHArLcEziQHgzU1UPCycAauhdYe3CyvIGNe-w9a2K8wBit0MV6ZzXRoA8PNsmbEJNz4rA91BVVhOw9aLqq5D5negcxlK7mj6b)

Please do not delay your response. I’m calling for change TODAY before this crisis gets any worse.

For Freedom,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee60bd81756d4686a536ad14a8cd9cab&_e=ZU111MWxYQgwUy7XmwUl51lDx9rnOY2WKTiYg0ACl9-Whr-XFtiwW7qcNjKzBGl7by1pg8JlmlBf3MRCtF1u9y-_KRBvK63Hz2gruazrLP-cnH0jwVDBC0TtysYy5fTNyICgpBwi3WCLptKc9t0vJW1YpvtkgXEa4iXX3XlCGEmvpZzU-GeJCEDk4-ZI5iwwRwP-09lztbedf9NTRVZG5eoCguZdwj-4rSHzIiSwS8sOdYxfSs6EKCQe5bFc7ONCcWsvfug_SwtS8SUEStvMFt05nZO617cJ2oplZqNjF89OzhqNT8aHzY0wIFZTHdATTE-PH3IIPuNinWsZfovR_M0ydGwo0NnND0GbXncJbRuE9a7gBflqdSjHYlEe6tfAwgYXv4Nm2mrOkQl40pYpyIY-XJqDa8NrT7A45TH7zY1JJxuQjfWQgOuLZcYGDjkvs2nabLU19p5kvOsazwUMT7dvJFQdqqLnJKe4t1vXk8tXTgwZDmjSf2JovXdC0DyFxNI6StF4POz90bNGCIaPyNlpV2DPs_QHC42qE-Vmi5Vs415CwEPLk8-Vdb7VPcIz)
**Mike Johnson**

body:
Joe Biden and the UN want to TAKE our guns | The Biden Administration has made it clear that they are coming after OUR gun rights.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58385790:JM9U8u2uN:m:1:3253819041:A7FC1DB44927DAFE701112A9F185B38E:r)
**[BIDEN WANTS AN INTERNATIONAL GUN REGISTRY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58385790:JM9U8u2uN:m:1:3253819041:A7FC1DB44927DAFE701112A9F185B38E:r)**

**[SAY NO >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58385790:JM9U8u2uN:m:1:3253819041:A7FC1DB44927DAFE701112A9F185B38E:r)**

Peter,

This is an **UNPRECEDENTED** assault on our RIGHT to bear arms.

The Biden Administration sheepishly announced their intention to join a radical, United Nations' small arms treaty **that will lead to an INTERNATIONAL GUN REGISTRATION plan that targets LAW-ABIDING American gun owners. **

**This CANNOT happen,**
**Peter.**

The Biden Administration has made it clear that they are coming after OUR gun rights. They **WILL NOT** stop until they have **STRIPPED EVERY AMERICAN** of their right to keep and bear arms.

I am calling on ALL our **Second Amendment warriors** to STEP UP and stand with us against this scheme against American gun owners.

_**[Add your name IMMEDIATELY to the Official Petition to PROTECT OUR GUNS from the Biden Administration and say NO to an international gun registration.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58385790:JM9U8u2uN:m:1:3253819041:A7FC1DB44927DAFE701112A9F185B38E:r)**_

subject: Stop the tax hikes

| | Derek, I have to be honest — I was a little thrown by the news that Glenn Youngkin had outraised us.

Why? _Because we’ve built the largest small dollar donor army in Virginia history and Glenn was able to outraise us just by writing his campaign a huge check._

The Virginia governor’s office shouldn’t be for sale — we can’t let him buy this race for Donald Trump.

_**[Terry set a goal of raising $150,000 by midnight tonight to make progress toward our $2 million September goal. And right now, we’re still more than $50,000 shy of that benchmark. Will you rush a contribution right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36251149/307542039/-2023814932?refcode=20210922.5_GR_9EN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDlkYTA3Yy1kYjFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydEXeEMQXbniNN-GbVtvWAOF94BxvYUMAxvkr4XZV_0=)**_

While Glenn is busy writing himself million-dollar checks, we’re working our hearts out to raise enough money to fund our TV ads for the rest of this campaign.

That’s why our $2 million September goal is so important, Derek. Once October comes around, we need to have our budgets _**LOCKED.**_ But if we don’t hit our fundraising benchmarks, we’re going to have to make some serious cuts.

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. name: Team Collier
subject: Mike is beholden to the people of Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
Texans deserve a leader who will fight for them — not corporations and wealthy lobbyists. |
#
---
Hello folks — We recently hit the one million dollar mark in fundraising, and we did it thanks to the support of small grassroots donors — a whole lot of ‘em. Here’s why that matters so much to Mike: There’s a reason why we haven’t made any progress over the past decade. For too long, special interests and corporate lobbying have spent millions of dollars on keeping the status quo in place so they can line their own pockets. Corporate PACs are why Texas lawmakers refuse to fix the damn grid or fully fund our public schools. Mike doesn’t play that game. Our campaign doesn’t accept money from corporate PACs because Mike is beholden to the people of Texas alone. So we’re building a strong movement of everyday Texans chipping in what they can, and we are putting in the time to earn every person’s vote. **Texans deserve a leader who will fight for them — not corporations and wealthy lobbyists. Can we count on you to chip into our people-powered movement? name: Team Nelson
subject: we deserve a Senator who will work for us, not Big Pharma
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
Senators should represent their voters, but many like Kyrsten Sinema and Ron Johnson choose to represent special interests and influential donors instead.

---
| | Team,

Senators should represent their voters, but many like Kyrsten Sinema and Ron Johnson choose to represent special interests and influential donors instead.

A perfect example of this is in prescription drug policy. Americans currently pay shockingly high rates for life-saving medications, partly because Medicare is currently restricted from negotiating for lower prices.

Fixing this loophole is extremely popular amongst Democrats and Republicans (80% in recent polling), and it's currently in the Build Back Better plan. Beyond being universally popular, it would also generate significant tax revenue to expand Medicare and much more.

In response, pharmaceutical corporations, like _Amgen, Bayer, Mylan, and Pfizer,_ are spending big money on lobbying to kill the ability to lower drug prices, and corporate-funded politicians like Ron Johnson and Kyrsten Sinema are all too willing to do their bidding.

[Unlike many of his opponents, Tom Nelson doesn't take any money from Big Pharma because he wants to do his job without owing favors. Can we count on you to chip in here to make sure we elect a Senator who will work for his constituents, not big drug companies?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36253467/307553003/594431030?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210922_1_1&refcode2=af6dd073-e21b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjZkZDA3My1lMjFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BLRQikdjuzCAxKNeiGhpPiPDGyJNkMig5wtAZBRt9zc=) | **If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.**

clean_body: Senators should represent their voters, but many like Kyrsten Sinema and Ron Johnson choose to represent special interests and influential donors instead. | | Team, Senators should represent their voters, but many like Kyrsten Sinema and Ron Johnson choose to represent special interests and influential donors instead. A perfect example of this is in prescription drug policy. Americans currently pay shockingly high rates for life-saving medications, partly because Medicare is currently restricted from negotiating for lower prices. Fixing this loophole is extremely popular amongst Democrats and Republicans (80% in recent polling), and it's currently in the Build Back Better plan. Beyond being universally popular, it would also generate significant tax revenue to expand Medicare and much more. In response, pharmaceutical corporations, like Amgen, Bayer, Mylan, and Pfizer, are spending big money on lobbying to kill the ability to lower drug prices, and corporate-funded politicians like Ron Johnson and Kyrsten Sinema are all too willing to do their bidding. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. ** | = | = | = | = | = | = The avoidable pain of high drug prices is incredibly sobering. Fellow Conservative,

I wanted to quickly follow up with you re: the September goal setting email I sent you on September 14th. I’m taking a look at the results now and I’ll be honest,**I had to take a few minutes to compose myself after I realized it only brought in $134**.

I know that things are tight financially for a lot of people right now – but the fact of the matter is **they’ll soon be a lot worse if Republicans don't retake the House majority next year**.

I know that I’m repeating myself in these emails, but in order to master something (**in my case, online fundraising**) I am a firm believer that its necessary to repeat oneself until the goal is accomplished, so here I go:

In 2020, Republicans came within 8,000 votes of defeating my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, in the general election. In the grand scheme of things, 8,000 votes is next to nothing. **_Meaning the funds were raising now could determine whether we’re able to win this seat for the Republican Party next year._**

**[Raising $134 off an email is not only embarrassing, its demoralizing. clean_body: We’re counting on your support, Peter. | Authorized by Elect Republicans HQ Peter, We need to be sure that you understand how important these Midterm Elections are... The Left currently has a one-vote “majority” in the United States Senate, and they’re desperately trying to expand their ranks so they can pass their extreme, socialist agenda. They will RAISE your taxes. They will DEFUND the police. They will PACK the Supreme Court. They will LEGALIZE unlimited abortion on demand. And, they will DESTROY our economy. The stakes have never been higher, which is why President Trump has been criss-crossing the nation to help elect his team of Trump-Endorsed Republicans and reclaim the Majority. But the fact is that President Trump can’t win this fight alone, Peter. He needs you fighting by his side to elect Good Republicans in Battleground Races. | | | | | | | | | | President Trump is really counting on Republican Patriots like you to step up and help, Peter. If you don’t, we’ll lose and the Democrats will remake America into a socialist nation. It’s that simple. We’re sending the President a list of EVERY Patriot who steps up today. Make certain that he sees your name. | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Trump Republican Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: John Castorani
subject: Destroying the bastards was my mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
I answered the 4 a.m. call that former secretary of State Hillary Clinton wouldn't. For six years I hunted the perpetrators of the Benghazi attack. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=75d8f5aa366a4fbeb345a16f7944287d&_t=ya22qx-0Sl2fP_k5Mww5-swb6MED8jkOgsQGmwlzNoYahNtTAeCWUQpdpsgz4YXqLJT5qYQk7S7tWEc5v00alRFGBhHudAWyubQ9QyW02pvhACkKWWYFpFKkh7kjB2ttQLoPU_L2trCMt7_zDpDmeDYsRXaoV6R4U1TyOXij9Ao%3D) | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=75d8f5aa366a4fbeb345a16f7944287d&_e=oBm4Mkg0xVcGWKu9WtmBEAING89Sqh1DcFk1cahH-tp9WOH5yHFS_F0HUQO23rE2L2Kdyk3Q71dtMYxGJGUocM7yV1ZejADTusBVInpIY0uef_yzEoH7x5S6CiD3Bt_boWnWrl6NlDEmYuRN4LSxi54k-AzgPlaNrezsDYo3jkRhKLOkfGtL-94lB9u6bN4Nsf-b3-Yf_pyq1T1aujMqm-wt6oLl0Zbt6xaHZtpYOf6Fal4RK5CkhE0UrK6aLgdOFIGajcTR8iEGquba7VMrYsRlYcX0SD8J-ZgNggvxv1y3wjImiCx0DU57gRsg15cz_rzGNQhKF0-j-m8VdEAPhj8hHrrDbI5Seo7ifVH5HXLUKfyYWfvQb9QExkzX_Enf2-ylqNBIQU8cP8gqi_3f8RxCv3HjQukQaykEer7FMzWYI5lsDyz1bAkK1YSW6EkEqWXz7VO3fDxJcCZoo43eAyEiMtO7lix8fKqfWGNRug4Z3QckK4muVuZAM-HQaOdI)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=75d8f5aa366a4fbeb345a16f7944287d&_e=oBm4Mkg0xVcGWKu9WtmBEAING89Sqh1DcFk1cahH-tp9WOH5yHFS_F0HUQO23rE2L2Kdyk3Q71dtMYxGJGUocM7yV1ZejADTusBVInpIY0uef_yzEoH7x5S6CiD3Bt_boWnWrl6NlDEmYuRN4LSxi54k-AzgPlaNrezsDYo3jkRhKLOkfGtL-94lB9u6bN4Nsf-b3-Yf_pyq1T1aujMqm-wt6oLl0Zbt6xaHZtpYOf6Fal4RK5CkhE0UrK6aLgdOFIGajcTR8iEGquba7VMrYsRlYcX0SD8J-ZgNggvxv1wYqKJpN2ltpk04SLAfOWKp341S4CJFUo6a1z1bT6pOoqyLYOK-n-rawGmVveB3FWpTnq-hhwLqwTlQpj6CweJje93VNtai-NAKJviYvS6Ezbd6UXgfX6JTULVc0Z0VKuc7plxxKTdma_wG3WwPXEKGn5LMz5J8Y8FptBOAE3B7dHj_nFh3hL36GAB3w6EPm_R_1tOm16cH32JwCFmHg1Go)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=75d8f5aa366a4fbeb345a16f7944287d&_e=oBm4Mkg0xVcGWKu9WtmBEAING89Sqh1DcFk1cahH-tp9WOH5yHFS_F0HUQO23rE2L2Kdyk3Q71dtMYxGJGUocM7yV1ZejADTusBVInpIY0uef_yzEoH7x5S6CiD3Bt_boWnWrl6NlDEmYuRN4LSxi54k-AzgPlaNrezsDYo3jkRhKLOkfGtL-94lB9u6bN4Nsf-b3-Yf_pyq1T1aujMqm-wt6oLl0Zbt6xaHZtpYOf6Fal4RK5CkhE0UrK6aLgdOFIGajcTR8iEGquba7VMrYsRlYcX0SD8J-ZgNggvxv1w_VNenIkLKe8wYBEa75VY9RWdLhCl3Bs2-Q5RiytJEb_CtWfL02r9_LMPomhtJQczxc9DyJBIx6TrhQUelZUFyKXEAwXaYha3MJri94r1cq-qhlsg_CkL-Cwz9f6Wa80QcOClUk3DlcCJkv6Sgp7rY0Tx2u8yPTO4g350jMVG0glGEWnF9tpE3BGa2ralFIAUV_0FkPX9vZ4Hnv7CnWEFs)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=75d8f5aa366a4fbeb345a16f7944287d&_e=oBm4Mkg0xVcGWKu9WtmBEAING89Sqh1DcFk1cahH-tp9WOH5yHFS_F0HUQO23rE2L2Kdyk3Q71dtMYxGJGUocM7yV1ZejADTusBVInpIY0uef_yzEoH7x5S6CiD3Bt_boWnWrl6NlDEmYuRN4LSxi54k-AzgPlaNrezsDYo3jkRhKLOkfGtL-94lB9u6bN4Nsf-b3-Yf_pyq1T1aujMqm-wt6oLl0Zbt6xaHZtpYOf6Fal4RK5CkhE0UrK6aLgdOFIGajcTR8iEGquba7VMrYsRlYcX0SD8J-ZgNggvxv1yLXUpG7BXhdNE5TeKKHbdYpMAo5Wz8RSw9-7jk5iVRgUzChnkLA5fNc8tDeb4kZeWDmy2qmBtjipvVEka-lUatubIuZzCOEiG5ywajfesoO_rm0j2ChMok4qE7SW7ir-noCBKYIMePpoB3A_mnsNJbBnOhYmJhSEu49_29oCulX9fDRKAaopv2hy9evQ3C6R4LVXko1QfcBHtQ-xE8Yjjk)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=75d8f5aa366a4fbeb345a16f7944287d&_e=oBm4Mkg0xVcGWKu9WtmBEAING89Sqh1DcFk1cahH-tp9WOH5yHFS_F0HUQO23rE2L2Kdyk3Q71dtMYxGJGUocM7yV1ZejADTusBVInpIY0uef_yzEoH7x5S6CiD3Bt_boWnWrl6NlDEmYuRN4LSxi54k-AzgPlaNrezsDYo3jkRhKLOkfGtL-94lB9u6bN4Nsf-b3-Yf_pyq1T1aujMqm-wt6oLl0Zbt6xaHZtpYOf6Fal4RK5CkhE0UrK6aLgdOFIGajcTR8iEGquba7VMrYsRlYcX0SD8J-ZgNggvxv1xWbMmxexs8FOiJLkPG0Oe9qCs_Y_hb7ASUSsoKlTCTFzp0sTXWyMN0yIfOadr0uvR16YL2uhcmBoqplV0ogR-ydXd4aySfzFEBnnEniMqUUyfugCpR_uu1Ew65gQI_QXRwsXTFZ8JDdTOrhtHw8wSNzy-KUKqQ96Zo9ciSTU_h5GsYvtTcYJz387Qdt9CUF6tIRoNuFdCsVQEcO5cLMCXZ)

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=75d8f5aa366a4fbeb345a16f7944287d&_e=oBm4Mkg0xVcGWKu9WtmBEAING89Sqh1DcFk1cahH-tp9WOH5yHFS_F0HUQO23rE2L2Kdyk3Q71dtMYxGJGUocM7yV1ZejADTusBVInpIY0uef_yzEoH7x5S6CiD3Bt_boWnWrl6NlDEmYuRN4LSxi54k-AzgPlaNrezsDYo3jkRhKLOkfGtL-94lB9u6bN4Nsf-b3-Yf_pyq1T1aujMqm-wt6oLl0Zbt6xaHZtpYOf6Fal4RK5CkhE0UrK6aLgdOFIGajcTR8iEGquba7VMrYsRlYcX0SD8J-ZgNggvxv1yjD_BW0ZIWZb56GNzLzC7-OnrQZTkyhXggF2fqcseXoCW89oCuTBjf1CTGcXEjOIUy9hJ-pD9ZmABc3cIAEaDcNdWTGtgWjG41-WZ6S9XDEQj_ET_SEHQ9z9NcbwUsiY76DFJheufW7JS8vu943xp5iVpP7tygrFRxGWeYpn1vT4gjVuRO8GHzqx3tsqj2NrX1en8TK-_aqst39UD4PEQD) **

So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

**[Hillary Clinton’s deceptions and lies will forever stand to serve as prime examples of everything that is wrong in Washington. clean_body: I answered the 4 a.m. call that former secretary of State Hillary Clinton wouldn't. For six years I hunted the perpetrators of the Benghazi attack. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow Conservative, My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today. I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own. Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency . I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price. If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable , and in a moment, You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel. This political assassination made my blood boil. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. We have to fight for it. | Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason At the time of the Benghazi attacks, Hillary Clinton knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally. . Team: Since Democrats won control of the Senate, we’ve taken huge steps to speed up vaccinations, get the economy moving, and protect the future of the planet.**But we have a major problem.**
With Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority, Republicans only need to flip one seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell -- which means our entire agenda depends on not losing a _single_ Democratic seat. That's why I'm writing to you today.
**CNN just named my friends Catherine Cortez Masto (NV), Maggie Hassan (NH), Mark Kelly (AZ) and Rev. Raphael Warnock (GA) the most vulnerable Democratic senators up for reelection. We need to do everything we can to win these races, so I'm personally asking: [Will you give $5 before midnight to help us hold these seats, support my campaign, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36254427/307556000/783679756?refcode=jr_em_nd_210922_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzNlMDEwMi1lNTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwdsFFv7Geue81b0dDOuoqNQP8pS7wvcOlu-y8HTYUI=)**
When we took back the Senate in January, Democrats made a promise to fight for everyday people, and so far, we're delivering on that promise. We're fighting to make historic investments in everything from health care to infrastructure -- and Catherine, Maggie, Mark and Raphael have been leading the charge in the Senate. They're the strong leaders we need to rebuild in the wake of this pandemic, but they need our help.
**Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reported that Republicans started out _favored_ to retake the Senate for Mitch McConnell -- and with the GOP already spending MILLIONS in these battleground states, we don't have a minute to waste.**
**[So please: Will you rush in $5 donation before our critical midnight deadline so we can keep these four critical seats and defend our Democratic Senate majority? Time is tight and we're still falling short of our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36254428/307556001/783679756?refcode=jr_em_nd_210922_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzNlMDEwMi1lNTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwdsFFv7Geue81b0dDOuoqNQP8pS7wvcOlu-y8HTYUI=)**
We can’t win without your support. Thank you for pitching in,
Jacky

name: Team Kilmer
subject: This is a long note about climate change, environmental justice, and the effort to build back better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

In a minute, we're going to ask you to **[add your name to show your support for the effort to build back better](https://act.myngp.com/el/otKhxkNMO6m0hFj6SQG-xiqb0pCY9p2qoJ-cgeFHEYA=/D0BFaUszZ9bRoY9TtbKbWedGCFTFDX7AL4q4MRhWkTc=?ms=em21_210922_Climat_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em21_210922_Climat_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210922_Climat_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})** , but first let us explain why this effort is so crucial:

The extreme weather patterns of the past months have reminded all of us just how urgent the issue of climate change is. From Hurricane Ida to wildfires and heat waves in the West, **it 's clearer than ever before that the climate crisis is already here.**

Climate change is hurting all of us, but not equally. Like so many other issues facing our nation, Black and Brown communities are facing the most severe effects. In Washington State, Tribal Communities are being displaced because of flooding. Across the country, BIPOC and poor communities are more likely to die as a result of pollution than those in wealthier, whiter neighborhoods.

This injustice came about for a lot of reasons -- systemic racism, unequal access to resources, and outdated infrastructure, to name a few. That's one big reason why Congress urgently needs to pass President Biden's plan to Build Back Better.

This plan will invest in all of our communities and pay special attention to communities that have been left behind. It will help America step up to the threat of the climate crisis -- and do so in a way that creates jobs and helps communities. Derek is fighting in Congress to ensure climate resiliency -- against flooding, severe temperatures, wildfires, and more -- is a TOP priority.

**[We cannot wait any longer to prepare for and mitigate the worst effects of climate change. That's why the Build Back Better agenda addresses them head-on. Will you show your support for this critical effort by adding your name today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/otKhxkNMO6m0hFj6SQG-xiqb0pCY9p2qoJ-cgeFHEYA=/D0BFaUszZ9bRoY9TtbKbWedGCFTFDX7AL4q4MRhWkTc=?ms=em21_210922_Climat_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em21_210922_Climat_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210922_Climat_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/otKhxkNMO6m0hFj6SQG-xiqb0pCY9p2qoJ-cgeFHEYA=/XGtBjGzTlI47mS-QsHUunnuFHhtgwX5nq1k1PNuW1Mw=?refcode=em21_210922_Climat_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210922_Climat_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/otKhxkNMO6m0hFj6SQG-xiqb0pCY9p2qoJ-cgeFHEYA=/7-knVv0P8tRva6GccK8oqyuxVMEX3plu3a0z3QtgmyQ=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/otKhxkNMO6m0hFj6SQG-xiqb0pCY9p2qoJ-cgeFHEYA=/w5ePksdQh38kZfBUOHZu4XwmEOR-2g2pAvzYJa-Z4kI=)
---|---

---

PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot.

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/otKhxkNMO6m0hFj6SQG-xiqb0pCY9p2qoJ-cgeFHEYA=/XGtBjGzTlI47mS-QsHUunnuFHhtgwX5nq1k1PNuW1Mw=?refcode=em21_210922_Climat_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210922_Climat_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

body:
What if we told you CNN rated this as one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022?
#

Friends -
Is there anything we can say to convince you to make your first $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign today?

And what if you knew that as you read this, others are chipping in that $3 as well, because there’s only one way we reach our goals: together.

Peter,
---
It’s clear that now more than ever, America needs fighters.
---
That’s why I’m endorsing Governor Eric Greitens for the United States Senate.
---
