clean_body: That’s why I’m endorsing Governor Eric Greitens for the United States Senate. | Peter, It’s clear that now more than ever, America needs fighters. That’s why I’m endorsing Governor Eric Greitens for the United States Senate. Eric has been a fighter his entire life -- as a boxer, a Navy SEAL, as one of the most conservative Governors in the country, and as a leader in the fight to get to the bottom of the 2020 election. We don’t need any more insiders or career politicians in Washington, Peter. That's why I’m proud to stand with Eric in our shared mission to revive our Republic. The people of Missouri recognize that those who betrayed President Trump the most were not the leftists but the cowardly Republicans in Name Only. Even worse than the radical leftists, the corrupt Deep State, the mainstream media, and Big Tech are the feckless and spineless Republicans who have utterly surrendered. Thank you, General Michael Flynn U.S. Army (Retired) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Marc Molinaro
subject: America is worth fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US
body:
Our nation is worth fighting for, and I need your help.
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=4e2ee4fb8bb744e68d2564baccd3f71a&_e=ouKHpjYId9LkZUP3iJR_1ytp-BaPcHtduC5jg4G3qzgMgLJDNVQ2cMulBzkO640QUQYmQOQWB32SlYJmkkYUo0pwGZW1zCbGPVx2E3Zix5JDd2kW0_zmnOWJ9FdyzIa8_1Pj7iI6dVw07ZQTh5kHYhhlybA2reid7R3pd6GKjWEPzDfq18RUsPZtVseYcNv4ZRh4f8sJi72tucdvvKX_fr6XR92BZA0gq-zXOAprm-7ycwNV-o0utoOi7YlV7KYa2ZyTCPIfl6Cdo6mz-SGETufZt63LZfX6ISbXghSJM5fBBqgjQ9KI3zWFjOaQZpfg3dJ60QfZj-S0fTB9g7I_U_LrZ_5HrpD5nCUJ1Jj2_aRMmgY0kcShbE3XlS8Lb2l0gjXEexDGjyQ_HD7yc6CglIjEnx3HVTIQx3lbC1r80chtkWSNCefP_hotUliRdjiw1-VifjEyD6BrhlYOSLBdcg%3D%3D)

---
| **Do you agree that America is worth fighting for?** I’m asking because I believe our nation is worth every effort possible to ensure it continues to be a beacon of hope for every single one of us, not just the privileged few.

If you agree with that then you’ll agree that we don’t need Congressmembers who are over-promising and never following through; [**we need action.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=4e2ee4fb8bb744e68d2564baccd3f71a&_e=ouKHpjYId9LkZUP3iJR_1ytp-BaPcHtduC5jg4G3qzgMgLJDNVQ2cMulBzkO640QUQYmQOQWB32SlYJmkkYUo0pwGZW1zCbGPVx2E3Zix5JDd2kW0_zmnOWJ9FdyzIa8_1Pj7iI6dVw07ZQTh5kHYhhlybA2reid7R3pd6GKjWEPzDfq18RUsPZtVseYcNv4ZRh4f8sJi72tucdvvKX_fr6XR92BZA0gq-zXOAprm-7ycwNV-o0utoOi7YlV7KYadTL7WCauB_OYFYHjky2F-B62wOIdijZxkU3S4fpL9nCFZbHGGidKAG_SvnPz1_hDVEMMMoDFd8Zns9XvOwmGUCD7tXtEDdKSsFWEt4rei562U-M4m6Mc5nNK10s380TMOpgr5Vhoa2ihNgnIxncgWd2s3zuGIbD2ldpSHi4vUqpjp74n56MefiC0Q0yREWnWnOiJ8dJopl-LECy_R8Kr0A%3D%3D) **That’s why I’m running for Congress and why I need your help to fight for the America we both know and love.**

I’m talking about fighting for the future of our communities, the well-being of our neighbors, and to help New York and America rebound so we can solidify the great promise of this nation: _**life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.**_

This campaign is for your children and mine; for the workers who have struggled like never before to maintain the American dream; for the small business owners and farmers whose ambitions and livelihoods have been ravaged; for those who have been marginalized, left out, and relegated to the sidelines for too long. [**This is a fight for a better tomorrow where every American can live, work, and raise a family.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=4e2ee4fb8bb744e68d2564baccd3f71a&_e=ouKHpjYId9LkZUP3iJR_1ytp-BaPcHtduC5jg4G3qzgMgLJDNVQ2cMulBzkO640QUQYmQOQWB32SlYJmkkYUo0pwGZW1zCbGPVx2E3Zix5JDd2kW0_zmnOWJ9FdyzIa8_1Pj7iI6dVw07ZQTh5kHYhhlybA2reid7R3pd6GKjWEPzDfq18RUsPZtVseYcNv4ZRh4f8sJi72tucdvvKX_fr6XR92BZA0gq-zXOAprm-7ycwNV-o0utoOi7YlV7KYapk0Un1hVDyKC0BcO-ltejPTiEX-QRSMoxp2STyR9oTYNcGhm7kbC-gDqP7LpQGEazCuTbdkq7Vpju2m5CLqbFiy8ibBu0aGEZ6-E2_HMj25oAeD1x2ueAUAnQ623hMKjQm6Xwsu3koXP2m_4TqC4i7hvdyeP45ZrN3VrFzbigfL38gCR-H4F6HUNlUN_bQ3FdsrH5JQbljEFPHQqSMsvSA%3D%3D)

If a brighter future with solutions instead of empty promises is something you want, then I need your help [**to fight for an America that we can all be proud of.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=4e2ee4fb8bb744e68d2564baccd3f71a&_e=ouKHpjYId9LkZUP3iJR_1ytp-BaPcHtduC5jg4G3qzgMgLJDNVQ2cMulBzkO640QUQYmQOQWB32SlYJmkkYUo0pwGZW1zCbGPVx2E3Zix5JDd2kW0_zmnOWJ9FdyzIa8_1Pj7iI6dVw07ZQTh5kHYhhlybA2reid7R3pd6GKjWEPzDfq18RUsPZtVseYcNv4ZRh4f8sJi72tucdvvKX_fr6XR92BZA0gq-zXOAprm-7ycwNV-o0utoOi7YlV7KYab1DbgLyibybDfP_KzSa83AYYzs0hxoexS3a7hs07u8c1qwfFwBxic6u_GtljgmFNCR4_EMM4uBZeCtuccIE4gFq5iGPghMDN6lsIz1SOZua0DCzCZUgmQNfrcn8C1G6rwt41u9WjFVSKoagEDmzGBGWuUomuVNIuLscqge9x3Kc3c0ZFOlr11MDNI-sMG0-lrOHB1cX1ulBTmGWbC3fRYA%3D%3D) This is a key race, so if you’re serious about bettering this nation then please join me so we can finally get things done.

**Together we can make a difference, but only if we fight for it.**

Thank you and God bless,

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=4e2ee4fb8bb744e68d2564baccd3f71a&_e=ouKHpjYId9LkZUP3iJR_1ytp-BaPcHtduC5jg4G3qzgMgLJDNVQ2cMulBzkO640QUQYmQOQWB32SlYJmkkYUo0pwGZW1zCbGPVx2E3Zix5JDd2kW0_zmnOWJ9FdyzIa8_1Pj7iI6dVw07ZQTh5kHYhhlybA2reid7R3pd6GKjWEPzDfq18RUsPZtVseYcNv4ZRh4f8sJi72tucdvvKX_fr6XR92BZA0gq-zXOAprm-7ycwNV-o0utoOi7YlV7KYanNnTzSst311YfJoIpVI4Ycs0guh0W7SWuV7ZEvcFTROjYfuriMARNbUVyx7u2464CXpSMq55QQUWQwQ2PxOg8rgY6rhGYVzitKvyP21PmIG8CWcNw7iQiHOnHXvAtibDOxW-6f8L00PZTftyMEpNU_NmznH0O94GoaxmTtRkEom-nLc2EEOSMQYgdcN7SMPBNOPJbiSjIfAErB0odZH9hw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Our nation is worth fighting for, and I need your help. | Do you agree that America is worth fighting for? I’m asking because I believe our nation is worth every effort possible to ensure it continues to be a beacon of hope for every single one of us, not just the privileged few. If you agree with that then you’ll agree that we don’t need Congressmembers who are over-promising and never following through; That’s why I’m running for Congress and why I need your help to fight for the America we both know and love. I’m talking about fighting for the future of our communities, the well-being of our neighbors, and to help New York and America rebound so we can solidify the great promise of this nation: life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. This campaign is for your children and mine; for the workers who have struggled like never before to maintain the American dream; for the small business owners and farmers whose ambitions and livelihoods have been ravaged; for those who have been marginalized, left out, and relegated to the sidelines for too long. If a brighter future with solutions instead of empty promises is something you want, then I need your help This is a key race, so if you’re serious about bettering this nation then please join me so we can finally get things done. Together we can make a difference, but only if we fight for it. Thank you and God bless, Marc Molinaro Candidate New York’s 19th Congressional District | | Paid for by Marc for US

body:
As an Afghanistan combat veteran who survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts, I am appalled by the ignorance and disrespect. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c26eda10a8914c2290ad504195030d94&_e=VTLIwS55TM8gqTxj-9J55UUI7VMU0sKg1V-SdZbZZqFXdVjgkYNWWKz20oUCA89jfYcgoUirFZ5vd9C9Y0RpyfXji4kMXIkjuWlKxyIdgAGeEEONtw5IBRANMtQ3WZDYN9XWQqTUP4Ufm2F7Vh9h-P3PcYaVTlbdwh9lE8RL0YNxIX9GbFUbuXwxDZwkDQprwvSM-0VV-ZK2rjQg-T6zYzE-5YglFFVaujRQ7HPjXqhXKFm4FmYQ5Jh3y_ZxCcGRqUatUn1iUSZut7oO7HB2ZljXAQFti_GJROePCyHoJKNBjld6VSX2G1_KAfimTLqfq2euFC7FBj5CqwyHvOlA_eYdTCTvwta5-75HJhVY6DmBMib5c7dA2VQK3eqzBqQms7LsPPjCObpp-52d6X1IpkRZEfgC24Ms0WwelbsCBEHNckqQtOFaKKYStkmQGFnydAyuMqXuuYJ4nByB18bKB8O439Id13XREIxf2j_pQb0%3D)

---
Fellow patriot,

My opponent **Katie Porter** previously joined **Ilhan Omar** and the rest of their radical friends in the House Progressive Caucus in congratulating President Biden for pulling our troops out of Afghanistan, which has left that country in chaos at the hands of the Taliban with both American lives and innocent Afghan in serious jeopardy.

_Does Katie Porter still think this was a good idea?_ Her constituents are left wondering. It has been five days since the Taliban took Kabul and she has said NOTHING.

Porter and Omar claim the war that I fought in personally to protect them and our entire country from terrorism, and in which thousands of American soldiers gave their lives, **was just a distraction...**

**As an Afghanistan combat veteran who survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts, I am appalled by the ignorance and disrespect with which this statement was made.**

This is exactly why we need new leadership in Congress and in America – and clearly leftist Katie Porter needs to be among the first to go.

[**Will you help me – a conservative Navy combat veteran who served in Afghanistan – defeat Katie Porter in CA-45 by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or more to my campaign today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c26eda10a8914c2290ad504195030d94&_e=VTLIwS55TM8gqTxj-9J55UUI7VMU0sKg1V-SdZbZZqFXdVjgkYNWWKz20oUCA89jfYcgoUirFZ5vd9C9Y0RpyfXji4kMXIkjuWlKxyIdgAGeEEONtw5IBRANMtQ3WZDYN9XWQqTUP4Ufm2F7Vh9h-P3PcYaVTlbdwh9lE8RL0YNxIX9GbFUbuXwxDZwkDQprwvSM-0VV-ZK2rjQg-T6zYzE-5YglFFVaujRQ7HPjXqhXKFm4FmYQ5Jh3y_ZxCcGRqUatUn1iUSZut7oO7HB2Zi551Rl7qDFgAA3_CJA2peeuEe6aotY42USp5nSC7gXEKNfv8pYB2Tw6muCUBBNGu3IFJH7zMQmasUYkKlpdhEXz5ObxAdcZ2hQIR9izI-TJt8BgamDAfP_wiJoOf0idppduYu-NDWUCrHi0n8CqweNI5mvA4fYMZc_oA9HjZ-6vaERbsIcOnk4eC0hheyWxuBQsm709wsgjm0j_3PhHIhE%3D)

President Biden’s botched troop withdrawal has left American civilians and troops trapped. Not to mention innocent Afghan men, women and children clinging to airplanes and passing babies over fences to solders to hopefully save their lives.

**This is nothing to be congratulated** – it is just about the worst possible thing that could have happened. And it’s all because President Biden underestimated our enemy and refused to accept the possibility that this could happen.

_**But Katie Porter and Ilhan Omar think its great!**_

To make matters worse, Biden’s botched troop withdrawal has also left America’s military arsenal in the hands of the Taliban.

This is an image of American Humvees that the Taliban now has control of, along with planes, helicopters, drones, firearms, and tactical equipment like night-vision goggles and communication gear.

The Taliban could and likely will now use this arsenal against the people of Afghanistan – especially those who aided the allies – American soldiers and civilians, and maybe against us.

The world and our country are now less safe due to this botched troop rollout, and everything that I and my fellow soldiers fought for in Afghanistan over the last 20 years has been undone.

_**Yet, Katie Porter and Ilhan Omar congratulate President Biden and insult what I put my life on the line for!**_

[**Katie Porter MUST be held accountable, and I need your help to replace her in Congress and restore ACTUAL leadership in America.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c26eda10a8914c2290ad504195030d94&_e=VTLIwS55TM8gqTxj-9J55UUI7VMU0sKg1V-SdZbZZqFXdVjgkYNWWKz20oUCA89jfYcgoUirFZ5vd9C9Y0RpyfXji4kMXIkjuWlKxyIdgAGeEEONtw5IBRANMtQ3WZDYN9XWQqTUP4Ufm2F7Vh9h-P3PcYaVTlbdwh9lE8RL0YNxIX9GbFUbuXwxDZwkDQprwvSM-0VV-ZK2rjQg-T6zYzE-5YglFFVaujRQ7HPjXqhXKFm4FmYQ5Jh3y_ZxCcGRqUatUn1iUSZut7oO7HB2ZuLR3PYkIuuS1rmSV92urrmmnMR7tQRWbUNMWze3hSzmjRdNxayYjqboIL4CDNJDt3VP_3_IyvU8q1lbkH64BvLJctdL6fQ-I3Sj7PXroiE6dCTHEJ9VcbznuZOzt1zK-mu2nhrnoq8RJ7bSZ2xKMYGvH3fHSXCGvF1LG2zXTrYfjxbVqxzfPFTKATUmdluGSFs068XdV859XLd_9c5w2G0%3D)

clean_body: As an Afghanistan combat veteran who survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts, I am appalled by the ignorance and disrespect. | Fellow patriot, My opponent Katie Porter previously joined Ilhan Omar and the rest of their radical friends in the House Progressive Caucus in congratulating President Biden for pulling our troops out of Afghanistan, which has left that country in chaos at the hands of the Taliban with both American lives and innocent Afghan in serious jeopardy. Does Katie Porter still think this was a good idea? Her constituents are left wondering. It has been five days since the Taliban took Kabul and she has said NOTHING. Porter and Omar claim the war that I fought in personally to protect them and our entire country from terrorism, and in which thousands of American soldiers gave their lives, was just a distraction... As an Afghanistan combat veteran who survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts, I am appalled by the ignorance and disrespect with which this statement was made. This is exactly why we need new leadership in Congress and in America – and clearly leftist Katie Porter needs to be among the first to go. President Biden’s botched troop withdrawal has left American civilians and troops trapped. Not to mention innocent Afghan men, women and children clinging to airplanes and passing babies over fences to solders to hopefully save their lives. This is nothing to be congratulated – it is just about the worst possible thing that could have happened. And it’s all because President Biden underestimated our enemy and refused to accept the possibility that this could happen. But Katie Porter and Ilhan Omar think its great! To make matters worse, Biden’s botched troop withdrawal has also left America’s military arsenal in the hands of the Taliban. This is an image of American Humvees that the Taliban now has control of, along with planes, helicopters, drones, firearms, and tactical equipment like night-vision goggles and communication gear. The Taliban could and likely will now use this arsenal against the people of Afghanistan – especially those who aided the allies – American soldiers and civilians, and maybe against us. The world and our country are now less safe due to this botched troop rollout, and everything that I and my fellow soldiers fought for in Afghanistan over the last 20 years has been undone. Yet, Katie Porter and Ilhan Omar congratulate President Biden and insult what I put my life on the line for! President Biden and Katie Porter have both failed America, and they both must be kicked out of office so America can have real and responsible leadership. As an Afghanistan war veteran who loves my country, I will give my district and America the leadership we need to resolve this crisis and make sure Americans are never failed like this again. For America, Shawn Collins U.S. Navy veteran Republican for Congress | | Shawn Collins is a conservative Navy veteran and active Navy Reservist. Having served in Afghanistan, Shawn has spent his life fighting for the Constitution he swore to uphold and defend. He will take that same fighting spirit to the halls of Congress. ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Shawn Collins is a former member of the US Navy. name: Rick Larsen
subject: An update on our efforts to protect women’s reproductive health
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
|
---
| | The date has been set. The Supreme Court will hear arguments on December 1 that could allow the end of _Roe v. Wade_ as we know it. And since our last update, the Texas near-total abortion ban has emboldened other states to pursue similar action - further eroding a woman's right to choose across our country. We have to act now. And we are. This week, we can pass the Women's Health Protection Act through the House, bringing us one step closer to nationally codifying the Constitutional right of women to make their own personal, private decisions on their reproductive health. But we should not stop there. For 45 years, the Hyde Amendment has been used as a cudgel against the _Roe v. Wade_ decision, forbidding abortion coverage under health plans that are disproportionately relied upon by lower-income women and women of color. It is inexcusable that the Hyde Amendment remains when Roe is the law of the land, and it is critical we finally end that discriminatory practice once and for all. clean_body: | | | The date has been set. The Supreme Court will hear arguments on December 1 that could allow the end of Roe v. Wade as we know it. And since our last update, the Texas near-total abortion ban has emboldened other states to pursue similar action - further eroding a woman's right to choose across our country. We have to act now. And we are. This week, we can pass the Women's Health Protection Act through the House, bringing us one step closer to nationally codifying the Constitutional right of women to make their own personal, private decisions on their reproductive health. But we should not stop there. For 45 years, the Hyde Amendment has been used as a cudgel against the Roe v. Wade decision, forbidding abortion coverage under health plans that are disproportionately relied upon by lower-income women and women of color. It is inexcusable that the Hyde Amendment remains when Roe is the law of the land, and it is critical we finally end that discriminatory practice once and for all. Rick Forwarded Message We are facing a major battle on reproductive rights. Last week, Texas passed the most restrictive anti-choice bill in the country. Even worse, the Supreme Court, set to consider a repeal of Roe v. Wade this term, refused to step in and uphold the long-existing law of the land. What happened in Texas is a threat to reproductive health and personal rights everywhere. Texas's six-week abortion ban effectively prohibits Texans from accessing critical reproductive health care, even in cases of rape and incest. And in the week since, emboldened by the Court's silence, states like South Dakota have introduced increasingly-restrictive measures in defiance of Roe. This is wrong. These decisions are deeply personal and private, and should be made between patients and their health care providers. It is abhorrent that so many Republicans in Texas and in Congress believe controlling women's bodies should be a matter for politicians. I will always fight to protect access to reproductive health care. I am a cosponsor of the Women's Health Protection Act, a bill that would codify Roe v. Wadeinto federal law. We must get this bill passed. I am proud that Washington state is a national leader in recognizing the right to safe, affordable, and accessible reproductive care. We must fight back to ensure that reproductive rights are protected now and into the future — in Texas, and everywhere else. body:
Will you add your name to CONDEMN Republican attacks on reproductive rights?
| **** | | **NEW POLL: Broad majorities of Americans OPPOSE Texas abortion ban**
| [We're so proud.

Americans everywhere are rising up and speaking out **AGAINST** Texas' EXTREME abortion restrictions!

And Democratic HQ is prepared to lead the charge to elect Democrats who will fight for reproductive freedoms -- but first, we need to know where our best grassroots supporters stand.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-)

[**So quickly: Do you stand with Americans everywhere who OPPOSE Texas ' abortion ban?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/4E6Vs3qyyZS_)[

**NAME:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Petition Signature:** ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)[SIGN ON >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/mPmpcqR~~)[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_) **[**SIGN YOUR NAME >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-2sp6VVkH-)**
---

**We can 't believe what we're seeing.**

Texas Republicans and the far-right Supreme Court thought they could get away with their **OUTRAGEOUS** attack on reproductive health care.

But now Americans across the country are rising up and making their voices heard like **NEVER** before!

**A brand new poll is revealing that majorities of Americans OPPOSE Texas ' stunning abortion ban and its attacks on the right to choose.**

Here at Democratic HQ, we're prepared to help turn that outrage into action and elect Democrats who will **FIGHT** for reproductive rights across the country.

But we can't lead the way on this critical issue without knowing where our best grassroots supporters stand...

[**So****w****e need to know: Do you stand with Americans everywhere who OPPOSE Texas ' abortion ban?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_)

Thanks,

DCCC

Texas Republicans and the far-right Supreme Court thought they could get away with their OUTRAGEOUS attack on reproductive health care. But now Americans across the country are rising up and making their voices heard like NEVER before! A brand new poll is revealing that majorities of Americans OPPOSE Texas ' stunning abortion ban and its attacks on the right to choose. Here at Democratic HQ, we're prepared to help turn that outrage into action and elect Democrats who will FIGHT** for reproductive rights across the country. But we can't lead the way on this critical issue without knowing where our best grassroots supporters stand... Thanks, DCCC Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: John Castorani
subject: Destroying the bastards was my mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=1798c85e01284c7f9d65ad63b7bc7f55&_t=3G736U7VAw94QUKyoc-R9N-SirJQJA9LXFgNTLOen3msh5P-8iKKCmN6RT-N7lJcppSHLYseENGbwXJmW7cDzt1sUsbI4okx13EzvlfXXOpRxEM-dl_undDvQt8bT74XKpiWyjlfrPIuKptoc_QZ3tZEImunPAlfhGUv-XjgbJ4%3D) | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1798c85e01284c7f9d65ad63b7bc7f55&_e=t7s8iBq_6GefwOc0INRCX2M48wnGLfhlWSbzgZAIXgXLHpe8iVpIKIUioQPdWnKM6YWklQ4QbPFvfUaGsYfJBHFscNxkCrlClNCw7vueqQJl040k_D-Kj0LrZwnN5sYSXciqva5clYc-HwjWzPikU8KKI3xUbGQ4WFe1MY6uj3-5mo36PsrWWOWrOa0pYOKKHuM_V5d8tPNv1YYyAhoh3LJIgq67RC0-X0NJ3qWl40Dp1PD6TusSsXD9QbCaHLgr-gNCopNzyXgcmY1dSZ0P0IYzwt79bKtz9I-P6cz_zb0dOEdsvJVlWhc3Q28iK8DgxvFO7hEHteQto36a7mO7ZziYOgljML0A5i8-p3QkQEUUyowOXEgwvGXsVFHITvxemVoKKi3i0pFtntxst-uibRVt1jTyh83EUm8wJGEw4t8K2jMqhNpPgSj-VXhWHx11rQuG5zL6gBTwPBV1g-zpEz-thGHPf0C3MnsFljeMLoV0sZaV-vrpOVkuVCd0S0RL)
---

Peter,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1798c85e01284c7f9d65ad63b7bc7f55&_e=t7s8iBq_6GefwOc0INRCX2M48wnGLfhlWSbzgZAIXgXLHpe8iVpIKIUioQPdWnKM6YWklQ4QbPFvfUaGsYfJBHFscNxkCrlClNCw7vueqQJl040k_D-Kj0LrZwnN5sYSXciqva5clYc-HwjWzPikU8KKI3xUbGQ4WFe1MY6uj3-5mo36PsrWWOWrOa0pYOKKHuM_V5d8tPNv1YYyAhoh3LJIgq67RC0-X0NJ3qWl40Dp1PD6TusSsXD9QbCaHLgr-gNCopNzyXgcmY1dSZ0P0JpANE6NdIeVkrktCEk-tgY5OVxJ_p5bbJscj5NtM6wpX017C1EkwU6QDSFbRJPDPaV_-UEqYhigngHPx_pwsujcNEI-r8u04q2FZjN7-HFYYwP6ThIPBOFsZcxt9alkja0nSryXARiJgb19w1QL7-pQo4QfCIg8SiYqwMD_Qhz2IFIBIFQKoftkObGnXet3axRzX6WFCFUPsGAFFKr-4BwvIaZQqmtXuLPjBJPX8naP)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1798c85e01284c7f9d65ad63b7bc7f55&_e=t7s8iBq_6GefwOc0INRCX2M48wnGLfhlWSbzgZAIXgXLHpe8iVpIKIUioQPdWnKM6YWklQ4QbPFvfUaGsYfJBHFscNxkCrlClNCw7vueqQJl040k_D-Kj0LrZwnN5sYSXciqva5clYc-HwjWzPikU8KKI3xUbGQ4WFe1MY6uj3-5mo36PsrWWOWrOa0pYOKKHuM_V5d8tPNv1YYyAhoh3LJIgq67RC0-X0NJ3qWl40Dp1PD6TusSsXD9QbCaHLgr-gNCopNzyXgcmY1dSZ0P0PpcEJ22--FemX78gB4MCKPqgiBjM8j1nX_xjuWuqeidy7R52zuwOrmpcyOPaKDP-9EPD1DEV7lDO2V9HU7fAWvFwy8VDwGydZCch0LSMwXT9GAV-MMQUGvcqU90rXo2YaXxWjH3l55tA0y7VtAQqd4BifRLN2zafCt2zZ9EWyB106CBh1j_X24Wm76XZV4CbqGkOiKSAyIOTpP9dndmJKfLsgC9WIMJyET-gN6SzwZa)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1798c85e01284c7f9d65ad63b7bc7f55&_e=t7s8iBq_6GefwOc0INRCX2M48wnGLfhlWSbzgZAIXgXLHpe8iVpIKIUioQPdWnKM6YWklQ4QbPFvfUaGsYfJBHFscNxkCrlClNCw7vueqQJl040k_D-Kj0LrZwnN5sYSXciqva5clYc-HwjWzPikU8KKI3xUbGQ4WFe1MY6uj3-5mo36PsrWWOWrOa0pYOKKHuM_V5d8tPNv1YYyAhoh3LJIgq67RC0-X0NJ3qWl40Dp1PD6TusSsXD9QbCaHLgr-gNCopNzyXgcmY1dSZ0P0MCjiMY3yvELZUgCv03b_SZKuros6QAriyTV8lZrk8MDbP9zACQVnR-Tp6Z833ZlXqnvDLREShYaJuo1_BAZ83tiAR3xu6pGe_2eY9kJxANizampJD6TCXhuJ5U9ibbuBbxo4R1LEFsu6uwaE7opG4LQ4eCipnVo6-gV2tdpKDg8ZsaaRn4XxSD3eMfvURzeAPC9_IYLvnSI8iZLle-Tz3ALw_85yiba27nekadFKcBB)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1798c85e01284c7f9d65ad63b7bc7f55&_e=t7s8iBq_6GefwOc0INRCX2M48wnGLfhlWSbzgZAIXgXLHpe8iVpIKIUioQPdWnKM6YWklQ4QbPFvfUaGsYfJBHFscNxkCrlClNCw7vueqQJl040k_D-Kj0LrZwnN5sYSXciqva5clYc-HwjWzPikU8KKI3xUbGQ4WFe1MY6uj3-5mo36PsrWWOWrOa0pYOKKHuM_V5d8tPNv1YYyAhoh3LJIgq67RC0-X0NJ3qWl40Dp1PD6TusSsXD9QbCaHLgr-gNCopNzyXgcmY1dSZ0P0M_Q34PXYqwr60y7UGAHPQiq24M749NAHfXAm0m--VfdT004lJwLSrU1DoHiReWYRe2NKd7RW9-aBrWC1mQY79xm2m6Kz0yk8TFMQUbvbp_HEoAl0XWwkcBTetbWK5L2JiJRdVU7WDzg1DnRmJkX8t61CG294FDEJZOzAN3yMMQbYsoy3INUQ7yXqzR6Mj86s7Pfg95yaBKy8UU1L0LD7SdTwZNfcI_XpLoGRUlk9rhh)
---

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1798c85e01284c7f9d65ad63b7bc7f55&_e=t7s8iBq_6GefwOc0INRCX2M48wnGLfhlWSbzgZAIXgXLHpe8iVpIKIUioQPdWnKM6YWklQ4QbPFvfUaGsYfJBHFscNxkCrlClNCw7vueqQJl040k_D-Kj0LrZwnN5sYSXciqva5clYc-HwjWzPikU8KKI3xUbGQ4WFe1MY6uj3-5mo36PsrWWOWrOa0pYOKKHuM_V5d8tPNv1YYyAhoh3LJIgq67RC0-X0NJ3qWl40Dp1PD6TusSsXD9QbCaHLgr-gNCopNzyXgcmY1dSZ0P0N2QXFSiCpa7HD8HgSK8DuwX9BFR6nnL8QqMtHvtHesXQuQhvsG7J5RkYn0o4_zaWGd8R-fajMVlG6CaZaJUNcvclnzVG5fThoSSnJPnLsNNlkceOME832nJJHMZMFEt6go6m2SQCDndY5oJNsZn-01-ZEkeZtp0GEqSBPdu2ewCzYJa69dezFge5wJ9WnzagBOdlUlIKg7WrcjKQ7Y5vfmEVmzLLKfolBja3ZvF-w9M) **

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1798c85e01284c7f9d65ad63b7bc7f55&_e=t7s8iBq_6GefwOc0INRCX2M48wnGLfhlWSbzgZAIXgXLHpe8iVpIKIUioQPdWnKM6YWklQ4QbPFvfUaGsYfJBHFscNxkCrlClNCw7vueqQJl040k_D-Kj0LrZwnN5sYSXciqva5clYc-HwjWzPikU8KKI3xUbGQ4WFe1MY6uj3-5mo36PsrWWOWrOa0pYOKKHuM_V5d8tPNv1YYyAhoh3LJIgq67RC0-X0NJ3qWl40Dp1PD6TusSsXD9QbCaHLgr-gNCopNzyXgcmY1dSZ0P0CvhLv7qJwec6cgadH0DKPLCbURTevYsUcHIPx8DHHAVtJdoT0VBqqqEul23np4liZxO3bH9hKclB2nXo60A3P3DQIFfefg_nPKE0PqdhyfZdGG79_ZiVeOHJV5Kf4suqUVVWk2a4dZXNa43FSsjaQo7XjInecyWsOYnsiwpJz2vcFxN9JNJCQpfyybx47f4lsKW3NPYxMWm5t417PIyaZdoix44t3eELbr9h9B2gW0Q)
At the time of the Benghazi attacks, **Hillary Clinton** knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She **knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable**. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

**[Hillary Clinton’s deceptions and lies will forever stand to serve as prime examples of everything that is wrong in Washington. I’m running to hold these bureaucrats accountable and I hope you’ll help put some wind in my sails by donating $5, $10 or even $50 today](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1798c85e01284c7f9d65ad63b7bc7f55&_e=t7s8iBq_6GefwOc0INRCX2M48wnGLfhlWSbzgZAIXgXLHpe8iVpIKIUioQPdWnKM6YWklQ4QbPFvfUaGsYfJBHFscNxkCrlClNCw7vueqQJl040k_D-Kj0LrZwnN5sYSXciqva5clYc-HwjWzPikU8KKI3xUbGQ4WFe1MY6uj3-5mo36PsrWWOWrOa0pYOKKHuM_V5d8tPNv1YYyAhoh3LJIgq67RC0-X0NJ3qWl40Dp1PD6TusSsXD9QbCaHLgr-gNCopNzyXgcmY1dSZ0P0D6FtTDCogFRRRdc6FF9lpuxItFMAvDhNYZIym93CN-4tsiCfnqQYnMaDNP6TkP3VErs0TWavsJy0HK2RJFlS67dJvvwS6iIVolH9C-2COxggc815b7dRQmQhrdAwE9VkWRb6kDrvKiQEjHbWxRB4eNegSVcg8BZU31xcePoSyqJbcBNr4RTjinAdniErsaRV3h9eamq_EqgYyCqZVBFoXujdJRcrRjqMtMa_vCxnD65)**.

clean_body: September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Peter, My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today. I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own. Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency . I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price. If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable , and in a moment, You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel. This political assassination made my blood boil. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. We have to fight for it. | Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason At the time of the Benghazi attacks, Hillary Clinton knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally. . In service John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 P.S. I have no money to invest in this campaign. What I do have is a lot of pride , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can, | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia

body:

Friend,

You’ve heard the saying before: Judge a person by the company they keep.

While Scott Perry may be largely unknown by the country, his close friend Marjorie Taylor Greene is no stranger to any of us. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36257580/307566363/-1129432161?refcode=EM_FR_210922MTG_N_TE_120DA_7_NG_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWEwYTI1OC1lZTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMuV-m544kdehr7bXFrtPVbmf-XPCYHkODmphfy5c6w=) Marjorie Taylor Greene and Scott Perry are two peas in a pod, and they’re both wrong for our country and the people they represent. But here in Pennsylvania, we have the chance to defeat Scott Perry once and for all.

From his constant obstruction of every single bill -- including the bipartisan infrastructure legislation -- to his ties to the January 6 coup attempt, _**Rep. Perry is wrong for south central Pennsylvania, and he’s a danger to our nation.**_

We need someone who will get things done for us, not spend their time peddling conspiracy theories and insurrection. Scott Perry is more extreme, if not worse, than Marjorie Taylor Greene, Lauren Boebert, and Matt Gaetz -- but the good news is that we can flip this seat and defeat him.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Finchem calls for door-to-door voter verification
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Got to stop the fraud |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6f104f19b0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

**How far would you go to save America?**

That is the question which I have to ask myself every morning as this fight goes on longer.

_And the answer is I could never go far enough._

**My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Trump endorsed candidate for Secretary of State in Arizona and I am leading the vanguard in the fight for election integrity every day!**

And recently I made a difficult, but necessary call.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=302a743092&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **And I will tell you this, folks. It sickens me that there are Americans that are content to let Democracy slide down the tubes and do nothing about it.**

As a result of the recent grassroots survey which found that there were countless voter irregularities and people who voted whose votes were thrown out, it is absolutely necessary to do a state-wide door-to-door voter verification.

**But there are more than 4.3 million registered voters in Arizona. And I have heard people say “that’s too much” and “how can we verify all of that?”**

_We sent Americans to the moon with a ruler and pencil and paper. I think we can pull this off. The only question is this: Will we let America’s democracy be destroyed because we are too apathetic to put in the work?_

**Never. I have been working tirelessly from the beginning to make sure that voter integrity is protected, and I won’t stop now!**

How far would you go to save America’s elections? Can you help us in this huge but necessary endeavor?

**_[We are up against a very tight deadline for the end of the quarter and we need to raise $48,000. Donate today to help us in this project of historic proportions! Pitch in with $25, $50, $100, or $500!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=79a1250188&e=44b8c466b0)_**

If we let ourselves become apathetic and not commit to doing the work, then the Democrats win.

_They made a bet that Republicans would not put in the work to prove that there is election fraud. And if we back down now they will be proven right._

**_And we cannot let that happen!_**

[We are up against a tight fundraising deadline. We are facing legal challenges left and right, we are having to fight back forces that want to silence us – manipulate us.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6d1e7fd849&e=44b8c466b0)

**And to do that we need urgent funding. Every dollar that you give is a statement against the Radical Left that is hoping and praying that you do nothing.**

_The Left wins when the Right stays silent. And we MUST speak up. It is not just a duty to ourselves, it is a duty to our children, our grandchildren._

_I will never let that happen, as long as I’m breathing. Because I’m proud to be an American, and there are men and women who have died to protect our right to vote._

**I can at least dedicate my time and money. We have to. For ourselves, for our families, for America.**

[Will you help me reach our urgent fundraising deadline of $75,000 by the end of the month? I am still $55k short.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9228ce8886&e=44b8c466b0)

[With your help we can fight back. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=60ecb5b1bc&e=44b8c466b0) With your voice, we can be heard. With your dollars we can finally fight back against the Corrupt Leftist Machine that has been running this state’s elections.

**Let’s take back our elections. Let’s take back Arizona.**
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5f07db1f58&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=731dc47658&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. President Trump just endorsed my campaign. We must raise what is needed to defeat the corrupt Democrats. I have to raise $75k by the end of this month to meet my fundraising numbers. [Will you contribute $15, $35, $100 or more to help me get there?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=63242f3776&e=44b8c466b0) Every amount helps!

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=6807631dee) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=6807631dee).

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36258389/307578859/72349127?refcode=jqq_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDY2YjQ3MS1mMDFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dcY9hqp_VxznDIGJyn4jRoTkr2bcEI8nBcsLLqsYuok=)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36258390/307578860/996716346?contactdata=Jqf81ONiLEBaSxBGscW%2BvWnxolXWm09hA9%2FMKko5QTdIqbWUuW5FIFj9VYOcwUEPy9he%2Bw7wA1goshWaiz6ffAZaJ6vo%2Bn15c7J7WC%2Fu2tUFNKAhLw8MzA%2FSpysxcsEYosTIkL4AgDBlzXxfmlpBFw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDY2YjQ3MS1mMDFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dcY9hqp_VxznDIGJyn4jRoTkr2bcEI8nBcsLLqsYuok=&emci=2a60a4e7-0b1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=a066b471-f01b-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=14505483) The evidence is overwhelming. Climate change is real — and two-thirds of all Americans agree that our Congressional leaders aren’t doing enough to combat this ongoing crisis. | | | [ADD YOUR NAME: Demand action to combat climate change »](https://secure.ngpvan.com/uRs24lbHeU29ZfUWH0gvrw2?contactdata=Jqf81ONiLEBaSxBGscW%2BvWnxolXWm09hA9%2FMKko5QTdIqbWUuW5FIFj9VYOcwUEPy9he%2Bw7wA1goshWaiz6ffAZaJ6vo%2Bn15c7J7WC%2Fu2tUFNKAhLw8MzA%2FSpysxcsEYosTIkL4AgDBlzXxfmlpBFw%3D%3D)
---
To no one’s surprise, Mike Garcia's views don’t align with the majority of the American public. He continues to deny the undeniable, going as far as to call climate change a “political fabrication.”
But this isn’t politics. This is science — and we can’t afford to ignore the facts any longer.
**[So please, join our campaign in demanding Mike Garcia and other climate-denying Republicans take legislative action to fight this ongoing crisis before it’s too late. We’re facing an existential threat, and we need to put pressure on our Congressional leaders to take action NOW!](https://secure.ngpvan.com/uRs24lbHeU29ZfUWH0gvrw2?contactdata=Jqf81ONiLEBaSxBGscW%2BvWnxolXWm09hA9%2FMKko5QTdIqbWUuW5FIFj9VYOcwUEPy9he%2Bw7wA1goshWaiz6ffAZaJ6vo%2Bn15c7J7WC%2Fu2tUFNKAhLw8MzA%2FSpysxcsEYosTIkL4AgDBlzXxfmlpBFw%3D%3D)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME: Demand action to combat climate change »](https://secure.ngpvan.com/uRs24lbHeU29ZfUWH0gvrw2?contactdata=Jqf81ONiLEBaSxBGscW%2BvWnxolXWm09hA9%2FMKko5QTdIqbWUuW5FIFj9VYOcwUEPy9he%2Bw7wA1goshWaiz6ffAZaJ6vo%2Bn15c7J7WC%2Fu2tUFNKAhLw8MzA%2FSpysxcsEYosTIkL4AgDBlzXxfmlpBFw%3D%3D)
---
Nearly 1 in 3 Americans experienced a weather disaster this summer. Fires and droughts continue to ravage our state on a daily basis, and floods and extreme heat have displaced families and upended small businesses all across the U.S.
Mike Garcia doesn’t care. He’s earned a dismal lifetime rating of just 21% from the League of Conservation Voters — meaning **Mike Garcia has voted against protecting our environment nearly 80 percent of the time.**
Unlike Mike Garcia, Quaye understands the magnitude of the crisis we’re facing. We must transition to a clean energy economy, revitalize our infrastructure to run off renewable energy, end subsidies to the fossil fuel industry, and so much more!
**[In order to save our planet for our kids and our grandkids, we have to put pressure on Congressional leaders NOW. Kyrsten Sinema threatened President Biden's American Jobs Plan and American Families Plan. By senselessly playing hardball about the House's voting calendar, Sinema would tank both bills NEXT WEEK \-- and then Americans will blame Democrats for getting nothing done. By senselessly playing hardball about the House's voting calendar, Sinema would tank both bills NEXT WEEK \-- and then Americans will blame Democrats for getting nothing done. That means we will lose next year's crucial midterm elections, and Joe Biden will falsely go down as a do-nothing president. = | = The American people need to know that Democrats can deliver. Sinema has signaled willingness to negotiate, but she won't budge without significant grassroots pressure. That's why we're turning up the heat in Sinema's home state of Arizona: to prove reconciliation is a top priority, and that Democrats will fight it to protect it. Will you help us win over Sinema and secure our progressive agenda's future? = = = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = It's thanks to you that we have two revolutionary bills worth protecting, Peter. We are so grateful that you care enough to step up. THANK YOU. THANK YOU. name: Donna Imam
subject: Prescription drugs.
body:
Right now, a handful of Democrats in Congress and the entire GOP is holding up the ability for Medicare to negotiate drug prices with pharmaceutical companies. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36258949/307580471/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTI5ZmYzYS1mMTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=erFFel6gqs_hT8-Zz77-pxyr55UY7qF9NV6ESzmBvMw=)
**POLITICO: Sinema tells White House she's opposed to current prescription drug plan**
Friend -- In a moment I'm going to ask you to chip in $3 toward our end-of-quarter goal. But first, let me tell you about something that's really infuriating about prescription drug prices in the United States.

Right now our government can not negotiate the price of drugs in Medicare Part D. This is completely illogical and President Biden wants to change that.

Yet a few Democrats, and the entire GOP, are holding up the ability for Medicare to negotiate drug prices with pharmaceutical companies.

Prescription drugs sold in the United States are massively marked up. We pay ten to twenty times the price people in other countries pay for the same exact drugs.

As Americans, we not only subsidize the research and development of these drugs, **_we subsidize the cost of prescription drugs for the entire world._** We only need to look to Canada to see this. Yet we are punished with higher prices because of Big Pharma's grip on Washington and their lobbying efforts around drug pricing.

The United States needs to hold Big Pharma accountable. The good news is President Biden wants to do just that with the Build Back Better Act. Under Biden's plan, the US government would be able to negotiate lower drug prices for Medicare. Predictably, Big Pharma is fighting this tooth and nail, and they just launched a seven-figure ad campaign to block it.

We can't continue putting the lives of millions of Americans at risk for profit, and it's clearly not enough to just elect Democrats. We need reliable voices for working families in Congress. I'll be that voice, but I need your help getting there:

[**We're coming up $7,191 short of where we need to be today to meet the mark on our upcoming FEC end-of-quarter goal. Will you chip in $3 before 11:59 pm to help us close the gap and prepare our best report yet? Any amount helps.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36258950/307580472/77586780?refcode=em-92221-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTI5ZmYzYS1mMTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=erFFel6gqs_hT8-Zz77-pxyr55UY7qF9NV6ESzmBvMw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36258951/307580473/77586780?refcode=em-92221-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTI5ZmYzYS1mMTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=erFFel6gqs_hT8-Zz77-pxyr55UY7qF9NV6ESzmBvMw=)

name: Ras Smith
subject: Kim Reynolds and Donald Trump.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
At the height of the COVID-19 pandemic, Kim Reynolds praised Trump for "helping Iowans." | Remember this, friend?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36258927/307580389/975127612?refcode=em-92221-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzFmODkyYi1mMTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyViipWvUr5v_2o4GcyHDG4QVWQnUtQrDGYP5SnVW_c=)
_Gov. Reynolds praises Trump for helping Iowans. (Photo credit: Evan Vucci)_
It wasn't too long ago that near the height of the COVID-19 pandemic, **Kim Reynolds praised Trump for "helping Iowans."**

6,401 Iowans have died from COVID, partially because Trump denied the science and undermined our pandemic response.

Reynold's comments don't sit right with me, and with Trump coming to Iowa in just a few weeks (possibly to announce his 2024 bid), now is the perfect time to push back.

[**If you're fired up and ready to show Trump the strength of our movement before he comes to town, will you chip in $5 today? Here's what's at stake:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36258928/307580390/975127612?refcode=em-92221-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzFmODkyYi1mMTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyViipWvUr5v_2o4GcyHDG4QVWQnUtQrDGYP5SnVW_c=)
**• Working families struggle to make ends meet:** We need to fight for $50,000 a year -- not just $15 an hour -- so Iowans can start looking beyond the next paycheck and plan for the next generation.

**• Family farmers are less likely to pass down the farm to the next generation:** We can invest in climate solutions that steward our land and farms for future generations.

**• Our kids and grandchildren aren't receiving the education they deserve:** Public schools used to be the backbone of our communities, and the best in the country. We need to put our kids first, and get our public schools back to #1 in the nation.
I know we can do better.

Reynolds and Trump have both proved that their COVID-19 pandemic response -- not to mention the hate and division they stoke -- are not right for all Iowans. That's why I'm running for governor.

[**Please chip in today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36258929/307580391/975127612?refcode=em-92221-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzFmODkyYi1mMTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyViipWvUr5v_2o4GcyHDG4QVWQnUtQrDGYP5SnVW_c=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36258930/307580392/975127612?refcode=em-92221-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzFmODkyYi1mMTFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyViipWvUr5v_2o4GcyHDG4QVWQnUtQrDGYP5SnVW_c=)

clean_body: At the height of the COVID-19 pandemic, Kim Reynolds praised Trump for "helping Iowans." | Remember this, friend? = Gov. Reynolds praises Trump for helping Iowans. (Photo credit: Evan Vucci) It wasn't too long ago that near the height of the COVID-19 pandemic, Kim Reynolds praised Trump for "helping Iowans." 6,401 Iowans have died from COVID, partially because Trump denied the science and undermined our pandemic response. Reynold's comments don't sit right with me, and with Trump coming to Iowa in just a few weeks (possibly to announce his 2024 bid), now is the perfect time to push back. = • Working families struggle to make ends meet: We need to fight for $50,000 a year -- not just $15 an hour -- so Iowans can start looking beyond the next paycheck and plan for the next generation. • Family farmers are less likely to pass down the farm to the next generation: We can invest in climate solutions that steward our land and farms for future generations. • Our kids and grandchildren aren't receiving the education they deserve: Public schools used to be the backbone of our communities, and the best in the country. We need to put our kids first, and get our public schools back to #1 in the nation. I know we can do better. Reynolds and Trump have both proved that their COVID-19 pandemic response -- not to mention the hate and division they stoke -- are not right for all Iowans. That's why I'm running for governor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks in advance, Ras Smith Democrat for Governor = | | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. Derek — this isn’t the news we were hoping to share, especially after the amazing month we just had, but Common Good VA said we could reach out because you might want to see this. CNN released an article titled **"The 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022"** ... and we are on the list. Here’s a paragraph from the article on our race: _“Republicans are no longer without candidates to take on Democratic Sen. Mark Kelly, who is running for a full six-year term after winning last fall.”_ We made Arizona history when we won in 2020, but now Mark needs your help to hold this seat and fend off attacks from National Republicans. This is not the list we wanted to be on as we head into the election next year. So we’re reaching out for your help to raise $10,000 today in response to this news so we can stay ahead of the Republicans who want to defeat us. **** [**This is where you come in, Derek: if you are able, will you split a $15 donation between our people-powered campaign and Common Good? Articles like this make us a top target of Mitch McConnell and we need your help to prepare for the next wave of attack ads.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FkBhLIpUUFGxmqmP86UhXgO1tefnlwPrQpzsyyJy1qwu5aDZqOjXJTqD65Dr9NRKEDUJhCe5QMUisugRp8Q3WQhV1KXJJSesArrvNnuv8Gbm_HEd9l3BMgxJWeKH12EW19zea1HzNa34c7lJh-DAmKcJVuW3OKRNDWz-EhXaD4Eyes4Ec2ZlNomdv8f9Zonj0_ZitX1qN7iWNYTqJ2fvwZa4Mj9zSXS4mN9SrwY_md8hEov_Jq8g-jD63DnJ3nOkcJa_kXXe0OsxbMH0o-xGmQKAKKoo0uIeJlMS14JKxtjD/3fj/4Z4x6yQCT-GXKZgN_FKDYg/h1/NxY_CV-Ien3X3FzPQ3qQC9yuxp4oSjCe0nHTuPLfAko) You can bet that reports like this will only increase the attacks against us by National Republicans because they know if they can flip this seat they can take back the Senate. However, we know that with your help we can run another successful campaign in 2022 and hold this Arizona seat. So thank you in advance for pitching in and for having Mark’s back. Team Kelly

Friends,

_My phone has been ringing off the hook._

Joe Biden’s vaccine mandate on essentially all American businesses is wholly unconstitutional, illegal, and an attack on the free will of millions of Americans.

This mandate is adding salt on the wound to businesses in Indiana and across the nation that are JUST getting back on their feet.

Small businesses are the backbone of our country and what make America so GREAT.

**But in order to keep it this way, we MUST Take Back the Senate. The future of our nation boils down to this.**

| Hey Friend, In 2016 I was honored to help lead Jefferson County and the Colorado Trump Campaign for President Donald J. Trump. Now 6 years later, I am still fighting on the front lines of the America First Movement.
In just 4 short days, I will be attending a fundraiser for my mom, Laurel Imer at the Dunafon Castle in Idledale, CO. Joining me at this event will be my friends, Pinal County Sheriff Mark Lamb, Former Congressman from CO-06 Tom Tancredo, and Dr. Kelli Ward the Chairwoman of the Arizona GOP.
As you may have heard, the Arizona Audit results will be released on Friday for all the world to finally see. Then on Sunday, we will be joined by Dr. Kelli Ward, the Chair of the Arizona GOP where she will be telling you all about the audit at our fundraiser.
Ticket sales for The America First Fundraiser end on Saturday at 5:00 PM. So to ensure you are able to attend this event get your tickets now. Please note this event WILL NOT be live-streamed or broadcast for you to see, so the only way to attend this event is by purchasing a ticket today.
There are less than 15 tickets left for this event, so get your ticket to secure your spot now before time runs out.

subject: FINAL REMINDER
body:
Last Chance to Confirm [](https://) Peter, While every other campaign in the state is still building their team, Jane Timken and her grassroots supporters on the ground have been effectively operating for months now, launching her into the lead in endorsements, Ohio donors, and voter contacts. While our opposition scrambles to create more than a twitter profile, her supporters have been changing the race. Be there with Jane and her team this Saturday for a meet and greet on September 25th as we celebrate our **500,000th** voter contact before anyone else in Ohio talks to a single voter. Jane will be making 3 stops on Saturday: _**Columbus @ 9:30AM**_ Timken HQ, 921 Chatham Ln, Columbus, OH 43221 _**Athens @ 11:30AM**_ Copeland Hall, Copeland Room 107, 67 Court St. Athens OH 45701 **_Cincinnati @ 3:00PM_** Blue Rock Park, 3010 Blue Rock Rd, Cincinnati, OH 45239 Click the button below to sign up. name: Tony Vargas
subject: Here’s what’s on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
Everyone is going to be watching...

|
---

| | I wish I didn't have to ask.

[**_But I’m closing in on my very first public fundraising deadline -- and I’m running behind. I’m going to explain why hitting my goal is so important and why I need 531 donations to do it. If you’re short on time, will you chip in $15 before you sign off? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36259496/307582141/1129282168?refcode=20210922_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2IyZGIzOC1mMzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZoQmuBkUK3rDBR_xP3ppJ4xnYEkWqmwBEHKaWQcOqrU=)

A lot is on the line this month.

My first FEC deadline is rapidly approaching.

That means my fundraising numbers will be public for the very first time.

Everyone is going to be watching to see how strong my campaign is.

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36259666/307582481/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDIzMmRlYS1mMzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7rJR3eVy6EHo-BAHS-1HxT_8eh6qVNmpu54mOBi6pDY=&emci=6db0ae52-d11b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=94232dea-f31b-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=12898431)

Friend,
Did you know that women make up more than half of the U.S. population _but only 28% of the 117th Congress? _By the time U.S. women are 44 years old, 86% are mothers, yet _only 6% of Representatives are moms of children under 18 years of age._
**We need more women and more moms in Congress** to give voice to the issues that matter to everyday working moms and families, and to provide an example for the next generation of moms. That's why we're so excited that Kirsten has been endorsed by Vote Mama, an organization dedicated to increasing the political power of Democratic moms!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36259667/307582482/558373307?refcode= X_092221_VoteMamaEndorsement&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDIzMmRlYS1mMzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7rJR3eVy6EHo-BAHS-1HxT_8eh6qVNmpu54mOBi6pDY=)
---
Like so many Arizonans, Kirsten knows what it’s like to balance working full-time and parenting. And as the mom of a teenage daughter, Kirsten knows the importance of strong female role models willing to stand up for what they believe in.
Running and serving in office on top of that provides even more unique challenges, but it’s also incredibly rewarding. As a woman and the mom of a teenage daughter, Kirsten knows the importance of strong female role models willing to stand up for what they believe in.
[**Will you take a moment to chip in and help bring one more hard-working mom to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36259668/307582483/558373307?refcode= X_092221_VoteMamaEndorsement&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDIzMmRlYS1mMzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7rJR3eVy6EHo-BAHS-1HxT_8eh6qVNmpu54mOBi6pDY=)

As a woman and the mom of a teenage daughter, Kirsten knows the importance of strong female role models willing to stand up for what they believe in. = X092221VoteMamaEndorsement&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDIzMmRlYS1mMzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7rJR3eVy6EHo-BAHS-1HxT8eh6qVNmpu54mOBi6pDY= = X092221VoteMamaEndorsement&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDIzMmRlYS1mMzFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7rJR3eVy6EHo-BAHS-1HxT8eh6qVNmpu54mOBi6pDY= = Thank you, Team Engel Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.

name: Marc Molinaro
subject: America is worth fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US
body:
Our nation is worth fighting for, and I need your help.
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9daa5801f31044eba08f4aed9e8c2c00&_e=eJtmKFMOxNVQ18Ysf4mb8T42vUMJcUCffaTyzMQSS3RqFq6tsldL2_RuccI5iJAin8lmQmOkLVqhf1B20lq_fXvF7aFFyM3ISxwtQubkAmCIsCxTpoMC4HO1oFCuN-lK419KdPI-BQq_liIl6-fvcKw1_uXXTR86lGQeAXNyJ88ZFIeW-kHP6OHw102SxD4eDPYsTnauU1pPCtLyQgZ5DrBMlGwo-UcmsiXwcP_RSsfuOemjBAfY2itr6v_ijh1za0B7OcvWYK_uuBP7rtAmJL7y3egvdI4EMqURunYQwMkXMs9e01xrofo-JZNJd_ab9xQZzyDBfNIXHLDIPaEtXFs8-j-hU98zaU1McNZJyrOlRBZk5Xi2gXFQOet88D_YwkALkH2qB7ma54AJ2UREmuoOtwdoJlM0wQw8H8OkE3lv2TJ82-ES-5zzuJYO2XomBCsEISk0W-rqYIkaijyphQ%3D%3D)

---
| **Do you agree that America is worth fighting for?** I’m asking because I believe our nation is worth every effort possible to ensure it continues to be a beacon of hope for every single one of us, not just the privileged few.

If you agree with that then you’ll agree that we don’t need Congressmembers who are over-promising and never following through; [**we need action.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9daa5801f31044eba08f4aed9e8c2c00&_e=eJtmKFMOxNVQ18Ysf4mb8T42vUMJcUCffaTyzMQSS3RqFq6tsldL2_RuccI5iJAin8lmQmOkLVqhf1B20lq_fXvF7aFFyM3ISxwtQubkAmCIsCxTpoMC4HO1oFCuN-lK419KdPI-BQq_liIl6-fvcKw1_uXXTR86lGQeAXNyJ88ZFIeW-kHP6OHw102SxD4eDPYsTnauU1pPCtLyQgZ5DrBMlGwo-UcmsiXwcP_RSsfuOemjBAfY2itr6v_ijh1zlZssHD9o49wRK-hDVUcj9muXQUSdteilq06UMDCkoEebp80lBwedNedkuyPnzfA3SF3Dv-Kjr8FhSiqwRHM6MKFYpVEjMaDgujIDB6-CiBF74_SlTzAPhSjLA2Sa-JkCGME2SFReN9Uch4ezN1i9ZiRNEJpJ4X-Ra-wS7tmIeEVxhNd_o1XJ8xRQJVqQAEWkTNShTNtBbhDtLTTVUoZlkg%3D%3D) **That’s why I’m running for Congress and why I need your help to fight for the America we both know and love.**

I’m talking about fighting for the future of our communities, the well-being of our neighbors, and to help New York and America rebound so we can solidify the great promise of this nation: _**life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.**_

This campaign is for your children and mine; for the workers who have struggled like never before to maintain the American dream; for the small business owners and farmers whose ambitions and livelihoods have been ravaged; for those who have been marginalized, left out, and relegated to the sidelines for too long. [**This is a fight for a better tomorrow where every American can live, work, and raise a family.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9daa5801f31044eba08f4aed9e8c2c00&_e=eJtmKFMOxNVQ18Ysf4mb8T42vUMJcUCffaTyzMQSS3RqFq6tsldL2_RuccI5iJAin8lmQmOkLVqhf1B20lq_fXvF7aFFyM3ISxwtQubkAmCIsCxTpoMC4HO1oFCuN-lK419KdPI-BQq_liIl6-fvcKw1_uXXTR86lGQeAXNyJ88ZFIeW-kHP6OHw102SxD4eDPYsTnauU1pPCtLyQgZ5DrBMlGwo-UcmsiXwcP_RSsfuOemjBAfY2itr6v_ijh1zrdtcqK31OfeaBEK4OjNuqqM0mYxbT33u2MJTJPM1Whw-sM7qx6eph0pbf54oCOxO4__HW9GCvvUUFvnHvtGdCI5aFhSfh_oluvW5G7IeivjrTQcwiYAqYr1oqCaoHehe_m8ZcsLL31q76SmanmE_fGmCIbFjUTCs9LddVzvjAdaS11Yr_k0hNPLwr66zmF9fVc9wp8qVfI9ns1J2G_Tilg%3D%3D)

If a brighter future with solutions instead of empty promises is something you want, then I need your help [**to fight for an America that we can all be proud of.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9daa5801f31044eba08f4aed9e8c2c00&_e=eJtmKFMOxNVQ18Ysf4mb8T42vUMJcUCffaTyzMQSS3RqFq6tsldL2_RuccI5iJAin8lmQmOkLVqhf1B20lq_fXvF7aFFyM3ISxwtQubkAmCIsCxTpoMC4HO1oFCuN-lK419KdPI-BQq_liIl6-fvcKw1_uXXTR86lGQeAXNyJ88ZFIeW-kHP6OHw102SxD4eDPYsTnauU1pPCtLyQgZ5DrBMlGwo-UcmsiXwcP_RSsfuOemjBAfY2itr6v_ijh1zIKi5QJp__DjdTAS6-tTmqzeQ42GBh8OTxEiIhAHkDiaFuUCP7usHUQf7dTzmfTCEQ1cyF2o6QVmOGS00pSd6VG28zl63obAOrtU0axKT8aEqNY95E8pf_R8zYiReauVQBDD7jy0rTJh08riBb8yQMmCcbS8lWi0gL5qoVvW-6kpFfLqW2TYF1wINwLkpmMfUkQWC08iTr0hcmTgp4yheFw%3D%3D) This is a key race, so if you’re serious about bettering this nation then please join me so we can finally get things done.

**Together we can make a difference, but only if we fight for it.**

Thank you and God bless,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9daa5801f31044eba08f4aed9e8c2c00&_e=eJtmKFMOxNVQ18Ysf4mb8T42vUMJcUCffaTyzMQSS3RqFq6tsldL2_RuccI5iJAin8lmQmOkLVqhf1B20lq_fXvF7aFFyM3ISxwtQubkAmCIsCxTpoMC4HO1oFCuN-lK419KdPI-BQq_liIl6-fvcKw1_uXXTR86lGQeAXNyJ88ZFIeW-kHP6OHw102SxD4eDPYsTnauU1pPCtLyQgZ5DrBMlGwo-UcmsiXwcP_RSsfuOemjBAfY2itr6v_ijh1zWUpFw5DE1Xi0zgK4puR4bsWeHziE7-4tmLslPDQGBvSFbpWZd3zqTkZ0mYJfI5pOYnywKM1dXX05F5QjWeN-Lg7Q2tbsetuPLDZgMaX38DTUBP4dmikp-4dDb3TRIA4hmEbD8AE6Z_nz6atHj2kCGPj_bKVbzxsp9-1nHd3JIR2OGqRpK86Mw6intbykvdWJ8GPG4jkAfKa8KRoK4ZbF1g%3D%3D)
**Marc Molinaro**
Candidate
New York’s 19th Congressional District

[** TAKE ACTION TODAY AND STAND WITH MARC MOLINARO FOR CONGRESS **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9daa5801f31044eba08f4aed9e8c2c00&_e=eJtmKFMOxNVQ18Ysf4mb8T42vUMJcUCffaTyzMQSS3RqFq6tsldL2_RuccI5iJAin8lmQmOkLVqhf1B20lq_fXvF7aFFyM3ISxwtQubkAmCIsCxTpoMC4HO1oFCuN-lK419KdPI-BQq_liIl6-fvcKw1_uXXTR86lGQeAXNyJ88ZFIeW-kHP6OHw102SxD4eDPYsTnauU1pPCtLyQgZ5DrBMlGwo-UcmsiXwcP_RSsfuOemjBAfY2itr6v_ijh1z0E1aJVv-HewJPOizifAMRNrE3qhtUAL6B-WEuznX5QQlY-C-tMeT3GpFkEk5EMM6RPOQyELlhrOSz1H1s3tT6B4VhOw0RXnamb1xtV5-0FjYy_QHGme_5Mg12izmRecWCBlJKKXHUMLzMKhzdsW9q4XAHQOyrJ6HCxdW-yWgk3_LQp-Tasq8wV1weaE6znifZnu-REMJV1zKskCXqQGiRA%3D%3D)

name: Alex Padilla
subject: We must eliminate the filibuster immediately
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Ending the filibuster in the Senate is the best shot Democrats have to deliver on our bold progressive agenda.
#

The American people elected us to solve the problems facing our country. That’s why, every day, I’m working to reform our broken immigration system, make healthcare universal through Medicare for All, and fight climate change by passing a Green New Deal.
And that’s why we MUST pass the Freedom to Vote Act. When voting rights come under attack, all other rights are in danger. The will of the people is the ultimate check on power, and is the foundation of our democracy. Without it, we have nothing.
This bill is our chance to pass sweeping protections to our democracy, to safeguard the right to vote, end gerrymandering, and push back against the influence of big money in politics.
But Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans have made it clear that they’ll govern from the minority by using the filibuster to prevent us from passing any major legislation that will help move us forward — on voting rights or any other issue.
**That’s why I’m more convinced than ever before that we need to eliminate the filibuster immediately.**
Ending the filibuster in the Senate is the best shot Democrats have to deliver on our bold progressive agenda. I refuse to let Republicans block our progress. But I can’t do it alone.
[**So today I’m humbly asking you to make a $5 contribution to my Senate campaign. We’ve got so much work to do to eliminate the filibuster and pass the Freedom to Vote Act, and your support today will send a powerful message that we will succeed no matter what.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210922-1-15&t=1&refcode2=337_159979_R_KYRg&akid=337%2E159979%2ER_KYRg)
It’s crucial that we have the resources to defend our Senate majority and keep Mitch McConnell out of power indefinitely.
Thank you for your ongoing support, it means so much.
\- Alex Padilla
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210922-1-15&t=2&refcode2=337_159979_R_KYRg&akid=337%2E159979%2ER_KYRg)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=337%2E159979%2ER_KYRg)

name: American Update
subject: Help us fight socialism
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8700%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=kPaF%2bmrtAp%2fXsLbG7ynJlg&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04800%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lKrlRS52GKfasKj9q8hn5g&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04801%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8dVeyzzSkSsjPaiPc4TFBQ&sysid=1)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04802%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bt%2bCpmwL5oJZMb%2bmdV02pg&sysid=1)
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8700%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=kPaF%2bmrtAp%2fXsLbG7ynJlg&sysid=1)_

**Listen, Peter:** This race is the difference between keeping our blue Senate and LOSING EVERYTHING.

**The Democrat opposition is rising up to stop our momentum in my Nevada race. They know we have a REAL shot at flipping this seat and they are allocating a huge chunk of their resources towards defeating me.**

**This race is bigger than just Nevada** , Fellow Conservative. This could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career.

Over the last couple of months, I’ve seen a groundswell of support from every corner of the country. From Republican leaders in Washington D.C., to folks in Nevada’s 3rd district, to more than 5,000 conservatives who have made a contribution to help me flip this critical seat. **But this alone will not defeat the Democrat Machine, I need a united conservative movement behind my campaign.**

**[I am hoping to find 550 more conservatives to join my growing team and offer their personal endorsement before midnight tonight. Can I count you in?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=371365feb470436f8d2e82d3fef4d101&_e=v2L2G-RAiqomyEflPl8aF2jmDs3kSW8hBbufOQ-hzAcWIAAjrf2_wxShS9vozyx58N9OLQa5G_GgAPmoa57CKnuZhvaPajUkSm8ULrjHua4oEvn_A4mWwwUMIW7AVoyrTGuOPA6clbEqFmjKvqGYG35U5-OaGVB0wGNJkpuq07QNR-zhgSFevpOy23kfgkIEp5OViP43-Q1PjqRwff8fPKrFk1uxx5RLXTARm9o9QTwBhzbOU3NFMuzFQxfVQHvz7Px1xhjGi2bi-dJgYGjTvplvLzVpcvTV7w8O-6mUmIJgd7_yow1f_rekbwqWtsW3SFQMlch46CWJmcq2EPrL3xjJAmlaFaZsloVvRex30yfthCUlVk7BI_tFocusmpnVP0QK8qj13JlgluzPJ1sFqa_n7x-jItaNXfe9i1OAEfz7BoyCtORUjElGJTS2VCPfnwmBsV8cI3h-pGFmsY2l0U82-tH7HgVjt2zQsBOtjdzLZ8sqy0BWS5HYnmKwLwRnKSVHzazk5lgxMpEsWKU2VLsI_-Sa-o1ZbcJ9VhAewu42q8vjYfreVCoNAf2AMLhG7RAQTiBh1lJQod7yW-uu69Xprd42QhgSj3-c-4MqA8xeWdjfQCtKgYll5duju17E)**

This could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington This display proves once again that Democrats will never put Americans FIRST. They want to lock you down again while they party together through the night. They use their status and impalpable power to do as they please while forcing everyday citizens to live under their rules. | Fellow Conservative - I’m not asking for money, just your endorsement before midnight! Nevada's Third Congressional District is the Republicans’ best pick-up opportunity in the nation. I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Which brings me to why I'm emailing you today: The Democrat opposition is rising up to stop our momentum in my Nevada race. They know we have a REAL shot at flipping this seat and they are allocating a huge chunk of their resources towards defeating me. This race is bigger than just Nevada , Fellow Conservative. This could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career. Over the last couple of months, I’ve seen a groundswell of support from every corner of the country. From Republican leaders in Washington D.C., to folks in Nevada’s 3rd district, to more than 5,000 conservatives who have made a contribution to help me flip this critical seat. But this alone will not defeat the Democrat Machine, I need a united conservative movement behind my campaign. I will continue doing my part to fight back against the radical Left and take back the House, but this fight comes at a cost and I need to know that you will have my back. I appreciate your support – no matter where you live. We will all benefit from tossing Nancy Pelosi and her cronies to the curb. Thank you, April Becker Republican for Congress (NV-03) | April Becker is a true Nevada success story. As a working mom with young children, April put herself through college and law school at UNLV. April is the owner of April Becker & Associates law firm and is a top-rated litigator and real estate attorney in Las Vegas.
