name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Want to join our team? Become a County Captain today!
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YkiXrsA8lYEUAqQwNu1O9NmT1QkBWkfeWr6SRI8ReIdjHtDqQqk3Q53ZjGbRRh-uIzArVcm3FCHHq-mkOAxBtvyRYsCsyInldYiq4P_ReCb-2xz5X4pkCos5XxoZN0Bvfs8Fa6ZONJG2psx7GYa0GPY18LRDuHD24mrJeUZ75qgM89bdpFsj0g==&c=X38Z89nuULsZet-nmcu3LAEq3ZPiusMc4oUuLtwJvG8QrR0cqtvoIg==&ch=AEt-P4atZn5HeTZE3nwIrf99UGHY_UMr70p3AxB6lZHX_tViYG0EdA==)
---
| Peter,
As my campaign grows, dedicated supporters like yourself will be the key to success for our grassroots movement. We are looking for volunteers to become County Captains!
Team Gibbons County Captains will serve a vital role on the campaign by helping to represent Mike in their local communities. Captains will assist the campaign team with everything from event management to grassroots campaigning and even social media.
Please contact Emily Hottinger at ehottinger@gibbonsforohio.com if you are interested in joining #TeamGibbons as a County Captain.

*** We are continuing on our 88 county tour and we are almost halfway there! I have traveled to each corner of the state and have visited 41 counties as of this week.
---
|
---
| Over the past seven days we made stops in Jackson, Licking, Mahoning, and Pike counties, as well as re-visiting Hamilton and Franklin, among others.

---
|
---
|
---
|
*** Also, in case you missed it, my campaign released its third ad last Friday titled "Kneel."
WATCH: ["Kneel" ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YkiXrsA8lYEUAqQwNu1O9NmT1QkBWkfeWr6SRI8ReIdjHtDqQqk3QxTrW6jbpF_blLtCerGfaSm-hvPgJBtoBz5npeJsfnZfy5XUoUOfRaJyxx-cQgG3pf5IENh7RnOyeS1p0ij55JkSiY3DJyJfoQ==&c=X38Z89nuULsZet-nmcu3LAEq3ZPiusMc4oUuLtwJvG8QrR0cqtvoIg==&ch=AEt-P4atZn5HeTZE3nwIrf99UGHY_UMr70p3AxB6lZHX_tViYG0EdA==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YkiXrsA8lYEUAqQwNu1O9NmT1QkBWkfeWr6SRI8ReIdjHtDqQqk3QxTrW6jbpF_blLtCerGfaSm-hvPgJBtoBz5npeJsfnZfy5XUoUOfRaJyxx-cQgG3pf5IENh7RnOyeS1p0ij55JkSiY3DJyJfoQ==&c=X38Z89nuULsZet-nmcu3LAEq3ZPiusMc4oUuLtwJvG8QrR0cqtvoIg==&ch=AEt-P4atZn5HeTZE3nwIrf99UGHY_UMr70p3AxB6lZHX_tViYG0EdA==)
---
| We can no longer sit on the sidelines and watch our country be destroyed by woke Leftists that hate America. We have to fight for the values that make our country great.
Whether it's the out-of-control crisis at the border, reckless spending, or an attack on our faith, the Left is determined to undermine America at every turn.
I believe I am the only candidate in this race that has the real world experience to fight for our values. I will be a true conservative Senator who will be fearless in standing up to the radical Left.
Hope to see you on the campaign trail,
---
| Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate
---
| |
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YkiXrsA8lYEUAqQwNu1O9NmT1QkBWkfeWr6SRI8ReIdjHtDqQqk3QxdZnOYtseYLRsaMIgiLQM3r49EEd58i2qkwwDAHwL3aHpVxcwL6futPd7z-gBa49ZRgR5WYFMtwEGU1dqpLlgpmEr2TKzwWYA==&c=X38Z89nuULsZet-nmcu3LAEq3ZPiusMc4oUuLtwJvG8QrR0cqtvoIg==&ch=AEt-P4atZn5HeTZE3nwIrf99UGHY_UMr70p3AxB6lZHX_tViYG0EdA==)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Florida is right, Biden is wrong!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden wants fear, not solutions |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5040aaca74&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Vaccination is a personal choice! It should be left to a free people to evaluate the risk and decide for themselves.

Joe Biden doesn't believe we are a free people, and all his actions say that he intends to be a tyrant to us.

THAT means we have a moral duty to oppose him!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am the Christian patriot and combat vet [running to take back a tossup district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f03483d1f0&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who supports Joe Biden in all he does!**

Biden has been doing more crazy things to distract to his failures.

Inflation exploding. The Afghanistan debacle. Invasion on the Southern Border.

So many failures. That's why he is suddenly focusing on persecuting some Americans "on behalf of" others!

FOX News reports:

_Vice President Kamala Harris raised eyebrows on Sunday with her tweet urging Americans to help protect already vaccinated people in order to end the COVID-19 pandemic.

"By vaccinating the unvaccinated, increasing our testing and masking, and protecting the vaccinated, we can end this pandemic. That’s exactly what we are committed to doing," Harris tweeted.

Harris’ tweet was no exception and was met with criticism and confusion.

"’Protecting the vaccinated’ is an odd argument since the vaccinated are already, you know, vaccinated. And the vaccine works in keeping one out of the hospital 99.99 percent of the time per the data," Fox News contributor Joe Concha responded.

**Former Trump administration staffer Kyle Hooten asked, "Why do you need to protect the vaccinated? Doesn’t the vax do that?"**

Fox News contributor Kate Pavlich called Harris’ message "bizarre" and noted the Biden administration appears to be "taking credit for something...the vaccine is supposed to do." _

So why is Biden persecuting unvaccinated people to "protect the vaccinated"? I mean, doesn't that sound ridiculous on its face?
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=beebaebca7&e=afa21b7626)
---
| The evidence has always been there that Biden is using COVID measures as political weapons- to punish enemies and reward friends. More evidence of this came this week, when Biden attacked Gov. DeSantis while choking off supply of anti-COVID medicine to Florida!

_The Biden administration is taking over the distribution of the antibodies, which are used to treat COVID-19, and the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) will now be in charge of distribution.

DeSantis strongly criticized the decision on Thursday because it will result in Florida receiving fewer monoclonal antibodies than it previously had. He pledged to "fight like hell" to get the treatment to those in Florida who need it.

Fact Check: Has There Ever Been a Mandated 'AIDS Vaccine'?READ MOREFact Check: Has There Ever Been a Mandated 'AIDS Vaccine'?
NEWSWEEK NEWSLETTER SIGN-UP >
"Just last week, on September 9, President Joe Biden said that his administration would be increasing shipments of monoclonal antibodies in September by 50 percent," DeSantis said at a press conference in Broward County, Florida.

"And yet, on September 13, HHS announced that it was seizing control of the monoclonal antibody supply and that it would control distribution."

DeSantis went on: "We're facing a massive, massive cut in monoclonal antibody treatments abruptly. Just after the president said they would have a 50 percent increase, we're now seeing more than a 50 percent cut for the state of Florida. So we're going to fight like hell to make sure that our folks get what they need."

The Republican governor said Florida could purchase the antibodies directly from pharmaceutical company GlaxoSmithKline.

President Biden also took aim at DeSantis through his official Twitter account on Thursday.

"Republican governors in states like Texas and Florida are doing everything they can to undermine the public health requirements that keep people safe," Biden tweeted.

Under the Biden administration's new plans for monoclonal antibodies, Florida is set to receive 27,850 does of Regeneron this week. That's significantly less than the weekly average of 72,000 that the state's clinics and providers had been ordering, according to DeSantis' office._

Once again, Biden is putting Floridian lives at risk because of his personal hatred of Gov. DeSantis. Florida has the nation's greatest proportion of senior citizens. OF COURSE WE SHOULD HAVE THE GREATEST AMOUNT OF TREATMENT, GIVEN HOW THIS DISEASE AFFECTS SENIORS!

Joe Biden wants senior citizens to die. He wants Floridians to die.

Ron DeSantis is right. Florida has been doing everything right WHILE also protecting our freedoms. And Joe Biden has been doing just the opposite.

**The proof? Florida's new infections are plummeting, not even among the top states in infection rate. The most infected states are all the Blue states impeding on the freedom of their citizens!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5a2ffdc0cd&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Florida is doing right by its citizens, thanks to Gov. DeSantis but NO THANKS to Joe Biden!**

I am vaccinated, that was my choice. But I support the rights of our citizens to make their own choices! Florida leads America in the percent of senior citizens vaccinated- almost 90%. People are perfectly capable of making the choices right for them.

_But why aren't Republicans in Congress pushing back against Joe Biden? Do they agree with all his failures and all his tyranny?_

We must use the power of Congress to grind Biden's out of control regime to a stop. Defund Biden!

_I will stand up for Floridians against Biden's disastrous agenda. Darren Soto will not._

What Biden has done is impeachable. Elect me and let's impeach him!

Right now it's all on the governors, but we need stronger leaders in Congress to help! [Help me get elected and impeach Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b43b396b12&e=afa21b7626)

[I must raise $25k by the end of this month for my end-of-quarter deadline. Will you help me get there by contributing right now?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7bec7d6e26&e=afa21b7626)

No more "nice guy" Swampy politicians.

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=838c744022&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6e04cdd22d&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0bb9047afa&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. [I have a big deadline coming up at the end of this month and need to raise $25k before then. Can you help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5ae75624b8&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=5e7d7c80b2) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=5e7d7c80b2).

That's significantly less than the weekly average of 72,000 that the state's clinics and providers had been ordering, according to DeSantis' office. Once again, Biden is putting Floridian lives at risk because of his personal hatred of Gov. DeSantis. Florida has the nation's greatest proportion of senior citizens. OF COURSE WE SHOULD HAVE THE GREATEST AMOUNT OF TREATMENT, GIVEN HOW THIS DISEASE AFFECTS SENIORS! Joe Biden wants senior citizens to die. He wants Floridians to die. Ron DeSantis is right. Florida has been doing everything right WHILE also protecting our freedoms. And Joe Biden has been doing just the opposite. The proof? Florida's new infections are plummeting, not even among the top states in infection rate. The most infected states are all the Blue states impeding on the freedom of their citizens! | | Florida is doing right by its citizens, thanks to Gov. DeSantis but NO THANKS to Joe Biden! I am vaccinated, that was my choice. But I support the rights of our citizens to make their own choices! Florida leads America in the percent of senior citizens vaccinated- almost 90%. People are perfectly capable of making the choices right for them. But why aren't Republicans in Congress pushing back against Joe Biden? Do they agree with all his failures and all his tyranny? We must use the power of Congress to grind Biden's out of control regime to a stop. Defund Biden! I will stand up for Floridians against Biden's disastrous agenda. Darren Soto will not. What Biden has done is impeachable. Elect me and let's impeach him! Right now it's all on the governors, but we need stronger leaders in Congress to help! No more "nice guy" Swampy politicians. | | Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter | | P.S. | | PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | | | Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved. As you know, I'm a top target of the national Democrats because I call them out on their bull crap. I take a stand and say HELL NO when they try to push the country we love towards socialism.

Several liberal Democrat challengers have already declared to run against me for Congress in Colorado -- they've raised over $7 million just to oust me. You can be sure the money will flood in from leftist elites in DC, Manhattan, and Hollywood.

body:

Peter, we’re getting nervous.

With Election Day only six weeks away, a new statewide poll conducted by Virginia Commonwealth University shows Hala has lost ground to Republican Winsome Sears, and her lead is now **within the margin of error.**

_At such a critical time in this race, these numbers are too close for comfort._ And as Hala has told you, the stakes are too high to lose the Lt. Governorship to a radical Republican. [**So, we’re doubling down on fundraising for our ads and collecting an emergency $3,000 so we can close the gap, reach more voters, and continue to amplify Hala’s message. Chip in $3 now! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36261519/307588192/-196326674?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210922_EMDF_E1_T0_OP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjQ4MjFkNC1mODFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VqBD_y_FA1Sd_ykB2s5jCcHP3JB-SWhkO_Z_6r4syMY=) | [CONTRIBUTE $3 TO CLOSE THE GAP »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36261520/307588193/-196326674?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210922_EMDF_E1_T0_OP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjQ4MjFkNC1mODFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VqBD_y_FA1Sd_ykB2s5jCcHP3JB-SWhkO_Z_6r4syMY=)

Jim Jordan

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. **Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations. | SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, September 14th Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us. How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status! Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated! The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word. Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them. Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked. Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. Will the hypocrisy ever end? Thanks for letting us know – Thank you, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

Join us this Wednesday to meet the candidates & hear from a panel of experts🔥 | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=0d2ad5f50a&e=66979298f9)

| Join us on TODAY, Wednesday, September 22nd at 7:00PM EST for our first Meet the Candidates night of the 2022 election cycle! We are thrilled with the incredible lineup of special guests who are leaders and movement builders. They will lead the conversation on specific policy topics with candidates and open the floor to respond to your questions. This cycle we have worked extra hard to vet our candidates and are so proud of our current slate because they all possess the lived experiences needed to advocate for a more equitable future. As activists and community organizers, they have continuously shown up ready to fight for all of us, now it’s up to us to get them elected!

name: John Fetterman
subject: This is a longer-than-usual email about forgiveness + second chances. I hope you'll read it from beginning to end, because to me, there is nothing more important than the power of a second chance.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I have fought hard for second chances for Pennsylvanians — and one of my proudest accomplishments has been delivering them.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210922-2734-header&t=1&akid=2734%2E434096%2EXTwzvW)
Peter,
One of the things I believe in most strongly is the power of a second chance. So I wanted to take a moment today, as the Pennsylvania Board of Pardons convenes, to tell you why:
**I believe that one bad decision should not define a person.** In my years in public service, I have advocated for reforms to our unforgiving and vindictive legal system. I have fought hard for second chances for Pennsylvanians — _and one of my proudest accomplishments has been delivering them._
In America, we’ve unfortunately got the punishment part down pat. But we should not be a society about vengeance, we should be a society about redemption. What we need to do is fundamentally shift the justice system by bringing redemption to the forefront and making sure that second chances are possible in this country.
When I became Lieutenant Governor in 2019, I also became the Chair of the Board of Pardons here in Pennsylvania. I saw firsthand just how random, arbitrary, and punitive the system actually was. The closer you are to the system, the more injustices you see. So I immediately got to work to do what I could to make the system more just.
In the nearly three years since taking office, I’ve worked to completely reinvent our broken pardon and commutation process in PA. I eliminated application fees which led to an about 500% increase in pardon applications. I established an expedited cannabis-related pardon program to speed up the pardon process for those with nonviolent cannabis-related convictions — which, frankly, shouldn’t even be considered crimes to begin with. I also commissioned a report by the Philadelphia Lawyers for Social Equity that clearly spelled out the need to abolish Pennsylvania's horrible and immoral practice of sentencing people to mandatory life-without-parole for second-degree “felony” murder convictions.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30245?refcode=em20210922-2734&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2734%2E434096%2EXTwzvW)
_Corry Sanders won a McKeesport council seat in 2015. He was denied from taking office due to a 1993 drug conviction. In 2019, I took over the Board of Pardons + got his pardon to Governor Wolf’s desk._
Back when I was Mayor of Braddock, I heard the story of Corry Sanders, a father of four who owns a barbershop in McKeesport. In 2015, Corry was elected to serve on the McKeesport City Council but was barred from serving because of a 1993 drug charge.
It was absurd. This was a man who served time and did everything right after his release. He started a business, he started a family but was still held back by something from nearly 25 years prior. There is no clearer evidence that our system is not built to allow for redemption.
Before I was elected Lieutenant Governor, I called on the Governor to pardon Corry. Unfortunately, Corry’s application did not make it successfully from the Board to the Governor’s desk under my predecessor. When I became Lieutenant Governor, I saw to it that Corry’s application got to the Governor’s desk and was approved.
I’ve also had the opportunity to support second chances for more deserving lifers — Pennsylvanians serving life sentences without the possibility of parole — than in the previous 25 years combined. This means fewer people in our prison system and more families and communities reunited.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30245?refcode=em20210922-2734&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2734%2E434096%2EXTwzvW)
_Wyatt (left) and Reid were barely 18 & 19 when they went to prison for a robbery after the victim tragically died of a heart attack._
I also worked to ensure that Reid and Wyatt Evans, who each served 37 years in prison, were granted clemency and allowed to return home to their families and communities. The Evans brothers went to prison for a robbery that went south when the victim, Leonard Leichter, suffered a heart attack. Despite never having intentionally taken a life, these men were sentenced to die in prison. I knew in my heart that it was wrong. Through tireless efforts from advocacy groups and even Nancy Leichter, the daughter of the victim, advocating for their release, we were successful in our fight for freedom for the Evans Brothers. Wyatt and Reid were finally released earlier this year.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30245?refcode=em20210922-2734&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2734%2E434096%2EXTwzvW)
_Happy tears facetiming with Dennis and Lee Horton on the day of their release—after 27 years in prison._
One of my favorite stories of second chances is that of Dennis and Lee Horton, who were charged with murder in 1993 after one of their friends robbed a bar and shot and killed someone in the process. Dennis and Lee were implicated by guilt through association. They were offered a plea that would have meant a prison sentence of under 10 years, but they rejected it because they knew they did not commit the crime. So they took their chances at trial and were convicted of second-degree murder. And in Pennsylvania, that’s an automatic sentence of life without parole — death by incarceration. The superintendent of their prison even came to the hearing and begged the Board to grant them clemency.
And I took every exertion possible to make sure that Lee and Dennis got a chance to get their lives back and be reunited with their family. I cannot imagine the trauma, the horror, and the heartbreak, to have grown up with your father in prison for a crime that he didn’t commit. I cannot imagine how it feels to watch your sons spend 27 years locked up for something they didn’t do. Or, to be unjustly separated by prison walls from your twin — as was the case for Dennis — for all those years.
Like the Evans brothers, Dennis and Lee were released from prison earlier this year. I keep their photo as the background on my phone as a reminder of how important this work is.
I’ve also always felt that these individuals who have seen the legal system firsthand and know it better than anyone should have a voice in the fight to make our system one that more closely resembles justice. In my office, I made a point to hire formerly incarcerated individuals who have a unique perspective and knowledge of the system to help with the pardon and commutation process.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30245?refcode=em20210922-2734&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2734%2E434096%2EXTwzvW)
_Brandon Flood earned a pardon from the Board he now helps lead._
Back in 2019, I led a push to appoint Brandon Flood to be the Secretary of the Board of Pardons. Brandon had also recently earned a pardon for past convictions from the very Board he now helps lead. I also hired two former “Lifers,” George Trudel and Naomi Blount Wilson, who had recently received clemency for their life sentences, to work in my office and help people apply for commutation and work their way through the process.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30245?refcode=em20210922-2734&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=2734%2E434096%2EXTwzvW)
_I hired former “Lifers” Naomi Blunt Wilson and George Trudel to work in my office._
And earlier this year, the Horton brothers — just months out of prison — joined me in my campaign for U.S. Senate. Dennis and Lee are working as field organizers talking to Pennsylvanians across the state about the campaign and the work we’re going to do together when I’m elected.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30245?refcode=em20210922-2734&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=2734%2E434096%2EXTwzvW)
_The Horton Brothers have joined me in my campaign for U.S. Senate as field organizers, talking to Pennsylvanians across the state about how we’re going to reform our legal system. Here they are telling their story at our event in Philadelphia on Monday._
**I strongly feel that the people who know the issues and have lived experience with our legal system best are most equipped to help reform it.**
I feel so lucky to have come to know the Horton Brothers and to be able to have them as vital members of my campaign team.
I feel so lucky to have successfully advocated for the Evans brothers and to be able to watch them continue their life after nearly 40 years behind bars.
I feel so lucky to have come to know Corry and to see him now planning a run for Mayor.
**Stories like these are exactly why I do the work that I do, why I chose to first run for office back in 2005, why I ran for Lt. Governor, and why I am running now for the U.S. Senate.** There is nothing finer that I could do in my public life than to make sure our community members like Dennis, Lee, Wyatt, Reid, and Corry get a second chance.
I believe in second chances for so many more people like them who are stuck in our overly punitive system. I believe in second chances for Pennsylvania. And you can be damn sure I’ll keep fighting for them. [** _If you're with me in that fight, I'd be humbled to have your support as we fight together to change this country for the better. Thank you._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30245?refcode=em20210922-2734&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=2734%2E434096%2EXTwzvW)
**[Contribute](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30245?refcode=em20210922-2734&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=2734%2E434096%2EXTwzvW)**
Thanks for reading all of that. I deeply appreciate your commitment to this work, and I'm so proud that you're alongside me in this campaign.
More from me soon,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210922-2734-footer&t=10&refcode2=2734_434096_XTwzvW&akid=2734%2E434096%2EXTwzvW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=11&akid=2734%2E434096%2EXTwzvW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=2734%2E434096%2EXTwzvW)

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: FWD: Why I’m Pro-Life…
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XYWALZDEAcPPggzzucBY9XJTohU4kP-Vn2dO1yuYgM4dMad6rAsvjCtHmrmvOLbyEQybvtXWPSNMblt787Lw84qcMNFtXPlVZ1pR2_cIBkvw46T0qkVPLmb59eWCZ8QcL6tdNDm-buNNPlrum3Ec0kTaD7eWAl3rREdpEXE2-La46Z5KcV0qXSzK5NB0OOLHHBS66NXG81A=&c=dd0NX4S4Vpcym7-JQFn8HkQJW58Sk3zDlBxdJh2UvxgOpmOeddUjLQ==&ch=qZ70MgT4fFA_Icb6eeyYdSVNfSGuStELJOHveP6Ek77iHSubxag-LQ==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
---
| I wanted to make sure you had the chance to hear my story of why I'm Pro-Life...
Regardless of how I was conceived, I know that I'm valuable, that I'm worthy, and that my life has purpose - I will always fight to make sure that this commitment to life is reflected if given the honor to serve the great state of Pennsylvania.
---

Your support can help make that last mission a reality, and get someone with our Pro-Life values elected to fill this Senate seat - [God bless you for anything you can give today to see that important mission through.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XYWALZDEAcPPggzzucBY9XJTohU4kP-Vn2dO1yuYgM4dMad6rAsvjCtHmrmvOLbyEQybvtXWPSNMblt787Lw84qcMNFtXPlVZ1pR2_cIBkvw46T0qkVPLmb59eWCZ8QcL6tdNDm-buNNPlrum3Ec0kTaD7eWAl3rREdpEXE2-La46Z5KcV0qXSzK5NB0OOLHHBS66NXG81A=&c=dd0NX4S4Vpcym7-JQFn8HkQJW58Sk3zDlBxdJh2UvxgOpmOeddUjLQ==&ch=qZ70MgT4fFA_Icb6eeyYdSVNfSGuStELJOHveP6Ek77iHSubxag-LQ==)

From: Kathy Barnette <[info@barnetteforsenate.com](mailto:info@barnetteforsenate.com)> Date: Tue, Sep 21, 2021 at 7:02 AM Subject: Why I'm Pro-Life... To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
---
| I want to take a moment today to tell you the story of why I am proud to call myself a staunch Pro-Life candidate for US Senate... and how I got to this point through a deeply personal, heartbreaking ordeal.
I hope you'll take the time to watch the video of my story - and please be warned that it covers some very difficult themes.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XYWALZDEAcPPggzzucBY9XJTohU4kP-Vn2dO1yuYgM4dMad6rAsvjCtHmrmvOLbyEQybvtXWPSNMblt787Lw84qcMNFtXPlVZ1pR2_cIBkvw46T0qkVPLmb59eWCZ8QcL6tdNDm-buNNPlrum3Ec0kTaD7eWAl3rREdpEXE2-La46Z5KcV0qXSzK5NB0OOLHHBS66NXG81A=&c=dd0NX4S4Vpcym7-JQFn8HkQJW58Sk3zDlBxdJh2UvxgOpmOeddUjLQ==&ch=qZ70MgT4fFA_Icb6eeyYdSVNfSGuStELJOHveP6Ek77iHSubxag-LQ==)
---
| | | [SUPPORT THE RIGHT TO LIFE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XYWALZDEAcPPggzzucBY9XJTohU4kP-Vn2dO1yuYgM4dMad6rAsvjCtHmrmvOLbyEQybvtXWPSNMblt787Lw84qcMNFtXPlVZ1pR2_cIBkvw46T0qkVPLmb59eWCZ8QcL6tdNDm-buNNPlrum3Ec0kTaD7eWAl3rREdpEXE2-La46Z5KcV0qXSzK5NB0OOLHHBS66NXG81A=&c=dd0NX4S4Vpcym7-JQFn8HkQJW58Sk3zDlBxdJh2UvxgOpmOeddUjLQ==&ch=qZ70MgT4fFA_Icb6eeyYdSVNfSGuStELJOHveP6Ek77iHSubxag-LQ==)
---
| When I signed up to join the Army Reserves I had to show my birth certificate. Looking at that piece of paper, a few big revelations really resonated with me. First, my mother's gender was listed as "Negro Girl." And second, her age? My mother was 12 years old when I was born. I remember the gut-wrenching feeling when I realized something that is still very hard for me to say even to this day - my mother was raped when she was just a child. But my mother was surrounded by adults who saw the value of my life. They did not place the consequences on me, the unborn child, that squarely belongs with the perpetrator of the wrong.
Because my family chose life, I have had the opportunity to achieve the American Dream and start a loving family of my own. I'm currently even in the position to take care of my mother. My story proves that there is sanctity in ALL life - and that's a position that I will always champion in public office.
I'm eternally grateful to my family for choosing life. And I'm living proof that all life is precious - no matter how it was conceived.
---
| | | [JOIN ME: SUPPORT THE RIGHT TO LIFE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XYWALZDEAcPPggzzucBY9XJTohU4kP-Vn2dO1yuYgM4dMad6rAsvjCtHmrmvOLbyEQybvtXWPSNMblt787Lw84qcMNFtXPlVZ1pR2_cIBkvw46T0qkVPLmb59eWCZ8QcL6tdNDm-buNNPlrum3Ec0kTaD7eWAl3rREdpEXE2-La46Z5KcV0qXSzK5NB0OOLHHBS66NXG81A=&c=dd0NX4S4Vpcym7-JQFn8HkQJW58Sk3zDlBxdJh2UvxgOpmOeddUjLQ==&ch=qZ70MgT4fFA_Icb6eeyYdSVNfSGuStELJOHveP6Ek77iHSubxag-LQ==)
---
| I'm eternally grateful that my family chose to allow me to be born. And I'm living proof that all life is precious - no matter how it was conceived.
I know that I'm capable of defending conservative, America First, Pro-Life values because I'm living proof of why we need them.
[God bless you for anything you can lend today to make sure these values are advanced in our nation's capital.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XYWALZDEAcPPggzzucBY9XJTohU4kP-Vn2dO1yuYgM4dMad6rAsvjCtHmrmvOLbyEQybvtXWPSNMblt787Lw84qcMNFtXPlVZ1pR2_cIBkvw46T0qkVPLmb59eWCZ8QcL6tdNDm-buNNPlrum3Ec0kTaD7eWAl3rREdpEXE2-La46Z5KcV0qXSzK5NB0OOLHHBS66NXG81A=&c=dd0NX4S4Vpcym7-JQFn8HkQJW58Sk3zDlBxdJh2UvxgOpmOeddUjLQ==&ch=qZ70MgT4fFA_Icb6eeyYdSVNfSGuStELJOHveP6Ek77iHSubxag-LQ==)

subject: I'm pleading with you, don't let us lose

body:
| |
---
| | | Peter, I'll be honest. I'm concerned about being outraised.

_Fox News_ listed my race against radical Trump Impeachment Manager Val Demings as possibly being the most expensive Senate race ever, and I believe it! We know that in only 1 month, Val Demings raised $4.6 MILLION.

1 month. 1 month is all it took for her to outraise me for the ENTIRE last Quarter. It's more clear than ever Chuck and Nancy are willing to do whatever it takes to replace me with one of their puppets and elect a Trump Impeachment Manager to the US Senate.

In addition to all this, _CNN_ moved my race against Val Demings up on its list of the Top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip. The warning signs are popping up left and right, but there's one thing the media doesn't see: **_the conservatives like you who know the stakes and know when it 's time to step up and chip in. _**

Well, Peter, if you were waiting to step up, now's the time. We need you now more than ever. _**[We are asking every patriot who gets this to chip in $18 to ensure we win and make up the ground we've lost to radical Val Demings.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58387463:652zyu2jN:m:1:3253819041:A4F3508003E862C9F05810FC060276B0:r "We are asking
every patriot who gets this to chip in $18 to ensure we win and make up the ground we’ve lost to radical Val Demings.")**_ **We can 't afford a single person to ignore this email:**

**I 'm relying on the support of grassroots conservatives like you to carry me across the finish line. **These crazy numbers that Val is putting up just show the IMPORTANCE of each and every patriot stepping up and doing their part. _**[So, I'm pleading with you, don't let us lose -- donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58387464:652zyu2jN:m:1:3253819041:A4F3508003E862C9F05810FC060276B0:r "So, I’m pleading with you,

Thank you for your help,
Marco Rubio

name: Izzi Levy
subject: the GOP clown car
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=945%2E3611125%2EvsU-Rn ][IMG]

Hi folks, my name is Izzi. I’m Tim Ryan’s Communications
Director and hoo boy, do I have some news for you:

Scooch in because things are getting tighter in the Ohio GOP’s clown car
of a primary. Yet another millionaire Republican just threw his hat in
this Senate race.

The Republican primary field is jam-packed with out-of-touch extremists
who couldn’t be more wrong for Ohio. They’re begging for Trump’s
endorsement and all set to outspend each other to buy this Senate seat on
behalf of their wealthy allies.

They know what we know: Mitch McConnell’s chance at taking back the Senate
gavel depends on what happens here in Ohio. And whether we win or lose
could depend on you:

Recent polling shows we’re neck-and-neck with our GOP opponents. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4084?t=1007&akid=945%2E3611125%2EvsU-Rn ]Can
you chip in to help us flip this open seat blue and show Tim’s newest
opponent that this Senate seat can’t be bought?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4084?t=1008&akid=945%2E3611125%2EvsU-Rn ]Donate >>

There’s no room for error here -- we’ve got to expand our Senate majority
or working families will pay the price.

But here’s the issue: Tim’s millionaire Republican opponents have the
backing of wealthy billionaires -- JD Vance has the help of Peter Thiel’s
$10 million super PAC while Mike Gibbons just announced a $10 million ad
buy.

The GOP’s clown car would take Ohio down the wrong road. It’s time to make
a U-turn and cut workers in on the deal. To do that, we need your help.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4084?t=1009&akid=945%2E3611125%2EvsU-Rn ]Can we count on you to chip in and show the GOP that we’re ready to
take on their attacks, flip this Senate seat blue, and expand the
Democratic Senate majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4084?t=1010&akid=945%2E3611125%2EvsU-Rn ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4085?t=1011&akid=945%2E3611125%2EvsU-Rn ]Donate $50

-- Izzi

clean_body: [ ][IMG] Hi folks, my name is Izzi. I’m Tim Ryan’s Communications Director and hoo boy, do I have some news for you: Scooch in because things are getting tighter in the Ohio GOP’s clown car of a primary. Yet another millionaire Republican just threw his hat in this Senate race. The Republican primary field is jam-packed with out-of-touch extremists who couldn’t be more wrong for Ohio. They’re begging for Trump’s endorsement and all set to outspend each other to buy this Senate seat on behalf of their wealthy allies. They know what we know: Mitch McConnell’s chance at taking back the Senate gavel depends on what happens here in Ohio. And whether we win or lose could depend on you: Recent polling shows we’re neck-and-neck with our GOP opponents. [ ]Can you chip in to help us flip this open seat blue and show Tim’s newest opponent that this Senate seat can’t be bought? [ ]Donate >> There’s no room for error here -- we’ve got to expand our Senate majority or working families will pay the price. But here’s the issue: Tim’s millionaire Republican opponents have the backing of wealthy billionaires -- JD Vance has the help of Peter Thiel’s $10 million super PAC while Mike Gibbons just announced a $10 million ad buy. The GOP’s clown car would take Ohio down the wrong road. It’s time to make a U-turn and cut workers in on the deal. To do that, we need your help. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=12324639eda4442280bb9d04dbe854f1&_e=MIjMfmBWyv0TOdwXnb6_K9CpwH-qEfVMWrIaoIhPL2zFmyBpmN0EB49h0xrQftbYrTVBy78IY0HuJ_Db2gmyM98EpMMwRZDW2AaVNoUz-YdtTjdbc8wASCsr5Z9ZM6tEq9hj0Bw-gJ3IYGvWNv95sc68ftkHMiXTqnKpbtVF0gvE7HHXRzVM9ZIWA5LEvKyMPf75r9K2wxCMsbdHJCznEbx62gBx9n1BIf0i5-7maLPPbKN3jnnyH2LFNy2ZL6EkOTDxqUiA26U5fR84K0EGqdDfkemgen8Y1HGjvrg7QeKuQ4S2Et0bdnc6Jpapu3RT1KSdWTqrTELGvTLTcp7zm0BPe8ZEgamcFXpWm1Egh0D6qiCo7OVPNWqBL9lV9sqw8w5WNWalJj0GhIF-RqLJcUsJ5GBOnl5GQ6DejqrXANNj9V_eVjlefT8wvCxxkNULSNoEtbKFWcYpTqePbIbxRQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

I’m writing today to let you know that we didn’t reach our goal of finding 256 donors to chip in $4 last Friday evening. In fact, we didn’t even come close. That’s why **[I’m forwarding the email to you today in hopes that you’ll be one of the 162 additional supporters I need to make a gift to get us back on track toward meeting our quarterly donor goal by next Thursday](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=12324639eda4442280bb9d04dbe854f1&_e=MIjMfmBWyv0TOdwXnb6_K9CpwH-qEfVMWrIaoIhPL2zFmyBpmN0EB49h0xrQftbYrTVBy78IY0HuJ_Db2gmyM98EpMMwRZDW2AaVNoUz-YdtTjdbc8wASCsr5Z9ZM6tEq9hj0Bw-gJ3IYGvWNv95sc68ftkHMiXTqnKpbtVF0gvE7HHXRzVM9ZIWA5LEvKyMPf75r9K2wxCMsbdHJCznEbx62gBx9n1BIf0i5-7maLPPbKN3jnnyH2LFNy2ZL6EkK3pZofEV-VHS-wC3Is0k947HY4mFvdAgvY-w3kgJLNEnh5jYQA5WD1tKgm5vWOBYtv5nykt70M1dHd_i_acvFme7Y1HHV-ms_IEuLbmuLD2T6fk-HnFfV56Z4lrIzdhyGZK1B34sFpFNcAISOuR0NqrKSi3_8BVuEfVbVcT941a2vwr91kS1i_t1H1ZCoZodHCVbFUk1hkcPU8fHrcGswA%3D%3D)**.

If you can chip in even just one dollar right now – we’d be appreciative. It’s really not the amount of the donation that matters; it’s the donation itself.

[**HELP ME HIT MY 3RD QUARTER FUNDRAISING GOAL
CHIP IN $4 -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=12324639eda4442280bb9d04dbe854f1&_e=MIjMfmBWyv0TOdwXnb6_K9CpwH-qEfVMWrIaoIhPL2zFmyBpmN0EB49h0xrQftbYrTVBy78IY0HuJ_Db2gmyM98EpMMwRZDW2AaVNoUz-YdtTjdbc8wASCsr5Z9ZM6tEq9hj0Bw-gJ3IYGvWNv95sc68ftkHMiXTqnKpbtVF0gvE7HHXRzVM9ZIWA5LEvKyMPf75r9K2wxCMsbdHJCznEbx62gBx9n1BIf0i5-7maLPPbKN3jnnyH2LFNy2ZL6EkdIUz25lN3YNkTLablzq-eWQWuV9M7oJw-ZhElT0InZYvybiinNgzcOikHCevSIo1Kf2etdHd7KH-dMHnWLuf03yLFzXAoD-NSL5EqL-_5b-3R0pYw3UlzSDmixTFmo-GvCz6UfXZZf889BhI_qKYTO9uxzaQ3_I_hKR30Sx9n_SI8yeLUlA4jvM1pDgQPuC0qkV0vdE1rYtqIO0tUKPCTg%3D%3D)

From: Alek Skarlatos
Date: Fri, Sep 17, 2021 at 3:06 PM
Subject: I need 256 donations before midnight
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peter,

I know it’s Friday and my campaign has sent a lot of emails this week, so I’ll be quick.

In order to stay on track toward hitting our 3rd quarter goal ($250,000), we need 256 conservatives reading this email today to chip in $4 or more.

_**I’m hesitant to email folks on the weekend, because the last thing any of us want to be thinking about on Saturday and Sunday is politics**_.

**[So, as most folks do if they can, I’ve decided to put in a little work ahead of time to ensure we don’t miss any opportunities that might result in us missing our goal.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=12324639eda4442280bb9d04dbe854f1&_e=MIjMfmBWyv0TOdwXnb6_K9CpwH-qEfVMWrIaoIhPL2zFmyBpmN0EB49h0xrQftbYrTVBy78IY0HuJ_Db2gmyM98EpMMwRZDW2AaVNoUz-YdtTjdbc8wASCsr5Z9ZM6tEq9hj0Bw-gJ3IYGvWNv95sc68ftkHMiXTqnKpbtVF0gvE7HHXRzVM9ZIWA5LEvKyMPf75r9K2wxCMsbdHJCznEbx62gBx9n1BIf0i5-7maLPPbKN3jnnyH2LFNy2ZL6EkoreYYJKXnolsSLte6rsZjroJCt9rAPgpvf_etxWzpw6cokf-UHogsHV9UePxJ1M4EW5sR-0JexQvEYg-rCCVTBjYvm0YANiiUdVzd4FC4TZ6GvRnFTRSMxRbF--4Ux66mRlx43IFBSjjpNRB9yKlIhqoytXXFlyAR4OzpWWENdA1pQTidbwS05O82PcQAi7Pa0R2jbiUjnJfqweGVchPIw%3D%3D)**

[**HELP ME HIT MY 3RD QUARTER FUNDRAISING GOAL
CHIP IN $4 -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=12324639eda4442280bb9d04dbe854f1&_e=MIjMfmBWyv0TOdwXnb6_K9CpwH-qEfVMWrIaoIhPL2zFmyBpmN0EB49h0xrQftbYrTVBy78IY0HuJ_Db2gmyM98EpMMwRZDW2AaVNoUz-YdtTjdbc8wASCsr5Z9ZM6tEq9hj0Bw-gJ3IYGvWNv95sc68ftkHMiXTqnKpbtVF0gvE7HHXRzVM9ZIWA5LEvKyMPf75r9K2wxCMsbdHJCznEbx62gBx9n1BIf0i5-7maLPPbKN3jnnyH2LFNy2ZL6EkQxQY8nnHtvZ_Q0huekG5znQNSaQOz811LWOmz4av5e3IYSWm2XKkitJGlDA02RbUh3kuug0WUR5JGI7uaE1pHTbnhpW5PzaeEtIwGVq21Bna9Fbo6jXixkb0zbjJ_nAqHwLXNIQrxBdhkACcS7CPMky5REECCaDoYLZ27s8HkytN7ZC-QLYBw1vOL-VDoigrzO4C2MkP2Sj3t6bcVvcgLg%3D%3D)
In case you need a reminder, my quarterly goal of raising $250,000 isn’t arbitrary. **I’m working to be the first Republican House candidate to earn admission into the NRCC’s “Young Guns” program for 2022.** This program supports candidates running in the nation’s most competitive House races, which definitely applies to my race.

**With only 13 days left** , there honestly is no time to waste. If I don’t raise the additional $40,000 between now and midnight on September 30th, I have to wait another three months to apply for admission.

I sincerely appreciate all you have done for my campaigns.

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. body:
The far-right is ALREADY getting involved in North Carolina’s U.S. Senate race.
#
The far-right is ALREADY getting involved in North Carolina’s U.S. Senate race.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15589?refcode=em20210922-472&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=472%2E3698%2E9ZJxNf)_News & Observer — September 02,2021_
Club for Growth Action — a national, right-wing super PAC — has raised $5 million to try and buy this seat for Trump-endorsed candidate and insurrection apologist, Ted Budd. Now, they’re spending $3 million in advertising to prop him up.
**CNN analysts ranked our U.S. Senate race as one of the top 10 most likely to flip in 2022 — but we know Republicans will do (and spend) anything to keep this seat. Erica needs your help to fight back.**
[**Will you make a $5 donation to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate before our end-of-quarter FEC deadline on September 30? Every donation will send a powerful message to the GOP that North Carolina’s U.S. Senate seat can’t be bought.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15589?refcode=em20210922-472&%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=472%2E3698%2E9ZJxNf)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15589?refcode=em20210922-472&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=472%2E3698%2E9ZJxNf)**
We’re not mincing words when we say North Carolina is going to be one of the most competitive — _and most expensive_ — Senate races in the country.
And while our opponents may be banking on wealthy donors, the fossil fuel industry, and super PAC investment, we’re relying on A LOT of grassroots donations from people like you reading this email to make sure a progressive Democrat like Erica wins this race.
[**So if you can, will you make a $5 contribution? Your donation today will help us post a strong Q3 fundraising report and build a movement powerful enough to send Erica to the U.S. Senate in 2022.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15589?refcode=em20210922-472&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=472%2E3698%2E9ZJxNf)
Thank you!
Erica Smith HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210922-472-footer&t=23&refcode2=472_3698_9ZJxNf&akid=472%2E3698%2E9ZJxNf)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=472%2E3698%2E9ZJxNf)

| I know this email is longer than we usually send, but I hope you’ll read the whole thing.

**[If you’re short on time, will you consider contributing $3 — or whatever you can — towards defeating my opponent, Republican Madison Cawthorn? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36262411/307590366/1612211699?amount=3&refcode=EGFC_20210922_EMDF_E1_T0_ND_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzQzNTUwNS1mZDFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCI8GurjxHDzmFgPBL9CVwwrjIk6NwlIv7WxgguQxhk=)** | [CHIP IN $3 TO DEFEAT CAWTHORN »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36262412/307590367/1612211699?amount=3&refcode=EGFC_20210922_EMDF_E1_T0_ND_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzQzNTUwNS1mZDFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCI8GurjxHDzmFgPBL9CVwwrjIk6NwlIv7WxgguQxhk=)
---
For weeks, Madison Cawthorn has rallied against allowing schools to decide for themselves whether to implement common sense mask and vaccine efforts that keep our kids and communities safe. My district looked at the numbers and chose that path anyway, and Cawthorn showed up at last week’s school board meeting to chirp his displeasure.

**I didn’t let him or his crew intimidate me. I looked him in the eye and spoke my truth.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36262413/307590368/1612211699?amount=3&refcode=EGFC_20210922_EMDF_E1_T0_ND_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzQzNTUwNS1mZDFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCI8GurjxHDzmFgPBL9CVwwrjIk6NwlIv7WxgguQxhk=)
Please know that if Madison Cawthorn succeeds in his anti-science, anti-public health agenda, it will cost some Western North Carolinians their health -- _and even their lives._

**I felt compelled to confront him.**

A supporter of his suggested “Covid is here to stay. Masks shouldn’t be.” I don’t accept that. I don’t accept that, as Americans, we roll over and let a deadly virus circulate in perpetuity among our friends and neighbors. We’re better than that.

At a time where our community demands real leadership — when we should be following the science to protect our community — Cawthorn is perpetuating gross misinformation to spark fear and win political points.

This district deserves better. Our country deserves better.

We may not have his ultra-rich mega-donor support, but I believe in the power of $3, $7, or even $1 donations. **I know if we band together, our grassroots movement can disrupt the Republican machine.**

**[That is why I’m asking you to chip in NOW to end Cawthorn’s career in Congress. Can I count on you to step up today? I'd be so grateful to have earned your support for doing what’s right. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36262414/307590369/1612211699?amount=3&refcode=EGFC_20210922_EMDF_E1_T0_ND_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzQzNTUwNS1mZDFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCI8GurjxHDzmFgPBL9CVwwrjIk6NwlIv7WxgguQxhk=)**

clean_body: It’s on all of us to stop Madison Cawthorn. | = | I know this email is longer than we usually send, but I hope you’ll read the whole thing. = | = For weeks, Madison Cawthorn has rallied against allowing schools to decide for themselves whether to implement common sense mask and vaccine efforts that keep our kids and communities safe. My district looked at the numbers and chose that path anyway, and Cawthorn showed up at last week’s school board meeting to chirp his displeasure. I didn’t let him or his crew intimidate me. I looked him in the eye and spoke my truth. = Please know that if Madison Cawthorn succeeds in his anti-science, anti-public health agenda, it will cost some Western North Carolinians their health -- and even their lives. I felt compelled to confront him. A supporter of his suggested “Covid is here to stay. Masks shouldn’t be.” I don’t accept that. I don’t accept that, as Americans, we roll over and let a deadly virus circulate in perpetuity among our friends and neighbors. We’re better than that. At a time where our community demands real leadership — when we should be following the science to protect our community — Cawthorn is perpetuating gross misinformation to spark fear and win political points. This district deserves better. Our country deserves better. We may not have his ultra-rich mega-donor support, but I believe in the power of $3, $7, or even $1 donations. I know if we band together, our grassroots movement can disrupt the Republican machine. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Eric Gash | | Paid for by Eric Gash For Congress PO Box 543, Hendersonville, NC 28793 www.ericgash.com Eric Gash is a teacher, a pastor, a former professional football player, and former Hendersonville High School football coach. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Where is the GOP?
body:
You're feeling it, aren't you?
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/yCsln19763Uqo0oXDjf4Nw6Q/OAE0pPaqomJ763Q1n85SHTig)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/yCsln19763Uqo0oXDjf4Nw6Q/OAE0pPaqomJ763Q1n85SHTig) You're feeling it, aren't you?

From vaccine mandates, to inflation, to coming tax hikes, we're being bombarded from ALL sides by the Left!

Where is the GOP? Where are the Republicans defending us in Congress?

They are few and far between.

[**Help me get to Congress and there will be no doubt that you have a defender in Washington.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/yCsln19763Uqo0oXDjf4Nw6Q/OAE0pPaqomJ763Q1n85SHTig)

I have just eight days left until the end of the fundraising quarter and I need to catch up.

[**Will you donate $20 now?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/yCsln19763Uqo0oXDjf4Nw6Q/OAE0pPaqomJ763Q1n85SHTig)

I know I ask for your help a lot, but that's because it's needed.

I'm not a wealthy person. I don't "come from money", I work hard to pay rent and my bills like you do - so I know when I ask for $20, I'm asking for a lot.

I also don't get any financial backing from the NRCC and the political establishment because they don't want to support hard-hitting, America First, Constitutional conservatives like myself.

I don't take it lightly, and [**I appreciate every dollar that you can support me with**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/yCsln19763Uqo0oXDjf4Nw6Q/OAE0pPaqomJ763Q1n85SHTig).

[**Help me get to Congress**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/yCsln19763Uqo0oXDjf4Nw6Q/OAE0pPaqomJ763Q1n85SHTig) and you won't be wondering who is fighting for you in Washington any longer. I'll be there for you and your family.

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

North Carolina’s US Senate Seat is key to winning the Majority in the Midterm Elections. If they Democrats win here, our hopes of reclaiming power in Washington are finished!
That’s why the Democrats are so focused on controling this seat. They’ve already invested millions in this race, and it could well exceed $100 million before the end of next year.

clean_body: This is really concerning. | Authorized by Republican Headquarters This is really concerning, Peter. We’ve been emailing and emailing, urging Republican Patriots like you to step up and help secure our Republican-held Senate Seats in North Carolina. But donations have slowed to a near-stop, and we’re now at risk of FAILING to reach our critical End-Of-Quarter Fundraising Goal. We can’t afford to let the Left build momentum. They’ve been scheming to turn North Carolina “blue” for years, and if we don’t remain vigilant they’re going to succeed. Remember, they already managed to elect a Democrat governor to two terms in this Republican state! | Official Donor File EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $5 or more | | North Carolina’s US Senate Seat is key to winning the Majority in the Midterm Elections. If they Democrats win here, our hopes of reclaiming power in Washington are finished! That’s why the Democrats are so focused on controling this seat. They’ve already invested millions in this race, and it could well exceed $100 million before the end of next year. | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

| | Hello! If you don't already know me, I am Brent Hennrich, the Democrat Candidate running for Washington's Third Congressional District. I am going to be very blunt. I need your help and support to get to Congress, and I am going to ask a very personal favor:
---
|
---
| | Take some of your time and talk with three people about my Campaign- forward this email, call an old friend, [even drop a tweet](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d5NmELaXr/c?w=NhWeIcDQG_LGd6LPWb9hb77oAOfxS2vLNNOw8vj1Tfk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9iaGVubnJpY2giLCJyIjoiNDJjZmUxZGEtZmZhZi00NWIxLTI1ODktNmVjYjZmZDA5YjAxIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0) about me and tag a friend.
---
| | I am serious about this, please make it a conversation. Take a moment and tell them about the climate here in WA-03, where the incumbent voted to impeach 45 and is facing a slew of his supporters challenging her from her own side. Let them know about how one of those opponents has embraced lies about election fraud so tightly that he is already [planning to call for an audit of the 2022 primary here](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d5NmELaXr/c?w=Dsqv74Q1xUfmoQjrcOl-PNGl2oDqVPLPooy-Lx7wOI0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9pQ2NVX1Q4LVNOVT90PTM2NCIsInIiOiI3NDg1MzEyMC0wNjYzLTRkMGYtYWU4MC1hNTNhZmFiYmNkNzAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ), even though a single ballot has yet to be cast. Tell them about how I am [100% Pro-choice because of lived experience](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d5NmELaXr/c?w=3jA82N01Tc4iQ8W2A-t7HFB2v3dLsbMKvfgJz8yTKJs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9iaGVubnJpY2gvc3RhdHVzLzE0Mzg2NDc4NDA5OTM5ODg2MDk_cz0yMCIsInIiOiI3NDg1MzEyMC0wNjYzLTRkMGYtYWU4MC1hNTNhZmFiYmNkNzAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ), and how I believe [healthcare relates to the whole of the person](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d5NmELaXr/c?w=zIKI0DoAxYPb2PvR8rpajByr4-7j1Cak_ul6By5LCac.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vaGVhbHRoY2FyZSIsInIiOiI3NDg1MzEyMC0wNjYzLTRkMGYtYWU4MC1hNTNhZmFiYmNkNzAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ), not just a Doctor appointment. [You could even tell them how I proudly support our Unions!](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d5NmELaXr/c?w=OVTkMsZHvTNZZrUis-pNwxoBaXfm-T_XALSFTZ3EXbI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ZsaXB3YTAzbGFib3JkYXkiLCJyIjoiNzQ4NTMxMjAtMDY2My00ZDBmLWFlODAtYTUzYWZhYmJjZDcwIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0) But don't stop there, tell them why you support me, and why they should. subject: fwd: Peter— Will you be one of the 50 people we need today ?

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

Friend, when we talk about electing Democrats and defeating GOP extremism in Arizona, we can't limit that to just the governorship. We have to do what Arizonans have always done at our best: Think BIG.
**Next year, if we think – and act – big enough, we have the chance to flip Arizona _fully_ blue by reelecting Mark Kelly (D) to the Senate _and_ replacing Doug Ducey with a Democratic governor. But it won't be easy. [Can you kick things off right now by splitting a donation to power both our campaigns and send a blue wave across Arizona?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36263089/307591986/1476602513?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk234-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODdjNWZjYS1mZjFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ze15HRK5ssqooVIlg4gkKFuBmlnn_uYBazx2XT2_gS0=)**
Arizona is at a crossroads – and what we do today will determine if we follow down the path of GOP extremism like our opponents want, or if we change course and we build a state that works for _all_ our people. But we can't win these critical races without your help.
Right now, Mitch McConnell and his dark-money groups are spending millions to launch attack ads against Sen. Kelly, and a Republican megadonor pledged $10 MILLION to defeat this movement and keep battleground Arizona red.
**Friend, we CAN win these races. Polls say it, experts from Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight say it and history shows it's possible. We're the state that delivered the White House for Joe Biden and the Senate for Democrats – but it's going to take a SURGE of grassroots support like we've never seen to recreate our victories.**
**[Right now, please, donate as much as you can spare to split between my campaign and Mark Kelly's. We have to hold a united front against GOP extremism across Arizona, and every single dollar makes a difference. Please, give now to flip Arizona fully blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36263090/307591987/1476602513?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk234-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODdjNWZjYS1mZjFiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ze15HRK5ssqooVIlg4gkKFuBmlnn_uYBazx2XT2_gS0=)**

Republicans know they only have to flip five seats to take back control of the House in 2022. What’s more, they know that in 2020 **I won one of the closest House races in the country** — and that **I’m facing off against the same far-right opponent again in a race that’s already been rated a “toss-up” by Sabato’s Crystal Ball.**

I’m not like my opponent — I don’t have millions of dollars of personal wealth to pour into my campaign, and I don’t take corporate PAC money. I rely on grassroots supporters like you to keep me in Congress fighting for the issues that matter most to the families and workers of the greater Lehigh Valley and the entire country.

clean_body: Republicans know they only have to flip five seats to take back control of the House in 2022. | | | GOP ramps up pressure on vulnerable Democrats in spending fight -The Hill, Sept 21 | = Peter — Republican groups are ramping up their spending in an effort to flip the House. They’re targeting House Democrats who they think are vulnerable, and I’m on their list. = | = | = | = Republicans know they only have to flip five seats to take back control of the House in 2022. What’s more, they know that in 2020 I won one of the closest House races in the country — and that I’m facing off against the same far-right opponent again in a race that’s already been rated a “toss-up” by Sabato’s Crystal Ball. I’m not like my opponent — I don’t have millions of dollars of personal wealth to pour into my campaign, and I don’t take corporate PAC money. I rely on grassroots supporters like you to keep me in Congress fighting for the issues that matter most to the families and workers of the greater Lehigh Valley and the entire country. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States | | ---|--- Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. And she knows, now more than ever, it's working-class families that deserve a break in this economy — not big city billionaires and wealthy corporations. But she needs your support today -- her campaign runs on grassroots donations since she's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. = = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, **. Fellow American -

If we’ve learned one thing from Joe Biden, it’s that he doesn’t care what catastrophe is affecting our country... he will still enjoy his vacation.

_It’s absolutely ridiculous._

While Joe Biden sunbathes, over 12,000 illegal migrants - gang members, sex offenders, and drug-mules - are streaming into this country.

But I hope Biden got a nice tan!

subject: Fauci Lied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Peter, I've seen enough. **Anthony Fauci has to go.** For almost two years, Dr. Fauci has ducked questions about where Covid-19 came from. He's never come clean about U.S. funding of coronavirus research in Wuhan, China. And now we know why. More than 900 pages of documents recently released under the Freedom of Information Act show that _**Fauci lied about his support for dangerous coronavirus "gain-of-function" experiments in Wuhan**_. Fauci's misleading testimony before Congress has already been sent to the Justice Department for criminal review. Yet Democrats continue to cover for Fauci and all the public health "experts" whose dishonesty contributed to a global pandemic. **Conservatives must take back the House next year so we can remove Anthony Fauci and stop the public health lies.** The best source of information about Dr. Fauci and his role in Covid-19 is the bestselling book, _" Faucian Bargain: The Most Powerful and Dangerous Bureaucrat in American History."_ To help get this shocking story out to the country and to help build the case against Dr. Fauci, House Freedom Fund is giving away a copy of _Faucian Bargain_ [with a contribution of $25 or more](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58388407:JgN9Yu2HN:m:1:3253819041:4722CF9DF34A8C5571881B47BDFDBB82:r). Your support will help tell America the truth about Dr. Fauci AND elect strong, tough, and principled candidates like: ✅ U.S. Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-CO) ✅ U.S. Rep. Scott Perry (R-PA)
✅ U.S. Rep. Yvette Herrell (R-NM) Supporting candidates like these is the only way to defeat the liberals in both parties in 2022. And electing them to the House is the only way to hold Dr. Fauci accountable for his lies about funding the Chinese communists' gain-of-function research. **[Please support the House Freedom Fund with a contribution of $25, $50, $100, or more today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58388407:JgN9Yu2HN:m:1:3253819041:4722CF9DF34A8C5571881B47BDFDBB82:r)** Your support will help us get answers and, more importantly, accountability for those who repeatedly lied to us. Why won't Fauci be honest about the research he funded in China? Why won't he tell Americans the truth about live-saving early treatments to help Americans recover from Covid? Does he care more about hiding the truth and keeping people afraid than defeating the pandemic? We need answers. **[Please help HFF get the truth out about Dr. Fauci and also elect strong conservative leaders who will hold him accountable.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58388407:JgN9Yu2HN:m:1:3253819041:4722CF9DF34A8C5571881B47BDFDBB82:r)** Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely, ANDY BIGGS U.S. Congressman, R-Arizona | |

| Dems have historically had a huge lead over Republicans when it comes to voter registrations in the state, but that lead has been diminished. In just the past 9 months, Republicans cut the Democrat lead by over 75,000 voters, from 100,000 all the way down to a deficit of just 24,000. We need to keep up this pace in order to take back FL CD-13 from the Democrats!

**Also, recent financial reports have shown Democrats lagging far behind Republicans in fundraising numbers! ****We have a very serious chance to flip our district red!** For too long, Florida’s 13th congressional district has been blue thanks to Dems redistricting and liberal elite donors, but Amanda Makki is here to change that. **Amanda is just the woman we need to help bring Florida’s red wave in 2022!** Floridians are taking a stand for conservatism. We need to keep pushing and take back the House in 2022 to show the left that we mean business! **We know we can count on you to protect conservative values in Florida. ** [**Can Amanda Makki count on your support in flipping Florida’s 13th congressional district red in 2022?**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=a453d14e5a&e=c2296cffff)

clean_body: Have you seen this recent article from the Hill? Thanks to the support from... | | | | | Dear Friend, Have you seen this recent article from the Hill? Thanks to the support from patriots like you, conservatives across Florida are crushing the radical left!We would not have made it this far without you! But we have to keep up the momentum! | "FLIP FL CD-13 RED" | | | Dems have historically had a huge lead over Republicans when it comes to voter registrations in the state, but that lead has been diminished. In just the past 9 months, Republicans cut the Democrat lead by over 75,000 voters, from 100,000 all the way down to a deficit of just 24,000. We need to keep up this pace in order to take back FL CD-13 from the Democrats! Also, recent financial reports have shown Democrats lagging far behind Republicans in fundraising numbers! We have a very serious chance to flip our district red! For too long, Florida’s 13th congressional district has been blue thanks to Dems redistricting and liberal elite donors, but Amanda Makki is here to change that. Amanda is just the woman we need to help bring Florida’s red wave in 2022! Floridians are taking a stand for conservatism. We need to keep pushing and take back the House in 2022 to show the left that we mean business! We know we can count on you to protect conservative values in Florida. | "TAKE A STAND FOR CONSERVATIVE VALUES" | Thank you for joining us, Team Makki | Amanda Makki for Congress| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Amanda Makki, All rights reserved.

**This is horrific.**
In 8 months there have been over **1,000,000** migrant encounters. Yes, you read that right: ONE MILLION migrant encounters and not one Leftist has batted an eye.
While they shut down schools, cities, and small businesses; villainize First Responders, and force millions to get the COVID-shot, anyone can walk across our Southern Border without any papers, thermometer check, or mandated vaccines.
Even worse, Joe Biden continues to vacation in Delaware and Kamala Harris was flipping a coin at a college football game. And who knows what Lisa Murkowski is doing to stop any of this?
That’s right, nothing.
**WE MUST SECURE THE BORDER!**
If we don't secure our borders now, we will continue to see the border used as a gateway for human trafficking, drug smuggling, criminals, and hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to come into America. That’s a risk Kelly isn’t going to take!
Kelly is going to STAND UP and FIGHT for border protection.

clean_body: | | | | We NEED protection Friend, Did you see the video that was taken of the border over the weekend? This is horrific. In 8 months there have been over 1,000,000 migrant encounters. Yes, you read that right: ONE MILLION migrant encounters and not one Leftist has batted an eye. While they shut down schools, cities, and small businesses; villainize First Responders, and force millions to get the COVID-shot, anyone can walk across our Southern Border without any papers, thermometer check, or mandated vaccines. Even worse, Joe Biden continues to vacation in Delaware and Kamala Harris was flipping a coin at a college football game. And who knows what Lisa Murkowski is doing to stop any of this? That’s right, nothing. WE MUST SECURE THE BORDER! If we don't secure our borders now, we will continue to see the border used as a gateway for human trafficking, drug smuggling, criminals, and hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to come into America. That’s a risk Kelly isn’t going to take! Kelly is going to STAND UP and FIGHT for border protection. But she can’t do it alone! She needs your help! Thanks, Team Kelly | | | | ==

My friend,

BREAKING: Big tech sides with pro-abortion extremists and removes the largest pro-life organization from running ads on their platform.

THIS IS INFURIATING! 😡 But the fake news media continues to turn a blind eye.

I will NOT stand by and let this gross, unconstitutional infringement of free speech happen in this country. Big tech has rejected and removed the nonprofit from its ad platform, including messages with scientific information related to abortion pill reversal and other life-saving options.

Big tech is outrageously biased for banning pro-life messaging while accepting paid ads promoting life-ending abortions.

BIG TECH IS ACTIVELY BANNING CONSERVATIVE IDEAS.
http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/14wnHF7ohUato3BZtGBmsa26

It is more important than ever to STAND UP and help get Republicans elected or Big Tech will continue its aggressive, biased censorship.

Add your name NOW, Friend to the Official Defeat Big Tech Petition!

Conservatives everywhere are standing up to Big Tech and fighting for their constitutional rights. Have you chipped in yet?

I have never seen anything like this in my years in Washington, and I fear it’s only getting worse. STEP UP TODAY! >>

Jim Inhofe

name: Marc Molinaro
subject: Together we can make a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US
body:
Our nation is worth fighting for, and I need your help. Together we can make a difference
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2107498d3546452bba6f0146bfd7033a&_e=rfDw06Mm55jSiwwnik54vi9_QE9sFNAcI5WVYXkgPh7pREVNz6kELuJKOLujmBTYA0l9P4rc-fnEncwgtnilMQiHqLngmDjz5aXmWLXgOabzbcHtQyXjRhZBRu3fe_EtcRojeI4V59E5WZ1gfEl77rD3q8P92oaeSsNbXGn-ZYO0v_7vU0sv1aFiLohA_Glq-2XtzXkRJ1FsC8yK10CkbTvAklh6cHVzlhrfbe0ZoGu6gc_pC10u7H-qEm3uK_TmLzZUB30EAXVU_Tmac-JAgEaOyX8Eff3laPXFnSaAO2E_TGIZ0j1sWHSwLfkKxKiy9oSgkmeuZiHj1Q7PJA9dkNMKF3Xhw3OOm9J_a3blTfscF9cVR1q-thkz-4CG_lRePUi_WNkbvG-KA76-77guuYF9rtA-56ZAu8QJN0lMIwzz511p4eDYBWgB-yBNkjMwVyv4o_YZFqfVb3Wv_mk6vg%3D%3D)

---
| **Do you agree that America is worth fighting for?** I’m asking because I believe our nation is worth every effort possible to ensure it continues to be a beacon of hope for every single one of us, not just the privileged few.

If you agree with that then you’ll agree that we don’t need Congressmembers who are over-promising and never following through; [**we need action.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2107498d3546452bba6f0146bfd7033a&_e=rfDw06Mm55jSiwwnik54vi9_QE9sFNAcI5WVYXkgPh7pREVNz6kELuJKOLujmBTYA0l9P4rc-fnEncwgtnilMQiHqLngmDjz5aXmWLXgOabzbcHtQyXjRhZBRu3fe_EtcRojeI4V59E5WZ1gfEl77rD3q8P92oaeSsNbXGn-ZYO0v_7vU0sv1aFiLohA_Glq-2XtzXkRJ1FsC8yK10CkbTvAklh6cHVzlhrfbe0ZoGu6gc_pC10u7H-qEm3uK_TmhF3IthnuVmdH1An8eOnyHKN-dwwLE4Ibuc80eZrrx9vNnzZz_1_7jga8_GPsDn7Si-hA6pHwt44jkz0QjjOGKEohGMbIcsQ2Upwruhh423yzMf7XMpVDYJwXudjeSNeYAwoxvqdrfCutU1pdd4Eh1maje4CLc62ZBy8aLnGEJq0-ZKEVyf7RwA35FVpkHg4O9aJNoWsyulfEMa6x7hhVow%3D%3D) **That’s why I’m running for Congress and why I need your help to fight for the America we both know and love.**

I’m talking about fighting for the future of our communities, the well-being of our neighbors, and to help New York and America rebound so we can solidify the great promise of this nation: _**life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.**_

This campaign is for your children and mine; for the workers who have struggled like never before to maintain the American dream; for the small business owners and farmers whose ambitions and livelihoods have been ravaged; for those who have been marginalized, left out, and relegated to the sidelines for too long. [**This is a fight for a better tomorrow where every American can live, work, and raise a family.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2107498d3546452bba6f0146bfd7033a&_e=rfDw06Mm55jSiwwnik54vi9_QE9sFNAcI5WVYXkgPh7pREVNz6kELuJKOLujmBTYA0l9P4rc-fnEncwgtnilMQiHqLngmDjz5aXmWLXgOabzbcHtQyXjRhZBRu3fe_EtcRojeI4V59E5WZ1gfEl77rD3q8P92oaeSsNbXGn-ZYO0v_7vU0sv1aFiLohA_Glq-2XtzXkRJ1FsC8yK10CkbTvAklh6cHVzlhrfbe0ZoGu6gc_pC10u7H-qEm3uK_TmALNLx-y_fQ5ZGVEp3FE5x703c9R9GD1gfs80v031d3DiWuxoAEN18abAjU9zUhxOaW5E52Ju3bqozVC1eYeZ-KWn3yl2h3TZHxBJsnoawXUPNnjoeKIe1TA4pxkHA5WSMpXyArhywu-Bgm0FMH1EDP1WHzrExVMemZn4CP4nYh_fRg4y-LdvUlpU1yo7HnYMW6ag05Bir26WcHobe8SyHQ%3D%3D)

If a brighter future with solutions instead of empty promises is something you want, then I need your help [**to fight for an America that we can all be proud of.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2107498d3546452bba6f0146bfd7033a&_e=rfDw06Mm55jSiwwnik54vi9_QE9sFNAcI5WVYXkgPh7pREVNz6kELuJKOLujmBTYA0l9P4rc-fnEncwgtnilMQiHqLngmDjz5aXmWLXgOabzbcHtQyXjRhZBRu3fe_EtcRojeI4V59E5WZ1gfEl77rD3q8P92oaeSsNbXGn-ZYO0v_7vU0sv1aFiLohA_Glq-2XtzXkRJ1FsC8yK10CkbTvAklh6cHVzlhrfbe0ZoGu6gc_pC10u7H-qEm3uK_TmAvJA_VcufpjkoZ8eCzehlM4Tv2GtGRkFAsM3AhdLw93fAmY4sjbqgKMHYE57H7ByORn3FasYVc9Uf_KDfxSk2aGAOwtOcli0o--mUuiqEpRtIY1ygjtUczZLOMcZ3ttrdMqcoMdWB0C6vxatA4hDY75lTCwJF4TKuk6O6QyOBQSo1mRliwImcrv38whnOuWYHu_wxiUIuNlJGlxO0Vwzlw%3D%3D) This is a key race, so if you’re serious about bettering this nation then please join me so we can finally get things done.

**Together we can make a difference, but only if we fight for it.**

Thank you and God bless,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2107498d3546452bba6f0146bfd7033a&_e=rfDw06Mm55jSiwwnik54vi9_QE9sFNAcI5WVYXkgPh7pREVNz6kELuJKOLujmBTYA0l9P4rc-fnEncwgtnilMQiHqLngmDjz5aXmWLXgOabzbcHtQyXjRhZBRu3fe_EtcRojeI4V59E5WZ1gfEl77rD3q8P92oaeSsNbXGn-ZYO0v_7vU0sv1aFiLohA_Glq-2XtzXkRJ1FsC8yK10CkbTvAklh6cHVzlhrfbe0ZoGu6gc_pC10u7H-qEm3uK_TmtT76zuTZMADJff2Ez-GEiwSjbJVHKuDEey7PTQ_kNTVDrofA6Y_q5lARmVAgkhYIRh7fZ9dQtMj7LEbkAdLs0ulyneIeZrUhz3ELRiHASjUhSB0Ters0kxpXqjrH1WfKWCs9gbVyAoU4gpuNhODiG-TULbk0WgggEfM1mQj_z1NBJByV303JX6l4XKqyv3KXaYfCFEoUXO57nJo5cHSygA%3D%3D)
**Marc Molinaro**
Candidate
New York’s 19th Congressional District

[** TAKE ACTION TODAY AND STAND WITH MARC MOLINARO FOR CONGRESS **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2107498d3546452bba6f0146bfd7033a&_e=rfDw06Mm55jSiwwnik54vi9_QE9sFNAcI5WVYXkgPh7pREVNz6kELuJKOLujmBTYA0l9P4rc-fnEncwgtnilMQiHqLngmDjz5aXmWLXgOabzbcHtQyXjRhZBRu3fe_EtcRojeI4V59E5WZ1gfEl77rD3q8P92oaeSsNbXGn-ZYO0v_7vU0sv1aFiLohA_Glq-2XtzXkRJ1FsC8yK10CkbTvAklh6cHVzlhrfbe0ZoGu6gc_pC10u7H-qEm3uK_TmmbDNHHpIS8118QC_2DDmlQW87LfBiuKSgRv2k2KijNJfq9E-FObpIl0I-nuX-zKmAKdzDSKIV6MV5nf5QLc2cSP_qNumWjojT8_MejcgZbhWCLncMavmieiUDCdEHNrORYLJNLKYYCwMlRrzglL9_BYDlxj7BUtJ4AZ9Mp7GIG6InQg-oRL1mQ5FYEyWNbIEMg40E_3x3O8EGYO-QrNHlg%3D%3D)

It would be a grave mistake to assume that we can easily emerge victorious again because our candidates are up against the GOP’s worst of the worst: anti-choice extremists, conspiracy theorists, and Trump loyalists.
