clean_body: Republicans only need to flip these FIVE SEATS to take back their majority in Virginia... | | | That’s right, Derek. All it takes is FIVE Republicans to drag Virginia backward, create a wave of right-wing momentum heading into the 2022 midterms, and yank away our majority – just two years after we flipped the legislature. And that’s exactly what they have in mind for us. Republicans depend on progressive voters and supporters getting complacent and, right now, polling for the Virginia House has control of the chamber within the margin of error. It would be a grave mistake to assume that we can easily emerge victorious again because our candidates are up against the GOP’s worst of the worst: anti-choice extremists, conspiracy theorists, and Trump loyalists. By defending insurrectionists as “normal, good and patriotic,” Virginia Republicans have made it clear that they’re every bit as dangerous as Donald Trump and ready to destroy the life-saving progress Democrats have made for the commonwealth. Right now, our Democratic majority is the only thing standing in their way, Derek. You can make the difference between Democrats or radical, hate-fueled Trumpists controlling Virginia– but we need you to step up right now. Thank you for standing with us, DLCC Team | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . body:

Friend,

I knew it was only a matter of time before left-leaning news networks would start attempting to slander our campaign at every possible opportunity.

CNN has stepped into the role they've come to embrace over the years: The Democrat Party's mouthpiece. _Recently they published a story about me that couldn't be further from the truth._

The truth is that Democrats – including the top executives at CNN – know that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections.

**Friend, we know that distorting facts is what Democrats do best. Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy.**

When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on – or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way.

I chose the latter because the future of our country – and the future of Georgia – is too important to sit on the sidelines.

**[You would be doing me a great honor if you would support our campaign to take back the Senate with a contribution today.](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkMGK2zAQhp9GucnYI9myDj7EiZeFlkCT0KuRpXEiKivGkrvs21cO2UJvBTGgTzMfmt80wAVnuLMN5FDkEgAKJoBnRVZ3IFvWimMnyrLlJeH5pG5K6WgfXjlcYqYf0-7eaDnWNa-HQghhEKThosK65JUp83yocOeae4xzIGxP4C2dgHpdMPuwfkGzSRKLqCZ6xyXoOzpqvU5Mxaj0r0CDogthb2uc-vBYF42EHRf8TaDakFbTrOzNJ6i9f8EJjV2nhHBS1iUYdLp87di_d-fL4b373nddf9n3h9OJ7q_X_eHbpT93PxP6cj98RB_TqNeOwun8o73KuWPpuffOms35LwxPKKtcliYfKKukpryUAx3GitN8UKMyyEY-FLulMfOHdc6GSqRwb9tPn5GmhZwdPxsiWgKwrkkJ8EwP_ke8NcMh1fg549_JlzR7BQJEHP8A-16ZaA)**

Democrats know there is not a more critical Senate race than the one in Georgia, Friend, that's why the attacks on me are going to be constant between now and November 2022.

We've got to be ready for anything.

Thank you,

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: What Maddow said last night:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The Build Back Better plan is being held up by a group of conservative Democrats and the GOP.
#
Peter,
I want to take us back just for a minute — to when Joe Biden was campaigning in 2020.
He ran for president on delivering investments in climate action, paid leave, universal child care, pre-K, housing, health care, and more. He also pledged to lower the cost of prescription drugs.
What happened next? Joe Biden became President Biden. Democrats held the House. And with two massive victories in Georgia, we flipped the Senate too. But now, conservative Democrats, corporate lobbyists, Wall Street, and Big Pharma are doing everything they can to stop each and every one of the policies I outlined above. **Corporate America and conservative Democrats are trying to stop our Build Back Better Act. They are trying to stop our agenda.**
I joined Rachel Maddow last night to make the case for why it’s so critical that we pass the $3.5 trillion Build Back Better Act without the cruel cuts that corporate America is asking for. [**I will continue making the case to people across America and my colleagues that we must pass economic relief and act on climate change. Can you chip in $3 to fuel my work to pass this bill and show why bold, progressive action is so critical right now?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6117?refcode=em20210922-657&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=657%2E420207%2Eyjz0xE)
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6117?refcode=em20210922-657&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=657%2E420207%2Eyjz0xE)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210922?refcode=em20210922-657&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=657_420207_yjz0xE&akid=657%2E420207%2Eyjz0xE)**
Corporate America and Big Pharma don't like that we’re asking them to pay their fair share in taxes to support these bold and transformative investments in working people. They’re working overtime and spending lots of money to stop our momentum — and to stop Medicare expansion and long-overdue climate action.
**Progressives will not fall for their cynical ploys. We will use our power as a caucus to ensure that we get the investments that Democrats and the people demand! Just like Rachel Maddow said, we’re flexing our progressive muscle.**
[**If you’re with me in the fight to secure economic relief and climate action in the Build Back Better Act, can you chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to our campaign today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6117?refcode=em20210922-657&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=657%2E420207%2Eyjz0xE) _This fight is far from over — and with your help today, I’m going to continue putting the pressure on my colleagues to come together and get this done._
I’m so grateful to have you by my side. More soon,
Pramila

clean_body: The Build Back Better plan is being held up by a group of conservative Democrats and the GOP. Peter, I want to take us back just for a minute — to when Joe Biden was campaigning in 2020. He ran for president on delivering investments in climate action, paid leave, universal child care, pre-K, housing, health care, and more. He also pledged to lower the cost of prescription drugs. What happened next? Joe Biden became President Biden. Democrats held the House. And with two massive victories in Georgia, we flipped the Senate too. But now, conservative Democrats, corporate lobbyists, Wall Street, and Big Pharma are doing everything they can to stop each and every one of the policies I outlined above. Corporate America and conservative Democrats are trying to stop our Build Back Better Act. They are trying to stop our agenda. I joined Rachel Maddow last night to make the case for why it’s so critical that we pass the $3.5 trillion Build Back Better Act without the cruel cuts that corporate America is asking for. Corporate America and Big Pharma don't like that we’re asking them to pay their fair share in taxes to support these bold and transformative investments in working people. They’re working overtime and spending lots of money to stop our momentum — and to stop Medicare expansion and long-overdue climate action. Progressives will not fall for their cynical ploys. We will use our power as a caucus to ensure that we get the investments that Democrats and the people demand! Just like Rachel Maddow said, we’re flexing our progressive muscle. This fight is far from over — and with your help today, I’m going to continue putting the pressure on my colleagues to come together and get this done. I’m so grateful to have you by my side. More soon, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

subject: Congressman Jay Obernolte Endorses Nathan Hochman for Attorney General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
body:
Congressman Jay Obernolte has announced his support for Nathan Hochman in the 2022 race for California Attorney General. | | | [Peter, to v](https://mailchi.mp/danemwhite/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4428502?e=94837ebab3)[iew this email in ](https://mailchi.mp/danemwhite/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4428502?e=94837ebab3)[your](https://mailchi.mp/danemwhite/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4428502?e=94837ebab3)[ browser](https://mailchi.mp/danemwhite/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4428502?e=94837ebab3)[, click here.](https://mailchi.mp/danemwhite/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4428502?e=94837ebab3)
---
| |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
September 22, 2021
---
Contact:
press@nathanhochman.com
---
| **Congressman Jay Obernolte Endorses Nathan Hochman for Attorney General**
---
| **Los Angeles, CA –** Congressman Jay Obernolte, who represents parts of the Inland Empire in Congress, has announced his support for former US Assistant Attorney General and candidate for California Attorney General, Nathan Hochman, as he runs to succeed Newsom appointee Rob Bonta in 2022.

In announcing his endorsement, Congressman Obernolte stated: _“California families are feeling the effects of Sacramento's failed experiments in criminal justice reform. Homelessness is out of control, crime is persistently rising, and the opioid epidemic is claiming more lives than ever before. Nathan Hochman will bring a fresh approach to dealing with these issues and restore balance to our state's criminal justice system."_

In response to the news, Hochman stated _"I am very appreciative to have Congressman Jay Obernolte join our growing campaign to reduce crime and improve public safety across California."_

Nathan Hochman is an experienced prosecutor, defense attorney, and civic leader. After earning his law degree from Stanford Law School, Hochman clerked for a Los Angeles US District Court Judge before becoming an Assistant US Attorney for the Central District of California. As a prosecutor, Hochman brought justice to corrupt government officials, tax evaders, drug lords, and violent gang members. As a partner in private practice, Hochman has defended the constitutional rights of individuals and organizations for over two decades. In 2008, President George W. Bush appointed Hochman to serve as an Assistant Attorney General and was unanimously confirmed by the US Senate. Nathan has served his community on numerous charitable boards and as a member and President of the Los Angeles City Ethics Commission.

Since launching his campaign at the end of April, Hochman has raised nearly a million dollars—establishing himself as the leading Republican challenger to Gavin Newsom-appointed Attorney General Rob Bonta in the 2022 election.

For updates on this campaign, visit [NathanHochman.com](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=f53f4334cf&e=94837ebab3) or follow Nathan Hochman for Attorney General on [Facebook](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=c9e4459e27&e=94837ebab3), [Twitter](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=8fc3d12208&e=94837ebab3), [Instagram](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=aab46565d5&e=94837ebab3) and [TikTok](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=3ccc4e34db&e=94837ebab3). ###
---

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: U.S. Funds Project to Boost Racial, Ethnic, Gender Diversity in Science at Private Women’s College
body:
The government agency that gave a professor hundreds of thousands of dollars to study white supremacy and racial injustice in U.S. landmarks is giving a small Wisconsin liberal arts college half a million dollars to boost “racial/ethnic and gender diversity” in science fields and “broaden participation of underrepresented minorities.”

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | September 22, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56725&L=25902&F=H&)
---
# [U.S. Funds Project to Boost Racial, Ethnic, Gender Diversity in Science at Private Women’s College](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56725&L=25902&F=H&)
The government agency that gave a professor hundreds of thousands of dollars to study white supremacy and racial injustice in U.S. landmarks is giving a small Wisconsin liberal arts college half a million dollars to boost “racial/ethnic and gender diversity” in science fields and “broaden participation of underrepresented minorities.” The money is flowing through the National Science Foundation (NSF), which was created by Congress seven decades ago to promote the progress of science, advance national health and prosperity and secure the national defense. Lately, it seems the agency is focusing a lot more on racial justice endeavors that exclude large portions of the American population.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56725&L=25902&F=H&)
|

| |
---

In fact, as newly released documents from the NIH reveal, the Federal Government provided financial support for “gain-of-function research of concern,” at the Wuhan Institute of Virology, contradicting Fauci’s recent denial of any NIH-funded gain-of-function studies at the Chinese institute. ### [Judicial Watch: New HHS Documents Reveal Sexual and Physical Abuse of Unaccompanied Minors ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56725&L=25895&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaGhzLWRvY3MtYWJ1c2UtbWlub3JzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTIyMjIxNzE5) Judicial Watch The records include a spreadsheet of data from the HHS Office of Refugee Resettlement and lists 33 “sexual abuse allegations” involving “unaccompanied children” (UAC) for the time period of January 21, 2021, to February 26, 2021. clean_body: The government agency that gave a professor hundreds of thousands of dollars to study white supremacy and racial injustice in U.S. landmarks is giving a small Wisconsin liberal arts college half a million dollars to boost “racial/ethnic and gender diversity” in science fields and “broaden participation of underrepresented minorities.” | | | Because no one is above the law! | September 22, 2021 ---|---|--- | | = = The government agency that gave a professor hundreds of thousands of dollars to study white supremacy and racial injustice in U.S. landmarks is giving a small Wisconsin liberal arts college half a million dollars to boost “racial/ethnic and gender diversity” in science fields and “broaden participation of underrepresented minorities.” The money is flowing through the National Science Foundation (NSF), which was created by Congress seven decades ago to promote the progress of science, advance national health and prosperity and secure the national defense. Lately, it seems the agency is focusing a lot more on racial justice endeavors that exclude large portions of the American population. = | | | = Judicial Watch Hearings into President Biden’s disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal got underway last week on Capitol Hill. Like many Americans, here at Judicial Watch we were shocked and outraged by the Kabul debacle—the collapse of U.S. foreign policy, the chaotic airfield scenes, the suicide bombing that killed thirteen American military personnel and scores of others, the bungled U.S. drone strike that took down no ISIS enemy but managed to wipe out ten members of an American-friendly Afghan family, including seven children. = Judicial Watch The Biden administration’s proposed vaccine mandate, coupled with new revelations tying the NIH to gain-of-function research in China, has many Americans – including Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton – raising concerns about Dr. Fauci’s tenure and what he may have known about the COVID-19 crisis. In fact, as newly released documents from the NIH reveal, the Federal Government provided financial support for “gain-of-function research of concern,” at the Wuhan Institute of Virology, contradicting Fauci’s recent denial of any NIH-funded gain-of-function studies at the Chinese institute. Judicial Watch The records include a spreadsheet of data from the HHS Office of Refugee Resettlement and lists 33 “sexual abuse allegations” involving “unaccompanied children” (UAC) for the time period of January 21, 2021, to February 26, 2021. These incidents seemed to be tied to “voluntary agencies” (VOLAGs), which are contractors for the federal government. Ten of the allegations of sexual abuse were made against staff and “non-staff” members. Twenty-one incidents of children sexually assaulting other children while in government contracted care facilities were reported. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

Our team is looking forward to welcoming the president to the Peach State for the first time since we received his endorsement for the United States Senate.

**Surprise-surprise** , the Democrats have already started sending out emails attacking both the president and me. Their emails are angry, full of hate, and desperate. They know that the Senate Majority will be decided in Georgia.

**Democrats know that just by mentioning President Trump, their donors from across the country will send hundreds of thousands of dollars to my opponent's campaign. The thing is, President Trump hears about the emails Democrats send out about him, and I know he is going to ask me how much we've raised in the lead up to the rally.**

**My answer has to be, "More than the Democrats, Mr. President."**

subject: RE: President Biden’s announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Will you sign now and let us know if you CONDEMN Republicans for their COVID-19 lies and disinformation?
| | _**FOX NEWS POLL: Nearly 70% of Americans SUPPORT wearing masks and getting vaccinated**_

| A brand new poll just revealed most Americans SUPPORT wearing masks and getting vaccinated.

But Republicans have been busy undermining trust in vaccines and opposing mask mandates!

**We must set the record straight and CONDEMN failed Republican leadership on COVID-19.**

[**So quickly: Will you sign now and let us know if you CONDEMN Republicans for their COVID-19 lies and disinformation?******](https://links.e.dccc.)[****](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_wMDXW~)
| [SIGN NOW >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcXq~)
---

**A brand new poll just revealed that nearly 70% of Americans _SUPPORT_ wearing masks and getting vaccinated to crush this deadly virus.**

But Republicans have been working against the health and safety of the American people by **UNDERMINING** trust in vaccines, **OPPOSING** mask mandates, and **ATTACKING** our Democrats' science-based response.

That's why we're so proud to see President Biden bring the kind of leadership we so desperately need right now:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

Look: **We have the tools we need to create a safer, healthier country for everyone.**

And we're thrilled to see the majority of Americans supporting our efforts to crush COVID-19.

But we can't get the job done as long as Republicans and their Fox News lackeys continue spreading lies and disinformation that harms people.

**So we 're calling on 15,000 grassroots Democrats to help us set the record straight and CONDEMN failed Republican leadership on COVID-19.**
---
[Quickly: Will you sign now and let us know if you CONDEMN Republicans for their COVID-19 lies and disinformation?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_)

Thank you,

DCCC

name: Protect Roe v. Wade
subject: Can we count on you to protect Roe v. Wade?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
this is no time to stay quiet | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGEYTRudGyIDjS_D6wZKijTcciarVzBgBFxLf4K7JcHHD_3P8YstD_2-FK8NeZ8mHhTTzl0GvGufbsEXMqOzfMOWWOw1l3kbVnJaLw-op5rTQDBt0-HtxzJamt_ewDCcrDxpo21eMqDnJZBLSaM2aVXZRBEYvvpy71yEDuaXzvx3UwDU_BBK2HJQQAaEmvlSM9eqF047vhK2Fdc8X21ASE5-CmAL9uY0-tDKSH0VcPCRvlYQANXz1pKNKQ2070-9j16VxxCAICV451pCKWdnNT-s1vacUXpo0hxHk6bMj4T8mN5pImfd679vT8sQCZvIWJNQzK_g8vxY_4SsjW5ovfnM/3fj/xlLaKx45SaiOgyDpt_G1Fg/h0/-1CILOteEkysjSQU9Zchhwj1MY7pAbe7kbxPF3NxXyk)
Derek, recently, a right-wing majority on the Supreme Court abandoned _Roe v. Wade_ by refusing to stop a radical Texas law that banned most abortions.

As you may have heard, the Texas law is one of the most extreme abortion bans ever passed in our country.

Unbelievably, the law lets any person from anywhere in the country sue any Texan who helps someone get access to an abortion.

It’s a disgusting law, and we can’t stay silent, but now, a law in Mississippi is in front of the Supreme Court, and they’re asking the Court to get rid of _Roe v. Wade_ \-- _ENTIRELY_.

We believe that _Roe v. Wade_ is the law of the land and that no one has the right to tell someone else what they can or can’t do with their bodies.
**[If you agree, will you sign on to tell the Supreme Court that _Roe v. Wade_ is the law of the land?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnHGUPYeLKh03BaQja4Wsmm0g8hC4HFvqUuWk5rhAtRzCIs_rEAeRO5j_oKHesiC7BQ9Hm9Xtcmd1mBAd-0uK-2SxEWNJKgJH8wdrMllGhaqJ7M8PZu9YDCN5RUtEz4Gr5BdpIfTRfkRBocuO03_1Nyb85XSvy2kL5fN92JE1YZA0LWSM07QZ1INmz0Hcs_RHHgN03zAjXtHet050CYXPtar49IaWAMMUj1cXGFdZil12ZuewHNcLxFny_9A5pf2zS90Zi-SuqC_LUNdLagqiAJ7uQz1eD_FG3RJw2cHpalPg/3fj/xlLaKx45SaiOgyDpt_G1Fg/h1/G9oG5fO3gprcnNd3umPldpbpb4OnOBok-2RbWAhhFzM)** **[ SIGN ON ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnHGUPYeLKh03BaQja4Wsmm0g8hC4HFvqUuWk5rhAtRzInlx2Vl92rkAl5e9swZe5ovzxH38ca-eNha9wCf7_GTz61DnVxG3qbxbQx7GFrDb4G66-UihYIWEPkOZbFcm0wfOEs9ue4wHFqVssFbII-n0kCe4Wjmosd-w-B672AsR_zNoZiJHXGPa14z4nwolAvPFuWu8dBtbq9AnC-Bj6wD0RZst1qd96rb1QTtA-0-Yb8FVPqHLOsmo97pdGblItrKPbikvKqWeu4bswgEvJo-KtW1X4sAUm40j-vqc0RA6g/3fj/xlLaKx45SaiOgyDpt_G1Fg/h2/EVInfM2J_YtkHvykwDkcHdM8JgV6mu_VmRPgmN0TKjo) ** \-- Common Good VA

body:
President Trump is headed to Georgia this Saturday! Our team is looking forward to welcoming the president to the Peach State for the first time since |
---
**MY CAMPAIGN MUST RAISE $85,000 BEFORE PRESIDENT TRUMP'S RALLY ON SATURDAY

We cannot let Dems outraise us and add to their $10 million Georgia war chest. We need your help to show President Trump that he endorsed the right candidate for U.S. Senate. **
[**Chip-in $5 before SATURDAY**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81d710d0bae1472c9dbd9adf759b24c9&_e=dvqaPugaJduY-vUas2uVsbherWjrdMNbJkskloFnzpwNf45cuW04bTStVfBbfTGWf6PFUBVJGc-emkrKivD3THFQPLxLwp0P8qmSyzDnZkZrAZlYgTvlhS788xfTlU3jrKwVILg1I9uFU7GD1as2V0XlgNTS4g_ZEwfxWs4TmvtKhizwSHslR2SyzXWoqJ7wjC6nVA8oc5Z0Ute8_FDEmLuOeevOWNOJg-6WKf2KB0WG4GUpnyX1LyMWuukpCfiN5m8B8J8pmvWCQnl-Yya4PIrBlghBuY_-_wmjkWQx5mrKs1Lco8vl7RfS-emOJRagA-lX1XIi1GlxWthWnGUNtiAIUhVIbXirUDT0KYzricNLQoR_UaTGOg7D2L2UJ7CbBXkPnEo7l9_ynquBtUE4f4THjs6bjrCJLQMKEsQjqtbKQpTjr7dA35uI77vu4svBGZCxd6MI84yIflrC78i9hA%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

President Trump is headed to Georgia for a rally this Saturday, September 25th!

Our team is looking forward to welcoming the president to the Peach State for the first time since we received his endorsement for the United States Senate.

**Surprise-surprise** , the Democrats have already started sending out emails attacking both the president and me. Their emails are angry, full of hate, and desperate. They know that the Senate Majority will be decided in Georgia.

**Democrats know that just by mentioning President Trump, their donors from across the country will send hundreds of thousands of dollars to my opponent's campaign. The thing is, President Trump hears about the emails Democrats send out about him, and I know he is going to ask me how much we've raised in the lead up to the rally.**

**My answer has to be, "More than the Democrats, Mr. President."**

**[Fellow American, we've got less than a week, and my campaign must raise $85,000 before the Trump rally Saturday evening. Can I ask you to chip in $25, $50, $100 - or $34, my favorite number - today to help us reach our goal?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81d710d0bae1472c9dbd9adf759b24c9&_e=dvqaPugaJduY-vUas2uVsbherWjrdMNbJkskloFnzpwNf45cuW04bTStVfBbfTGWf6PFUBVJGc-emkrKivD3THFQPLxLwp0P8qmSyzDnZkZrAZlYgTvlhS788xfTlU3jrKwVILg1I9uFU7GD1as2V0XlgNTS4g_ZEwfxWs4TmvtKhizwSHslR2SyzXWoqJ7wjC6nVA8oc5Z0Ute8_FDEmLuOeevOWNOJg-6WKf2KB0WG4GUpnyX1LyMWuukpCfiNnge8zjVAv4-XUkINey6MgRagTOpElfBTJGJuRWaRih552WHsz5O3K8uobsWGLow0ntIn4w_XPydRKNsmrJVLgWSitaZcC0_J1Lmthl8Lmcd3aTpE_XGcFNmeGemLuMuBoOeWWlJk9T_Xh_s8NYdkx_T3vXOKKMHB_pOeYlfuz5ydawRreMcK1rj-cZzLMXlP-et6KIXW8wV8Lmth091kfw%3D%3D)**

[**HELP US OUTRAISE GEORGIA DEMS

CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81d710d0bae1472c9dbd9adf759b24c9&_e=dvqaPugaJduY-vUas2uVsbherWjrdMNbJkskloFnzpwNf45cuW04bTStVfBbfTGWf6PFUBVJGc-emkrKivD3THFQPLxLwp0P8qmSyzDnZkZrAZlYgTvlhS788xfTlU3jrKwVILg1I9uFU7GD1as2V0XlgNTS4g_ZEwfxWs4TmvtKhizwSHslR2SyzXWoqJ7wjC6nVA8oc5Z0Ute8_FDEmLuOeevOWNOJg-6WKf2KB0WG4GUpnyX1LyMWuukpCfiNNnLDJLS8oX_2Vh16t3bsWbSqO7tDbvhSfh3kkrikOfwzqsWlG5NiAPL5zQYn-zS3WnvIJrGUcOCXLh3ezn11raGi8dF_4gh8oL4GRfly2OIxQKhNP2QeVz3pK8Y6wBoIMPBhOLh8r86BlQhFBRvtWfKAUwOZujW_u93whxiUeubBIdH0MAsIR3sybyUGsE1Qn6BtmBrRyv1VojXPqNMC3A%3D%3D)
**Thank you in advance for any help you're able to give** , and I assure you it will make President Trump's week if we are able to tell him that our campaign outraised our Democrat opponent in the lead up to his first Georgia rally in months.

Thank you,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81d710d0bae1472c9dbd9adf759b24c9&_e=dvqaPugaJduY-vUas2uVsbherWjrdMNbJkskloFnzpwNf45cuW04bTStVfBbfTGWf6PFUBVJGc-emkrKivD3THFQPLxLwp0P8qmSyzDnZkZrAZlYgTvlhS788xfTlU3jrKwVILg1I9uFU7GD1as2V0XlgNTS4g_ZEwfxWs4TmvtKhizwSHslR2SyzXWoqJ7wjC6nVA8oc5Z0Ute8_FDEmLuOeevOWNOJg-6WKf2KB0WG4GUpnyX1LyMWuukpCfiNoTsS-uKDRQx2BDG4ldMczujDtli__Jp0RAL0XZiyqP6n_XJ6rtMfA5YVhQowQgu1lJe4VNXGqkL4Xk9gVGEPNF7Mf8gHpXTFyoRGb91ruPvzaOabsZNAiPvBeUvP8qUBU0v8gg7lGuwDq9_2EFLKslSrn9PK2m2ztmIHwoedZjfavR0pqPT6PfujhkdPvKE5EQAMTE0IM3Za3XUUbQsBFA%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker

clean_body: President Trump is headed to Georgia this Saturday! Our team is looking forward to welcoming the president to the Peach State for the first time since | MY CAMPAIGN MUST RAISE $85,000 BEFORE PRESIDENT TRUMP'S RALLY ON SATURDAY We cannot let Dems outraise us and add to their $10 million Georgia war chest. We need your help to show President Trump that he endorsed the right candidate for U.S. Senate. Fellow American, President Trump is headed to Georgia for a rally this Saturday, September 25th! Our team is looking forward to welcoming the president to the Peach State for the first time since we received his endorsement for the United States Senate. Surprise-surprise , the Democrats have already started sending out emails attacking both the president and me. Their emails are angry, full of hate, and desperate. They know that the Senate Majority will be decided in Georgia. Democrats know that just by mentioning President Trump, their donors from across the country will send hundreds of thousands of dollars to my opponent's campaign. The thing is, President Trump hears about the emails Democrats send out about him, and I know he is going to ask me how much we've raised in the lead up to the rally. My answer has to be, "More than the Democrats, Mr. President." Thank you in advance for any help you're able to give , and I assure you it will make President Trump's week if we are able to tell him that our campaign outraised our Democrat opponent in the lead up to his first Georgia rally in months. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .
